# 2.12 Traceability

## 2.12.0-1 Traceability FA: Troubleshooting Document Owner: Prasanna Br (Nokia) (ID: 11200234)

## 2.12.1 Sherpa Trace

### 2.12.1.0-1 Sherpa Trace (ID: 11200247)

**2.12.1.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11200256`)

Sherpa Trace [Not Valid from this onwards][Before CNI-115810-B]

Sherpa trace functionality provides overview of L2 <-> L1 interfaces.

For 5G-L2-PS this means mainly exchanges between the DL/UL scheduler and DL/UL L1.

Sherpa trace supports only streaming mode.

Streaming mode shall stream trace information to external server by IP/UDP messages.

Streaming mode shall be activated and deactivated by user request according to 5G_L1L2_FLOW_769_replaced([11205620](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BgmKwfvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

5G-L2-PS shall support Sherpa traces independently from L2 trace (5G_L2_1598_replaced([11200736](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29ssY_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

[End CNI-115810-B].

---

### 2.12.1.0-2 Sherpa Trace Sherpa trace type (ID: 11200263)

**2.12.1.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11200277`)

Sherpa Trace [Not Valid from this onwards][Before CNI-115810-B]

Sherpa trace shall support following traceComponent types.

|  |   
---|---|---  
Trace types | Raw values | Description  
DU-L2PS_DL | 0,1 | Trace provides Cells info for DL events  
DU-L2PS_UL | 0,1 | Trace provides Cells info for UL events  
DU-L2PS_Periodic_DL | 0,1 | Trace provides periodically latest Cell info and UE infos for DL  
DU-L2PS_Periodic_UL | 0 | Trace provides periodically latest UE infos for UL  
DU-L2PS_Periodic | 2 | Trace provides QCI info for each bearer  
DU-L2PS_Periodic_100ms_DL | 0 | Trace provides EIRP info from DL scheduler  
  
Raw values:

 0 : standard Sherpa

 1 : extended Sherpa first level

 2: Extended Sherpa second level

[End CNI-115810-B]

---

##### 2.12.1.1.1.0-2 DDT interface Extensions for L2LogDu_StreamSherpaInd (ID: 11200311)

**2.12.1.1.1.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11200321`)

DDT interface [Not Valid from this onwards][Before CNI-115810-B]

If 5GC002200 is enabled (i.e. dlMimoMode = ClosedLoopSpatialMultiplexing_8x4), L2LogDu_StreamSherpaInd needs to be extended as following table shows:

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
Message / Procedure | Extension | Trace Type / Event | First Feature  
cell setup procedure | \+ ClosedLoopSpatialMultiplexing_8x4 enumeration value into dlMimoMode | DU-L2PS_Periodic_DL / periodic Cell report (500ms) | 5GC002200-A  
cell setup procedure | \+ N1N2 configuration of cell specific periodic CSI-RS resources sets, totally 3 resource sets need to be supported, 3 bits  available only when 5GC002200 is enabled  1 bit for each CSI-RS resource set configuration  CSI-RS resource set sequence / bit sequence: o bit 0: the CSI-RS resource set including 1 CSI-RS resources o bit 1: the CSI-RS resource set including 2 CSI-RS resources o bit 2: the CSI-RS resource set including 4 CSI-RS resources  bit value: o 0: n1n2=4x1 o 1: n1n2=2x2 Note: in 5GC002200-A, configuration is fixed to: CSI-RS resource set sequence = 0, n1n2=4x1 | DU-L2PS_Periodic_DL / periodic Cell report (500ms) | 5GC002200-B  
user setup procedure | \+ number of periodic CSI-RS resources for channel state feedback configured on UE side, 2bits. We can deduce the relevant CSI-RS resource set sequence and N1N2 configuration of it. | DU-L2PS_Periodic_DL (TraceFormat=0) / | 5GC002200-B  
UlData_PucchReceiveReq | \+ PUCCH_Report_Type, 2 bits  0: No Precision of Report Type [Before 2200] ; Reserved [from 2200]  1: PUCCH will include CSI for channel state measurement  2: PUCCH will include Beam measurement  3: PUCCH will not include CSI, nor Beam | DU-L2PS_DL / basic DL UE report (per Slot) | 5GC002200-A  
UlData_PucchReceiveRespPs | Extend RI from 1 bit to 2bits + LI, 2 bits extend PMI (i11/i12/i13/i2) from 6 bits to 7 bits | DU-L2PS_DL / RRM calculation result | 5GC002200-A  
UlData_PucchReceiveRespPs | \+ CRI, 2 bits Further extend PMI (i11/i12/i13/i2) from 7 bits (U7) to 9 bits | DU-L2PS_DL / RRM calculation result | 5GC002200-B  
DlData_CsiRsSendReq | \+ 4 patternIDs, 5 bits each | DU-L2PS_DL / CSI-RS send request (2) | 5GC002200-A  
DlData_CsiRsSendReq | extend the -A added 4 patternIDs to 9 bits each | DU-L2PS_DL / CSI-RS send request (2) | 5GC002200-B  
DlData_PdcchSendReq | \+ 1 patternID, 4 bits | DU-L2PS_DL / basic DL UE report (per Slot) | 5GC002200-A  
DlData_PdcchSendReq | extend the -A added patternID to 9 bits + 1 patternID, 9 bits * | DU-L2PS_DL / basic DL UE report (per Slot) | 5GC002200-B  
DlData_PdschSendReq | \+ 2 patternIDs, 4 bits each | DU-L2PS_DL / PDSCH send request | 5GC002200-A  
DlData_PdschSendReq | extend -A added 2 patternID to 9 bits each | DU-L2PS_DL / PDSCH send request | 5GC002200-B  
  
  * seems this extra patternID is not needed. Added it anyway, e.g. for future extension consideration.



Note: patternID added to trace CSI-RS / PDCCH / PDSCH events is not the actual pattern ID that sent to RRU via L1, but the offset of it from startCsirsPmiPatternId.

[End CNI-115810-B]

##### 2.12.1.1.2.0-2 DU-L2PS_DL with raw = 0 (Standard Sherpa) Slot Type in FDD (ID: 11200361)

**2.12.1.1.2.0-2.0-2**  (ID: `11200371`)

DU-L2PS_DL with raw = 0 (Standard Sherpa) [Not Valid from this onwards][Before CNI-115810-B]

In FDD cases where DlData_SlotTypeRequest is not sent to L1, under the described conditions (refer to 5G_L2_4518_replaced([11157507](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25F5OfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the range and values of “SlotType” field in DU-L2PS_DL Sherpa report are extended as follow:

|  |  |  |   
---|---|---|---|---  
Extended SlotTypes for SHERPA | SHERPA Label | Conditions | DSS phase | First Feature  
0x7E: DL grant, normal case | DL | slot type = 53 MBSFNFrame | DSSPhase1 | 5GC001904-F  
0x7D: DL-CSI in 4G within 5G DL transmission | CS | reserved for future use |  |   
0x7C: Other special DL | SP | reserved for future use |  |   
0x7B: SSB slot | SS | SSB slot : two first symbols empty/DTXed and containing CSI-RS for tracking MBSFNFrame | DSSPhase1 | 5GC001904-F  
0x7A: Slot reserved for 4G | 4G | no slot type selected | DSSPhase1 | 5GC001904-F  
0x79: CSI-RS (tracking) | TK | slot type = 54 (Tracking) | DSSPhase2 | 5GC001586-A  
0x78: Normal for CSI-RS (Ca:monitoring)+TRS(Ct) | B _(Type B_ frame) | TBC |  |   
0x78 : Shared MBSFN frame | P4 |  | DSSPhase3 | 5GC001745-C  
0x77: Shared MBSFN subframe: SSB+CSI-RS(Ca)+TRS(Ct) | S1 (Type B frame) | SSB slot (SSB+TRS+CSI-RS) | DSSPhase2 | 5GC001586-A  
0x76: Shared MBSFN subframe: SSB+CSI-RS(Ca) | B+ (Type B** frame) | SSB slot (SSB+CSI-RS) | DSSPhase2 | 5GC001586-A  
0x75: Normal for NR (with LTE CRS) | D2 (Type C1 frame) | slot type = 53 (Rate Matching) | DSSPhase2 | 5GC001586-A  
0x74: Normal for NR (With LTE CRS) | D1 (Type C2 frame) | slot type = 58 (Puncturing) | DSSPhase2 | 5GC001586-A  
0x73: CSI-RS (tracking, measurement) | TM | slot type = 54 containing CSI-RS for tracking and CSI-RS for channel measurement MBSFNFrame | DSSPhase1 | 5GC001904-F  
0x72 : Partial for NR (with LTE with PSS/SSS/PBCH) | P1 | (LTE PSS/SSS/PBCH for 6PRBs / symbols 5 to 10) | DSSPhase3 | 5GC001745-C  
0x71 : Partial for NR (based 0x72 With LTE PDSCH) | P2 | (LTE PSS/SSS 6PRBs/Symb5&6 + K LTE-PDSCH) | DSSPhase3 | 5GC001745-C  
0x70 : Partial for NR (with LTE PDSCH) | P3 | (K LTE-PDSCH on upper part of PRBs) | DSSPhase3 | 5GC001745-C  
  
[End CNI-115810-B]

#### 2.12.1.1.4 DU-L2PS_Periodic_DL with raw = 0 (Standard Sherpa)

##### 2.12.1.1.4.0-1 DU-L2PS_Periodic_DL with raw = 0 (Standard Sherpa) DL with raw = 0 (ID: 11200430)

**2.12.1.1.4.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11200444`)

DU-L2PS_Periodic_DL with raw = 0 (Standard Sherpa) [Not Valid from this onwards][Before CNI-115810-B]

1 streaming indication is sent regularly (i.e. each 500 ms)

1 streaming indication contains information related to 8 subCells.Both static and pooled subcells shall be provided

This streaming indication does not contain information related to UEs.

Refer to 5G_L2_1591_replaced([11200653](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29sFVPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for the streaming indication containing information related to UEs.

For further details, please refer to DDT interface in 5G_L2_1562_replaced([11200291](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29ppFPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[End CNI-115810-B]

#### 2.12.1.1.5 DU-L2PS_Periodic_UL with raw = 0 (Standard Sherpa)

##### 2.12.1.1.5.0-1 DU-L2PS_Periodic_UL with raw = 0 (Standard Sherpa) UL with raw = 0 (ID: 11200454)

**2.12.1.1.5.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11200472`)

DU-L2PS_Periodic_UL with raw = 0 (Standard Sherpa) [Not Valid from this onwards][Before CNI-115810-B]

1 streaming indication is sent regularly (i.e. each 500 ms)

1 streaming indication contains information related to 8 subCells. Both static and pooled subcells shall be provided

1 streaming indication contains information related to 100 UEs

It is requested to be able to send information related to 500 UEs

It means that 5 L2LogDu_StreamSherpaInd messages are needed to report information related to 500 UEs

Below this, a second structure is shown with two fields: "Header" (64 bits) and "UE Information" (100_ 96 bits). Finally, a third structure depicts a series of "UE Information" fields. It starts with "UE(X+0) Information" (96 bits), followed by an ellipsis (...), and ends with "UE(X+99) Information" (96 bits). This suggests a collection of 100 UE information entries, each 96 bits in size.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m24dng_5G_L2_Entity_Level_file_9869.001.png[/image_path][/image-0]

For further details, please refer to <https://confluence.ext.net.nokia.com/pages/viewpage.action?pageId=669165994>

[End CNI-115810-B]

#### 2.12.1.1.6 DU-L2PS_DL with raw = 1 (Extended Sherpa) and rdSherpaBitMapVector.bit0=1

##### 2.12.1.1.6.0-1 DU-L2PS_DL with raw = 1 (Extended Sherpa) and rdSherpaBitMapVector.bit0=1 DL with raw = 1 (ID: 11200483)

**2.12.1.1.6.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11200493`)

DU-L2PS_DL with raw = 1 (Extended Sherpa) and rdSherpaBitMapVector.bit0=1 [Not Valid from this onwards][Before CNI-115810-B]

1 streaming indication is sent as soon as the memory buffer is completed (i.e. the remaining free buffer space is smaller than the arriving event size)

Otherwise (i.e. the memory buffer is not completed at the end of the slot), 1 streaming indication is sent at the end each slot (i.e. each 125 µs or 500 µs)

If there is no data collected during the slot, no streaming indication will be sent to Sherpa

Currently, the following DL events are supported:

  * CSI-RS send request

  * PUCCH receive request

  * RRM calculation result

  * Second PUCCH event




-HarqD UCI on PUSCH

  * Paging and SIBx PDSCH event



For further details, please refer to DDT interface in 5G_L2_1562_replaced([11200291](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29ppFPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[End CNI-115810-B]

---

1 streaming indication is sent as soon as the memory buffer is completed (i.e. the remaining free buffer space is smaller than the arriving event size)

Otherwise (i.e. the memory buffer is not completed at the end of the slot), 1 streaming indication is sent at the end each slot (i.e. each 125 µs or 500 µs)

If there is no data collected during the slot, no streaming indication will be sent to Sherpa

Currently, the following DL events are supported:

  * PDCCH send request

  * SSBlock send request

  * PDSCH send request

#### 2.12.1.1.11 DU-L2PS_Periodic_DL with raw = 2 (Extended Sherpa 2)

##### 2.12.1.1.11.0-1 DU-L2PS_Periodic_DL with raw = 2 (Extended Sherpa 2) DL with raw = 2 (ID: 11200599)

**2.12.1.1.11.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11200614`)

DU-L2PS_Periodic_DL with raw = 2 (Extended Sherpa 2) [Not valid from this onwards][Before CNI-115810-B]

This periodic UDP streaming message contains the relation between the logicalChannelIdentity (LcId) to the corresponding QoS Identification value (5G_L2_IF_397_replaced([10974876](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U-o4vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for all bearers of UEs belonging to cells of the sherpaCellGroupId supported by the L2RT instance. All L2RT instances are reporting in parallel with different sherpaCellGroupId..

This message is sent as periodic manner with the periodicity of 500ms like other DL & UL periodic messages.

The goal is that Sherpa is aware of the configuration, even if the mobile is established since a long time.

The message is sent through UDP streaming to the server. The goal is to keep with the message the principle of UDP frames not segmented.

So the message with n UEs reports has to fit into the total length to a MTU 1502 bytes. If one UDP frame is not sufficient to carry all UE report, the first message is filled until the limit and then with the next UDP frame the rest of the UEs will be handled in the next message.

The overhead in a message is the following:

 IP header : 20 bytes

 UDP header : 8 bytes

 Header « BIP » : 8 bytes consisting of:

o TypeID:u16 ; EvtSize:u16 ; EvtSeqNb:u8 ; FragmentIdx:u8 ; LocalQId:u16

 Header « event » : 8 bytes consisting of:

o Rsvd1:u16 ; MsgId=0xb05(L2Log_SteamingInd_Sherpa):u16 ; Rsvd2:u32

 Header StreamIndSherpa : 16 bytes

 Header MULTI, to tell variable size content: 8 bytes

 Payload : Depend on MTU of IP frame.

With a MTU of 1502 bytes, the payload area available of a single message is 1502-20-8-8-8-16-8=1434 bytes.

Each UE report is of variable length, as the number of LcId to QoS Identification relations is unpredictable and is depending on operation mode (from 1 to 9 DRBs for NSA / from 1 to 18 for SA).

We expect to fit n UEs reports into one single message. In the case that a second message is needed, then it needs to be sent 500 ms later with an x - offset in the header, describing the offset of the first UE in the second message. If a third message is needed, this is also sent with an other offset x.

If all UEs are considered in a message.

Block definition of a UDP frame based message:

|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |   
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---  
Header [64 bits] | UE(0+x) RNTI[16bits] +m _mapping Info[16bits+m_ 16 bits] | UE(1+x) | UE(2+x) | ... |  |  | ... | UE(n+x)  
  
The maxium length of the message is not allowed ot exceed the length of an unsegmented UDP frame of 1502 bytes.

The number n of UE reports must be selected in the way, that this limit is not exceeded.

Message Header definition :

The header has a fixed length of 64 bit.

|  |  |  |   
---|---|---|---|---  
| Parameter | Range | Description | Details  
H | sfn | u16 [0..1023] | System Frame Number at the time of sending the message | Defines the time of sending the UDP frame message  
H | slot | u8 [0..79] | NR-slot according 3GPP 38.211 at time of sending the message | Defines the time of sending the UDP frame message  
H | numOfUeReports | u8 (n value above) | Current number of UE reports in this UDP message | Number of UE reports 'n' is describing the number of entries in this UDP frame message, in fact the number of mobiles reported here. It can be less than the total number of UEs in this cellGroup.  
H | ueReportOffset | U16 (x value above) | Offset for the first UE report in this message related to first report related to the cellGroup. | Offset Report = x = Start number of UE number that is reported. This enable to have report spread other time (same as the others periodic message) Note: The message contains data from UE X, to UE X+n-1 (n UE reports)  
H | sherpaCellGroupId | U2 | Identification of instance reporting info | L2RT instance of the reporting as provided by feature 998-K. Up to now there is only one instance, so value 0 should be reported here. And for the 14 bits spare.  
H | spare | U14 | spare field | Note: When not indicated, the “spare” fields should always be filled with 0, so that we can have backward compatibility in case of change interface.  
  
The individual UE report size is of variable size (multiple of 16 bits). Its content consists of the rnti (as UE identification) and a variable number of lcId <\--> qosId mapping elements.

The structure a UE report is the following:

|  |  |  |   
---|---|---|---|---  
| Parameter | Range | Description | Details  
R | rnti | u16 | Identity of the UE | Radio Network Temporary Indentifier of the UE  
| Begin repeat |  |  |   
R | indicator | U2 | 0: Not last entry 1: Last Entry 2,3: Reserved (*) | Indicator that describes whether the mapping data set is the last for the UE or not.  
R | lcId | U6 [4..32] | logical Channel Identity | Identification of the bearer within a UE  
R | qosId | U8 [0 ... 255] | QoS Identifier: QCI (for NSA in range 1...10) or 5QI (SA) depending on the call type. See 5G_L2_IF_397_replaced([10974876](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U-o4vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)). | Quality-of-Service Identifier  
| End repeat |  |  |   
  
EXAMPLE:

T= 0 ms UDP Message 1:

a.) Header with: sfn/slot @0 ms, x=0, n=80, sherpaCellGroupId = 0

b.) First package with first 80 UE reports (n=0..79, absolut Number N=0..79) with RNTI and the flexible number of LcId <->qosId mapping for each UE

n=80, was determined by L2-PS based on the fact that with 80 UE the limit in number of 1502 bytes for UDP frame streaming is reached.

T= 500 ms UDP Message 2:

a.) Header with sfn/slot @500ms, x=80, n= 60, sherpaCellGroupId = 0

b.) Second package with next 60 UE reports (n=0…59, absolute Number N=80…139) reports RNTI and flexible number of LcId<->QCI mapping for each UE

n=60, was determined by L2-PS based on the fact that with 60 UE the limit in number of bytes for UDP streaming is reached.

T= 1000 ms UDP Message 3:

a.) Header with sfn/slot @1000ms, x=140, n= 20, sherpaCellGroupId = 0

b.) Last package with last 20 UE reports (n=0…19, absolute Number N=140…159) with RNTI and the flexible number of LcId<->qosId mapping for each UE

n=20 because that is the rest of the UEs for this sherpaCellGroupId

T= 1500 ms Message m:

When all UEs have been treated by previous messages the tracing starts again from the beginning.

[End CNI-115810-B]

---

#### 2.12.1.1.12 DU-L2PS_Periodic_DL with raw = 3 (Extended Sherpa 3)

##### 2.12.1.1.12.0-1 DU-L2PS_Periodic_DL with raw = 3 (Extended Sherpa 3) DL with raw = 3 (ID: 11200627)

**2.12.1.1.12.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11200637`)

DU-L2PS_Periodic_DL with raw = 3 (Extended Sherpa 3) [Not valid from this onwards][Before CNI-115810-B]

1 streaming indication is sent regularly (i.e. each 500 ms)

1 streaming indication contains information related to PLMNs

For further details, please refer to DDT interface in 5G_L2_1562_replaced([11200291](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29ppFPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[End CNI-115810-B]

---

#### 2.12.1.1.13 DU-L2PS_Periodic_DL with raw = 4 (Extended Sherpa 4)

##### 2.12.1.1.13.0-1 DU-L2PS_Periodic_DL with raw = 4 (Extended Sherpa 4) DL with raw = 4 (ID: 11200647)

**2.12.1.1.13.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11200658`)

DU-L2PS_Periodic_DL with raw = 4 (Extended Sherpa 4) [Not valid from this onwards][Before CNI-115810-B]

1 streaming indication is sent regularly (i.e. each 100 ms)

1 streaming indication contains properties of a limited number of connected UEs, due to the limitation of the message size. that means an indication contains a partial list or a complete list depending on the current number of connected UEs.

A report index is present in the streaming indication message.   
At the first report of the list, the report index is set to 0.   
At each new report in case of incomplete list, the index is increased.

For further details, please refer to DDT interface in 5G_L2_1562_replaced([11200291](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29ppFPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

[End CNI-115810-B]

---

#### 2.12.1.1.14 DU-L2PS_Periodic100ms_DL with raw = 0

##### 2.12.1.1.14.0-1 DU-L2PS_Periodic100ms_DL with raw = 0 DL with raw = 0 (ID: 11200669)

**2.12.1.1.14.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11200682`)

DU-L2PS_Periodic100ms_DL with raw = 0 [Not valid from this onwards][Before CNI-115810-B]

This message is sent regularly at least one per Event_100ms related to EIRP as follow :

\- up to 1420 Bytes DL,

\- up to ReportNb per Event_100ms

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
Parameter | Range | Description | First Feature  
sherpaCellGroupId | U2 | Correspond to L2PS instance | 5GC000998-K  
Event_100ms | U6 | Event reported | 5GC001390-E/ 5GC002052-E  
ReportNb | U8 | 0..N-1 (up to N reports per 100ms) | 5GC001390-E/ 5GC002052-E  
SFN | U16 | Range is 0..1023. Upper bits are spare | 5GC001390-E/ 5GC002052-E  
  
The header is 32bits long, and may be completed by a sub-header, depending on the event_100ms to report.

#### Event_100ms EIRP (1)

#### This event is reported up to 8 times per 100ms, as it reported per cell.

#### The global structure is of variable size, and contains a header+Subheader part, and 2 variable size, one for Segment report, one for couple (Beam/Segment) report, as shown in the figure :

|  |  |  |  |  |  |   
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---  
Header | SubHead: K, L | Segment 0 | … | Segment K | Couple 0 | … | Couple L  
  
Header part:

|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |   
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---  
Parameter |  | Range |  | Description |  | First Feature |  |   
sherpaCellGroupId |  | U2 |  | Correspond to L2PS instance |  | 5GC000998-K |  |   
| Event_100ms |  | U6 = 1 |  | Event EIRP |  | 5GC001329-E /5GC002052-E |   
ReportNb |  | U8 |  | 0..N-1 (up to N=8 Cells per 100ms) |  | 5GC001329-E /5GC002052-E |  |   
SFN |  | U16 |  | Range is 0..1023. Upper bits are spare |  | 5GC001329-E /5GC002052-E |  |   
|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |   
  
Subheader part, per cell :

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
Parameter | Range | Description | First Feature  
PCI | U16 | Cell identification: 0..1004 | 5GC001390-E/ 5GC002052-E  
NbSegments | U8: 1..60 | “K” value : number of segments reported | 5GC001390-E/ 5GC002052-E  
NbCouples | U8: 1..194 | “L” value : number of Couple (Beam,Segment) reported | 5GC001390-E/ 5GC002052-E  
  
Note: in case less than 60 segments are reported, it might be possible to report more couples.

Segment report:

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
Parameter | Range | Description | First Feature  
Loop on “K” value |  | For each segment k, with k=0 to K-1 | 5GC001390-E/ 5GC002052-E  
>SegmentId | U8 | For segmentk, Id of the monitored segment | 5GC001390-E/ 5GC002052-E  
>EirpControlActivated | U8 | True=1 False=0 (Power reduction algorithm is actif or not) | 5GC001390-E/ 5GC002052-E  
>averageTxPower | U16 | Average Tx Power per segment in cW Linear value of used power during the period (in cW) [Customer info – Input from Algo] | 5GC001390-E/ 5GC002052-E  
>AllocatedBudget | S32 | For segment k,number of token in the bucket | 5GC001390-E/ 5GC002052-E  
>ConsumeToken | S32 | For segment k, negative if minTokenPerSp [Internal calculation deduced from Power] | 5GC001390-E/ 5GC002052-E  
EndLoop on “K” |  |  |   
  
Couple report:

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
Parameter | Range | Description | First Feature  
Loop on “L” value |  | For each couple l, with l=0 to L-1 | 5GC001390-E/ 5GC002052-E  
BeamId | U8:0..63 |  | 5GC001390-E/ 5GC002052-E  
SegmentId | U8:0..59 |  | 5GC001390-E/ 5GC002052-E  
UsedToken | U16 | For the couple l, used Token, Number of Eirp Comsume Token Per Beam | 5GC001390-E/ 5GC002052-E  
EndLoop on “L” |  |  |   
  
[End CNI-115810-B]

---

### 2.12.1.2 Trace filtering

#### 2.12.1.2.0-1 Trace filtering filtering (ID: 11200694)

**2.12.1.2.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11200706`)

Trace filtering [Not valid from this onwards][Before CNI-115810-B]

Both Standard and extended Sherpa traces can be filtered per PCI.

  * In the streaming activation request, if the Logging Agent provides a non empty list of PCI:

  * Sherpa traces related to the PCI(s) present in the list will be collected

  * on the other hand, no Sherpa traces will be collected for the PCI(s) not present in the list

  * In the streaming activation request, if the Logging Agent provides an empty list of PCI:

  * Sherpa traces will be collected for all PCIs




Restriction: currently, the PCI filtering apply to below events of Extended Sherpa traces:

  * CSI-RS transmission

  * SRS reception

  * PUCCH receive request

  * Second PUCCH receive response

  * RRM calculation result

  * PRACH receive indication




[End CNI-115810-B]

---

### 2.12.1.3 Trace streaming

#### 2.12.1.3.0-1 Trace streaming streaming (ID: 11200717)

**2.12.1.3.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11200730`)

Trace streaming [Not valid from this onwards][Before CNI-115810-B]

Standard Sherpa traces are activated by the Logging Agent via the L2LogDu_StreamActivationReq message with traceType == SherpaTrace

Extended Sherpa traces are activated by the Logging Agent via the L2LogDu_StreamActivationReq message with traceType == SherpaTrace and

if the rdSherpaBitMapVector is different from 0, then there should activate some complementary report (or “extended” report) depending on the RAD parameter value. Each bit correspond to a specific added report set:

Bit 0: extended Pucch

Bit 1: complementary e-CPRI

Bit 2: SRS_ReceiveRespBM 

Bit 3: MatrixReport

Bit 4 to 31: not used

When activated, each scheduler (DL/UL) sends separate Sherpa stream messages.

Receiver can separate these messages by l2SourceNid in the message header.

For Standard Sherpa traces, 5G-L2-PS shall send a stream message at the end of each slot

For Extended Sherpa traces, 5G-L2-PS shall send a stream message either when the stream buffer is full or at the end of each slot (if stream buffer is not full)

If there is no data collected at the end of the slot, no stream message will be sent.

Standard/Extended Sherpa traces are deactivated by the Logging Agent via the L2LogDu_StreamDeactivationReq message with traceType == SherpaTrace

When Standard/Extended Sherpa traces are deactivated, data already collected and not yet sent, are discarded by 5G-L2-PS

[End CNI-115810-B]

---

## 2.12.2 L2 Component Trace

### 2.12.2.0-1 L2 Component Trace Overview (ID: 11200741)

**2.12.2.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `13315674`)

L2 Component Trace L2-PS component trace functionality provides fast binary tracing for L2. Data is traced using events, whenever the data to fill the event is available. The component trace framework is agnostic and can carry any kind of information.

Logically the L2-PS component trace consists of:

  * TTI Trace to trace the internal scheduling algorithm

  * Message tracing to capture communication on internal and external interface

  * Free traces to e.g. trace internal states




L2 trace shall support Streaming and Snapshot modes.

Streaming mode shall stream trace information to external server by IP/UDP messages. Streaming mode shall be activated and deactivated by user request according to 5G_L1L2_FLOW_769_replaced([11205620](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BgmKwfvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Snapshot mode shall store trace information into internal file system. Snapshot mode shall be active continuously and it shall store information in a ring buffer manner. I.e data shall be saved into limited storage and when storage is full the old information shall be discarded to make room for new. Snapshot mode shall follow the functionality define in 5G_L1L2_FLOW_762_replaced([11205475](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_BgljuPvREe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Note: the UDP Port ranges 4510-4525 are reserved for Data Collector. [PR854930] L2 instance should use first free port from this range.

Port ranges for all BTS components are defined here: [WCDMA_LTE_BTS_PktFlow_ClassificationRules.xlsm](https://nokia.sharepoint.com/:x:/r/sites/TRS/Migration/_layouts/15/Doc.aspx?sourcedoc=%7B1D7DC763--B93F-A7CD915AA901%7D&file=WCDMA_LTE_BTS_PktFlow_ClassificationRules.xlsm&action=default&mobileredirect=true)

[End PR854930]

5G-L2-PS shall support L2 traces independently from Sherpa trace (5G_L2_1557_replaced([11200240](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29pCC_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

The trace items (i.e. event) shall have fixed size and structure. They shall be defined in MuLTI environment.

---

#### 2.12.2.1.0-1 Supported trace items Supported trace types (ID: 11200768)

**2.12.2.1.0-1.0-19**  (ID: `13465316`)

Supported trace items L2 trace shall support the following trace types.

The discriminator value is used for the event activation.

The trace type allows to filter event by category and logging frequency, to adapt collections tools and services.

#### 2.12.2.1.1 TTI_START_IND trace item

##### 2.12.2.1.1.0-1 TTI_START_IND trace item REMOVED AS WE CAN’T FILTER REPLACED BY EVENT HEADER (ID: 11201045)

#### 2.12.2.1.2 EventHeader

##### 2.12.2.1.2.0-1 EventHeader (ID: 11201053)

**2.12.2.1.2.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `11201073`)

EventHeader All new event must have this header.

If we don’t have the corresponding value: SFN and SLOT of the current TTI at the write is provided, we use the invalid rnti (zero) and the invalid phyCellId 0xFFFF.

**EventHeader record entry:**

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
**Field** | **Description** | **Reference** | **First Feature**  
hfnTickCount | hfnTickCount on air the traced information is referred to. **[Before CNI-108815]** The value of hfnTickCount increases by 1 when: SFN reaches 1023 and is reset to 0 (same as HFN). **[CNI-108815]** During first update and for each detected SFN overflow L2-PS shall calculate hfnTickCount based on common point in time ( Unix Time, known also as a Epoch Time). L2-PS shall take Unix Time with microseconds (us) precision to calculate hfnTickCount. In case of Error with receiving the Unix Time from platorm API, L2-PS shall assign: 0 (after gNB startup), or last good value. Formula: UnixTime(us) / SingleHfnDuration(us) modulo 2^16 **[End CNI-108815]** hfnTickCount ranges between 0 and 65535 (different than HFN). |  | CNI-88955  
sfn | SFN on air the traced information is referred to. | 5G_L1_5G21A_199 |   
slot | Slot on air the traced information is referred to. | 5G_L1_5G21A_199 |   
rnti | Ue identifier | 5G_L1_5G21A_199 |   
phyCellId | Physical Cell ID of the cell. | L2-PS knows the mapping between subcell and cell from the CellSetupReq |   
lcrId | Local cell resource ID from NRBTS/NRCELL | 5G_L2_IF_61_replaced([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CNI-80481-C  
emCoreId | Identifier of processing core managed by the EM |  |

##### 2.12.2.1.3.0-1 Time Stamps utcTimestampData (ID: 11201084)

**2.12.2.1.3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11201089`)

Time Stamps Provide the UTC time, this time is used by traces tools in the post processing to add one timestamp by event trace. 

utcTimestampData record entry:

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
Field | Description | Reference | First Feature  
EventHeader | SFN on air, Slot on air, Ue identifier, Physical Cell ID | 5G_RAN_UP_X_NEW 5G_L1_5G21A_199 |   
days | UTC time days |  |   
hours | UTC time hours |  |   
minutes | UTC time minutes |  |   
seconds | UTC time seconds |  |   
microSeconds | UTC time microSeconds |  |

#### 2.12.2.1.5 Link Adaptation

##### 2.12.2.1.5.0-1 Link Adaptation dlLaDeltaCqiArray (ID: 11201128)

**2.12.2.1.5.0-1.0-7**  (ID: `12982085`)

Link Adaptation **dlLaDeltaCqiArray record 

The Outer Loop Link Adaptation (OLLA) shall evaluate the delta CQI (rrmDeltaCqi[i,j,t,k]) for correcting the wideband CQI reports referring to carrier j of UE (i). k corresponds to the basic or high reliability LA.**

**dlLaDeltaCqiArray record entry:**

|  |  |  |  |   
---|---|---|---|---|---  
**Field** | Type | [CNI-152738-G] Range [End CNI-152738-G] | **Description** | **Reference** | **First Feature**  
EventHeader |  |  | SFN on air, Slot on air, UE identifier, Physical Cell ID | 5G_L1_5G21A_199 |   
rnti | uint16 | (0..65535), step size: 1 | Rnti of UE | [10974651: PsUser_UserSetupReq Message Content](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U9ayfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | CNI-109641  
lcrId | uint16 | (0..2^14-1), step size: 1 | lcrId of Cell | [10967202: PsCell_CellSetupReq Message Content](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | CNI-109641  
isDeltaCqiCalculated | boolean | TRUE, FALSE | Flag indicating if rrmDeltaCqi is updated or not by the current HARQ feedback, based on the conditions described in 5G_UP_ALG_3060_replaced([11129299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq78IPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | 5G_UP_ALG_3060_replaced([11129299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq78IPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
rrmPauseUeInDlScheduling | boolean | TRUE, FALSE | NACK flood defense is active | 5G_UP_ALG_3068_replaced([11129535](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq8jN_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
harqFb | enumeration HarqFb | Enum{ Ack, Nack, Dtx } | DL-HARQ feedback | 5G_UP_ALG_3060_replaced([11129299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq78IPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
rrmDeltaCqi | float32 | float32 | Set as described in (*). | 5G_UP_ALG_3060_replaced([11129299](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq78IPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) 5G_UP_ALG_17349_replaced([11129351](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq78KPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
rrmDeltaCqiForMcsDowngrade | float32 | float32 | rrmDeltaCqiForMcsDowngrade parameter defined in 5G_UP_ALG_25831_replaced([11129961](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq9xX_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | 5G_UP_ALG_25831_replaced([11129961](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq9xX_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008246-O  
isDeltaCqiForMcsDowngradeCalculated | boolean | TRUE, FALSE | Flag indicating if rrmDeltaCqiForMcsDowngrade is updated or not by the current HARQ feedback, based on the conditions described in 5G_UP_ALG_25831_replaced([11129961](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq9xX_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | 5G_UP_ALG_25831_replaced([11129961](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq9xX_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008246-O  
rrmRemainingBucketLevel | float32 | float32 | BucketLevel value (NACK and DTX flood for the flow control) | 5G_UP_ALG_4681_replaced([11192942](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvoO6PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CNI-89884  
BlerRecent | [Before CB015683-A]float32 [CB015683-A] uint16 [End CB015683-A] | 0...1000 | Represents recent BLER estimated while UE works with high reliability downlink link adapation. This field is filled when UE is in HR mode or BR mode. Since recent Bler is not updated when UE is in BR mode, we will always observe in trace the latest value computed in HR mode before switch to BR. [CB015683-A] It is represented in tenths of percent (0-1000 = 0.0%-100.0%) [End CB015683-A] Note: current DL BlerTarget used as forgetting factor for DL BlerRecent estimation is traced in dlFdSchedData see 5G_L2_1637_replaced([11201971](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29yzDPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | 5G_UP_ALG_17082_replaced([11130052](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-Ya_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008246-G  
dlHarqProcessIndex | uint8 | (0..15,100),stepsize:1 | DL HARQ Process Index indicated in the DCI | [11514001: UlData_PucchReceiveReqLoner message](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR0MI_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) The fake 100 value applies probably only to UL so it may not be relevant in the DL case. |   
deltaCqiStepScalingFactor | uint8 | 1..8 | It traces the scaling factor which is applied to OLLA step down/up according to 5G_UP_ALG_22568_replaced([11129950](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq9xXfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | 5G_UP_ALG_22568_replaced([11129950](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq9xXfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008246-FO  
stdMaxModeFlag | enumeration StdMaxModeFlag | Enum{ stdMode, maxMode, limitedMcs } | Enum{stdMode, maxMode} It traces the mode the DL OLLA is working in, according to 5G_UP_ALG_3063_replaced([11129500](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq8jMvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), after the update triggered by the current HARQ feedback. | 5G_UP_ALG_3063_replaced([11129500](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq8jMvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008246-O  
activedDrbPdschBrLaId | uint8 | 0..2 | drb specific PDSCH BR LA profile ID to be used in LA. value 0 means profile not configured or not used. value 1 or 2 means the detail profile ID to be used, refer to NIDD NRBTS/NRPDSCHBRLA/nrPdschBRLaId | 5G_UP_ALG_26677_replaced([11130068](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq-YbfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB013303-A  
rrmDeltaCqiDlMuZf | float32 | float32 | Adapted delta CQI value from OLLA for ZF-MU paired UE. if actDlMuPairingGroup=True, and UE's HARQ feedback is ZF-MU paired, rrmDeltaCqiDlMuZf shall be updated | [11129358: OLLA filtering](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq78KfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | CB012971-C  
[CB015683-A] isBlerTargetForMcsDowngradedCalculated [End CB015683-A] | bool | TRUE, FALSE | Flag indicating if the blerTarget is updated upon the reception of an harqFeedback acknowledging a transmission that was made with a downgraded MCS | [12800583: BLER Target calculation for MCS downgraded ACKs](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_0umxUJoFEfC7Wp-sWxcfJw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) | CB015683-A  
[CB015683A] blerTargetForMcsDowngraded [End CB015683-A] | uint16 | 0...1000 | Value of BLER target for MCS downgraded transmission calculated when CB015683 is ON and the BLER target is updated and which will impact the deltaCQI provided to the ILLA. It is represented in tenths of percent (0-1000 = 0.0%-100.0%) | [12800583: BLER Target calculation for MCS downgraded ACKs](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_0umxUJoFEfC7Wp-sWxcfJw?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) | CB015683-A  
  
(_)__rrmDeltaCqi is set according to section 5G_UP_ALG_17349_replaced([11129351](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq78KPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))._*

_If UE is configured with at-least one DRB which is associated with drbPdschLaProfile (refer 5G_UP_ALG_15105_replaced([11125150](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqsrnPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), i.e. if structure pdschHrConfig was present in drbAddReqPs (see 5G_L2_IF_397_replaced([10974876](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U-o4vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))_

\- Delta CQI (rrmDeltaCqi[I, j, t, **k]) contains value corresponding to high reliable link adaptation.**

_else_

\- Delta CQI (rrmDeltaCqi[I, j, t, **k]) contains value corresponding to basic reliable link adaptation.**

Note: current UL targetBLER used as forgetting factor for UL BlerRecent estimation is traced in ulFdSchedData see 5G_L2_8183_replaced([11201619](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29xk5fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | 5G_UP_ALG_17217_replaced([11138412](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kreuuPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008246-I

stdMaxModeFlag | Enum{stdMode, maxMode} It traces the mode the UL OLLA is working in, according to 5G_UP_ALG_3156_replaced([11138107](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krc5jvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), after the update triggered by the current HARQ feedback. | 5G_UP_ALG_3156_replaced([11138107](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krc5jvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008246-O  
slotScheduleType | Enum { NotUsed, DlOnly, UlOnly, UlOnlyFirstK2, UlOnlySecondK2, DlUlFirstK2, DlUlSecondK2, Nrt } * Only applicable for TDD FR1 frame structure tdLteConfig0, which supports DL and UL scheduled in dedicated slot separately, and also one PDCCH slot could schedule two UL slot with different K2 values. * For FDD, TDD FR2, and TDD FR1 frame structure other than tdLteConfig0, "NotUsed" shall be filled. | 5G_L2_23169_replaced([11157417](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25FSLvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009422-A  
  
(*) rrmDeltaSinr is set accordingly to requirement 5G_UP_ALG_11058_replaced([11137940](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krcSfvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

The conditions to determine whether a given transmission follows the High Reliable or the Basic Reliable Link Adaptation are specified in 5G_UP_ALG_15603_replaced([11125162](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqsrnvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

(**) additional OLLA is another instance which is used only when NRBTS.NRCELL.numberOfRxBeamforming is equal to 8 and PUSCH transmission is in MU-MIMO mode, otherwise primary OLLA is used (see 5G_UP_ALG_11052_replaced([11137872](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krcScvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))

subcellId | uint8[0..254] | Allocated subcell index, see 5G_UP_ALG_4409_replaced([11142366](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr3wTvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
streamIndexList | enum{ STREAMS_0_1 = 0, STREAMS_2_3 = 1, STREAMS_0_1_2_3 = 2, NOTALLOCATED = 3 } 3: not allocated by SD scheduler | Allocated streams, see 5G_UP_ALG_4409_replaced([11142366](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr3wTvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
headOfListRnti | uint16[0..65533] | primary user, see 5G_UP_ALG_4363_replaced([11141952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr17HvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
ueGroupIdx | uint16[0..65533] | Index of user group for FDM, see 5G_UP_ALG_4363_replaced([11141952](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr17HvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CNI-109641  
neighborCorr(4) | float32 -1: not computed | 5G_UP_ALG_4401_replaced([11142282](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr3wQ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
spectralEfficiency | float32 -1: not computed | Average throughput capacity at gNB is defined as spectral efficiency | CNI-109641  
  
Note1. pairingFactor may not be computed for SD co-scheduled users (ex. "fdm_candidate_same_beam") or incompletely computed for not scheduled users (ex. "unpaired_PairingFactor_AboveThreshold"). It is provided for debug purpose.

Note2. "paired", "fdm_candidate" statuses shall be seen as SD co-scheduling eligible. In some cases all (ex. 5G_UP_ALG_4362_replaced([11141946](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr17HfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) when # of users in Pairset = 1) or some (see 5G_UP_ALG_7953_replaced([11142233](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kr3wQPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) eligible users will not be spatially co-scheduled in slot at the end. isSlected flag purpose is to refelect the final SD scheduling decision for the user.

Please note that even if selected for co-scheduling in slot by SD scheduler an user can still be discarded after for lack of PDCCH resources (dynamic PDCCH feature 742 check, FDM PDCCH resources availability check, see 5G_UP_ALG_11159_replaced([11170811](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuAeQ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)),5G_UP_ALG_11026_replaced([11171146](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuBsZ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) or PUCCH resources for HARQ.

Note3. "NOT_SCHEDULABLE" status shall be seen as "UNPAIRED_PUCCHBEAM" meaning that no pucch beam available for user in next UL slot (see 5G_L2_254_replaced([11149029](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24UdJPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

Note4. neighborCorr may not be computed for a user because not required.

#### 2.12.2.1.7 ulBsrRxData

##### 2.12.2.1.7.0-1 ulBsrRxData [Before CNI-136855-A] When L2-PS receives LoCtrl_UlMacPduReceiveInd containing the UL BSR MAC CE for at least one UE, the record below shall be logged for each UE reporting an UL BSR. Note: currently within one LoCtrl_UlMacPduReceiveInd message only 1 MAC PDU is supported (meaning up to one UL BSR). ulBsrRxData record entry: Field Description Reference First Feature EventHeader SFN on air, Slot on air, Ue identifier, Physical Cell ID 5G_RAN_UP_X_NEW  5G_L1_5G21A_199 ulHarqProcessIndex 5G_L2_IF_3473_replaced( 10984729 ) bsrFormat The BSR format (short BSR or long BSR or short Truncated BSR or long Truncated BSR) 5G_L2_IF_3473_replaced( 10984729 ) Per LCG 0..7 bufferSizeIndex 5G_L2_IF_3473_replaced( 10984729 ) [CNI-136855-A] For current ulBsrRxData event content, see 11202298 . [End CNI-136855-A] (ID: 11201443)

(*) The structure is statically defined for 10 UEs. If more than 10 UEs are present in the CS2 List, they are split into numberOfRecords UL_TDSCHED_SUBCELL_OUTPUT_EVENT_DATA records:

  * the 1st UL_TDSCHED_SUBCELL_OUTPUT_EVENT_DATA record (recordSequenceNumber = 1) contains the 1st 10 UEs of the CS2 List,

  * the 2nd UL_TDSCHED_SUBCELL_OUTPUT_EVENT_DATA record (recordSequenceNumber = 2) contains the next min(, 10) UEs of the CS2 List,

  * and so on..




The records are sent in the order given by recordSequenceNumber for the same event.

---

##### 2.12.2.1.8.3 FD Scheduler

###### 2.12.2.1.8.3.0-1 FD Scheduler ulFdSchedData (ID: 11201619)

**2.12.2.1.8.3.0-1.0-18**  (ID: `13400879`)

FD Scheduler -When the UL FD scheduler has completed its processing for a given UL data slot and subcell, for each UE scheduled in the subcell the information defined in the following structure shall be traced:

**ulFdSchedData record entry:**

|  |  |  |   
---|---|---|---|---  
**Field** | **Range** | **Description** | **Reference** | **First Feature**  
EventHeader | [structure(11201053)](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/web#action=com.ibm.rdm.web.pages.showArtifactPage&artifactURI=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/MD_XF2DofvLEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9&componentURI=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Frm%2Frm-projects%2F_44AJ0J5DEe2A-5U7tzedRA%2Fcomponents%2F_5J4kAJ5DEe2A-5U7tzedRA&artifactInModule=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTf_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | SFN on air, Slot on air, UE identifier, Physical Cell ID | [11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) |   
subcellId | (0..ulSubcellIdMax) | UL Subcell Identifier. Same as ulSubcellId in [ulSubcellList](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UVvvfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ) structure. For value of ulSubcellIdMax see [11375909](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ueQLKvvkEe-AqvopbP1qhQ). | [10968024](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UVvvfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ) |   
priorityIndex | Enum ([13285056](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ikx_g8wpEfCVOOJMfwsFiw)) | UL TD Scheduler priority of the highest-prio pending transmission of the UE in this cell | [11194333](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv0cI_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) |   
sinrDerivedMcs | (0..31, 32), step size: 1 | MCS value derived from the rescaled corrected average SINR rrmRescaledCorrAvgSinr ([11131543](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krDQ6vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) without any downgrade reasons to the MCS with exception of consideration of downgrade related to SINRoffset (see [11130475](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq_mjvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The value is invalid[ (32) for retransmissions. | [11131515](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krDQ5fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | PR508826  
rrmUlUsedMcs | (0..31), step size: 1 | final mcs index used for the transmission | [11203503](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwfKifvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) |   
rrmUlProposedMcs | (0..31, 32), step size: 1 | Target MCS provided by link adaptation which fulfils the coderate limitations. The value is invalid (32) for retransmissions. | [11131515](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krDQ5fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) |   
wbUlMcs | (0..31, 32), step size: 1 | MCS proposed by the Link Adaptation based on the maximum number of PUSCH PRBs (ulFdSchedData.rrmMaxNumPrbUl). If NRCELL.actLaEnhanceEfficiencyLatency == “UL” or “DL_UL”, it is calculated before the FD resource allocation as specified in 12472327. The value is invalid (32) for retransmissions. Note: If NRCELL.actLaEnhanceEfficiencyLatency != “UL” or “DL_UL”, the parameter is not used for the LA of the current transmission but at the next scheduling occasion for pf-metric calculation in the TD-sch and PRBs allocation in the FDM-sc | [11131699](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krD38_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) , [12472327](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_RTT0sw3cEfCvOvZoOJBSnQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | CNI-137351  
ptrsFlagUlProposedMcs | Enum{ PTRS_OFF, PTRS_ON , PTRS_VOID } | Used by Link Adaptation for lookup table PtrsFlag- enumeration indicating if phase tracking reference signals is active (ON) on PUSCH with additional value PTRS_VOID used when PtrsFlag is not known e.g., during retransmission. |  |   
isDefaultMcsProposed | TRUE, FALSE | true: no valid SINR measurements are available to perform ILLA ([11132149](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krFGFPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)); false: otherwise | [11131515](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krDQ5fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) |

[Before CB008148-D]So rdTransPrecodeHystCounter value 0 after rdTransPrecodeHystThresh - 1 stands for rdTransPrecodeHystThresh, see 5G_L2_1459_replaced([11186412](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_275VmvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). (rdTransPrecodeHystCounter =rdTransPrecodeHystThresh)[CB008148-D] So rdTransPrecodeHystCounter value 0 means counter has reached Transform precoder switch threshold, either NRCELL.ulTransPrecodeCtl.ulTpOffOnTriggerSpeedThresh ([11164145](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25rIBPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) or NRCELL.ulTransPrecodeCtl.ulTpOnOffTriggerSpeedThresh.([11164201](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25rIDfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) [End CB008148-D] | 5G_UP_ALG_3262_replaced([11140435](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krt_S_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) 5G_UP_ALG_19242_replaced([11204811](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwl4M_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | 5GC000545-B

**Note (1)**

**cqiAlSelection is set according to section 5G_UP_ALG_4071_replaced([11170399](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kt-pGPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

**cqiPdcchOffset is set according to section 5G_UP_ALG_4074_replaced([11170531](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kt_QJ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

_If UE is configured with at-least one DRB which is associated with drbPdschLaProfile (refer 5G_UP_ALG_15105_replaced([11125150](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqsrnPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), i.e. if structure pdschHrConfig was present in drbAddReqPs (see 5G_L2_IF_397_replaced([10974876](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U-o4vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))_

\- Delta CQI (cqiAlSelection [t, **k]) contains value corresponding to high reliable link adaptation.**

\- cqiPdcchOffset(cqiPdcchOffset [t, **k]) contains value corresponding to high reliable link adaptation.**

_else_

\- Delta CQI (cqiAlSelection [t, **k]) contains value corresponding to basic reliable link adaptation.**

\- cqiPdcchOffset(cqiPdcchOffset [t, **k]) contains value corresponding to basic reliable link adaptation.**

**Note(2)**

For aCSI slot, the value in the log may not accurate, e.g. patternId.

###### 2.12.2.1.8.3.0-3 FD Scheduler ulFdSchedAdditionalData (ID: 13253344)

**2.12.2.1.8.3.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `13431953`)

FD Scheduler When the event that triggers the collection of ulFdSchedData occurs and the collection of supplementary data in ulFdSchedAdditionalData is enabled, the System shall collect the following fields:

|  |  |  |   
---|---|---|---|---  
Name | Range | Description | Reference | First Feature  
EventHeader | structure([11201053](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTf_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | SFN on air, Slot on air, UE identifier, Physical Cell ID | [11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTf_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) |   
remainingDataVolumeUl | (0..2^32-1), step size:1 | instantaneous UE remaining data volume in UL | [11203573](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwfxlPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) |   
maxDataVolumeUl | (0..2^32-1), step size:1 | UE initial max data volume in UL | [11203573](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwfxlPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) |   
maxHarqTxNum | (1..16), step size:1 | Maximum number of HARQ transmissions | [11152435](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24omNvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CB009189-B  
targetBLER | (0..100), step size: 1 | Represents the target BLER for the transmission. When LA mode is BR this value gets updated only after initial HARQ feedback | [11138277](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kreHpvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CB008246-C  
isHighBufferUe | (0,1) | 0: Not high buffer UE; 1: high buffer UE. | [12634190](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_rBwE0D7cEfCqvdo9YkxBnQ) | CB014044-M  
numOfDcGbrPrb | (0..273), Step size:1 | Number of PRBs allocated for Dc-GBR |  | CB008600-B  
numOfNonVoNRGbrPrb |  | The number of PUSCH PRBs that are allocated to non VoNR GBR transmissions | [11152280](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24nYHvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) |   
pdcchPowerBoostType | Enum { None, PowerBoostDueCfg, PowerBoostDueCce } | PowerBoostDueCfg: - the UE's dciTransmitPower granted with 3 dB additional power offset due to intended AL not configured. PowerBoostDueCce: - the UE's dciTransmitPower granted with 3 dB additional power offset due to no available CCE for expected AL from dynamic AL selection. | [11171200](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuCTevvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CB012738-A  
nonVonrGbrScheduledBytes |  |  |  |   
nbrTokenBucketValuesInKbPs | array[MAX_NUM_LCG] | This IE represents the tokenbucketvalue for the nbr bearers per LCG, a positive token buket represts that NBR is not yet met | [11151961](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24li6fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CB008227-B-LLF  
sinrCorrectionBasedOnSplitPwr | Floating point | Correction for rescaled corrected average SINR based on split TX power for a CA UE in power split mode on SCell in Ul overlapping slots. This IE is 0 on PCell. | [11131515](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_krDQ5fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CB006137-C  
betaOffsetSize | (0, 2) | Size (in bits) of "beta offset indicator" field in DCI 0_1. Used for aperiodic CSI report scheduling 0 - when dynamic beta offset is not active | [11171437](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuEIqvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CB008131-A  
betaOffsetValue | (0...3), step size: 1 | Index of the selected betaOffset Set | [11159600](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktKwxfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) |   
isNbrGbrLcgPrioritized | bitset (8 bits) | Indicates prioritization status - one bit per LCG. Meaning of bit values: 0 - LCG is not prioritized - either nonGBR-nonNBR-LCG or SRB or deprioritized GBR or NBR. 1 - LCG is prioritized as NBR or GBR. Note: 1. To differentiate type of prioritization check LCG Id (see [11203701](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwgYqfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) 2. To check reason for deprioritization check correspoding bits of isLcgDeprioritizedByTokenBucket, isLcgDeprioritizedByBwp, isLcgDeprioritizedByRg. 3. If LCG is regular non-GBR or SRB then all corresponding bits in this field and isLcgDeprioritizedByTokenBucket, isLcgDeprioritizedByBwp, isLcgDeprioritizedByRg are set to 0. | NBR: [11177178](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_265QDfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) GBR: [12478173](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_V3Qo8Q5IEfCvOvZoOJBSnQ) | CB008227-D-LLF  
isLcgDeprioritizedByTokenBucket | bitset (8 bits) | Indicates if LCG was deprioritized due to negative (drained) token bucket - one bit per LCG: 1 - LCG deprioritized 0 - LCG not deprioritized Note: 1. Can be non zero for LCG only if correspoding bit in isNbrGbrLcgPrioritized is zero. | NBR: [11196329](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwB3jPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) GBR: [11196250](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_-ScCIPvPEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CNI-136896-A  
isLcgDeprioritizedByBwp | bitset (8 bits) | Indicates if LCG was deprioritized due to BWP congestion - one bit per LCG: 1 - LCG deprioritized 0 - LCG not deprioritized Note: 1. Can be non zero for LCG only if correspoding bit in isNbrGbrLcgPrioritized is zero. | NBR: [11201512](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_dgTMVvvQEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) GBR: [11201708](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_eslZWfvQEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CNI-136896-A  
isLcgDeprioritizedByRg | bitset (8 bits) | Indicates if LCG was deprioritized due to RG congestion - one bit per LCG: 1 - LCG deprioritized 0 - LCG not deprioritized Note: 1. Can be non zero for LCG only if correspoding bit in isNbrGbrLcgPrioritized is zero. | NBR: [11201512](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_dgTMVvvQEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CNI-136896-A  
rrmBufferedDataUlLcg_bytes | array[MAX_NUM_LCG] | estimation of the amount of data in UE’s buffer per LCG, based on the BSRs and the received data amounts. Last value in the array (that has index equal to MAX_NUM_LCG - 1) shall be additionally incremented by the amount of scheduled bytes for Low Priority Proactive Scheduling grants (see 5G_UP_ALG_4833_replaced(11195231) for the overview of Low Priority PUG, and 5G_UP_ALG_16872_replaced(11195403) for TCP Boost PUG). | [11203665](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwgYo_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | 5GC000786-A  
[CNI-154736-A] isGbrNbrPDCCHPrioritized [End CNI-154736-A] | [CNI-154736-A] Enum { NBR_PRIO_GBR_PRIO, NBR_DEPRIO_GBR_PRIO, NBR_PRIO_GBR_DEPRIO, NBR_DEPRIO_GBR_DEPRIO, INVALID } [End CNI-154736-A] | [CNI-154736-A] Indicates if the UE is NBR or GBR PDCCH prioritized or De-Prioritized NBR_PRIO_GBR_PRIO (1) -> When NBR and GBR are prioritized NBR_DEPRIO_GBR_PRIO (2) -> When NBR is depriortized NBR_PRIO_GBR_DEPRIO (3) -> When GBR is deprioritized NBR_DEPRIO_GBR_DEPRIO (4) -> when both GBR and NBR is deprioritized [End CNI-154736-A] | [CNI-154736-A] 5G_L2_15967_replaced([11177178](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_265QDfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) GBR: [12492831: GBR DL/UL PDCCH Congestion control - De-Prioritized UE Handling](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-yXVUBL6EfCph-OiSyk16Q?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) [End CNI-154736-A] | CB008227-DA CB008118-B CNI-154736-A  
  
Note: These fields were previously traced within ulFdSchedData and have been extracted to this optional event as they are considered less critical for analysis.

###### 2.12.2.1.8.3.0-4 FD Scheduler ulFdSchedDataForFakeUe (ID: 12765600)

**2.12.2.1.8.3.0-4.0-1**  (ID: `12765604`)

FD Scheduler When the UL FD scheduler has completed its processing for a given UL data slot and subcell, for each fake UE scheduled in the subcell, the UL FD scheduler shall trace the following information for the ulFdSchedDataForFakeUe record entry:

|  |  |  |   
---|---|---|---|---  
Field | Range | Description | Reference | First Feature  
EventHeader |  | SFN on air, Slot on air, UE identifier, Physical Cell ID | [11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) |   
startPrb | u16 [0..272] | set as the homonym IE in DlData_PdschSendReq | [11513768](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9-fvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) |   
tbSize | u32 | final TBS | [12741638](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_wzBTgHwfEfCiUemk-K-C4g) |   
numOfPrbs | u16 [1..273] | set as the homonym IE in DlData_PdschSendReq | [11513756](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy99_vxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) |   
ulHarqBufferIndex | u16 [0..MAX_HARQ_CTX-1] | absolute UL HARQ Buffer identifier in L1 (absoluteHarqProcessIndex). Value of MAX_HARQ_CTX-1 see [11513788](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRy9_fvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | [11179261](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27FdQPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | 5GC000679-C

rrmNumOfPrbShaved | uint16 [0..273] | Number of PRBs shaved due to Througput Limit | [11152616](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24p0VvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CB013199-B

totalUlRlcStatusPduSize | **[CNI-153420-A]** (0..2^32-1) step size:1 **[End CNI-153420-A]** | Applicable only to FR1, for FR2 shall be set to 0. Sum of ulRlcStatusPduLength values, see [10984647](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WBxx_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ), across all bearers. Value in bytes. Range (0...59415), step size: 1. Maximum size for status PDU for a single bearer is defined in [11223912](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2_tek_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ). |  | CNI-149145  
  
(*) The structure is statically defined for 10 UEs. If more than 10 UEs are present in the CS2 List, they are split into numberOfRecords DL_TDSCHED_SUBCELL_OUTPUT_EVENT_DATA records:

  * the 1st DL_TDSCHED_SUBCELL_OUTPUT_EVENT_DATA record (recordSequenceNumber = 1) contains the 1st 10 UEs of the CS2 List,

  * the 2nd DL_TDSCHED_SUBCELL_OUTPUT_EVENT_DATA record (recordSequenceNumber = 2) contains the next min(, 10) UEs of the CS2 List,

  * and so on..




The records are sent in the order given by recordSequenceNumber for the same event.

Note: the event shall trace all the candidates for the given slot and subcell, before the selection done by the PUCCH-HARQ resources allocation.

**2.12.2.1.9.3.0-1.0-3.0-4**  (ID: `13469631`)

FD Scheduler

|  |   
---|---|---  
**Parameter** | **Presence** | **Description**  
zpCsiRsStartingPrb | M | Starting PRB of the ZP-CSI-RS. When actRateMatchedCsiIm is True, set to ZP-CSI-FrequencyOccupation.startingRb defined in 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2637_replaced([11301863](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqcrFvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) when NRBTS.actTddCsirsOpt is True [CB015668-A]and NRCELL.numOfSubSectors is equal to ‘0sub-sector’[End CB015668-A], for zpCsiRs for subband TRS, according to 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_13245_replaced([11302030](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tqd5MfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) additional when NRBTS.actTddCsiImRm is True[CB015668-A]and NRCELL.numOfSubSectors is equal to ‘0sub-sector’[End CB015668-A], for zpCsiRs for CSI-IM, according to 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_13257_replaced([11302062](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tqd5NfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) When NRBTS/NRCELL/actCsiImRandomizationFddNonDss is True, for zpCsiRs for CSI-IM, according to 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_12813_replaced([11301928](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqdSIvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))  
zpCsiRsNumOfPrbs | M | Number of PRBs,**with smallest number equal to 24.** When actRateMatchedCsiIm is True, set to ZP-CSI-FrequencyOccupation.nrofRBs defined in 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2638_replaced([11301875](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqcrHvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Only multiples of 4 are allowed. when NRBTS.actTddCsirsOpt is True[CB015668-A]and NRCELL.numOfSubSectors is equal to ‘0sub-sector’[End CB015668-A], for zpCsiRs for subband TRS, according to 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_13245_replaced([11302030](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tqd5MfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) additional when NRBTS.actTddCsiImRm is True[CB015668-A]and NRCELL.numOfSubSectors is equal to ‘0sub-sector’[End CB015668-A], for zpCsiRs for CSI-IM, according to 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_13257_replaced([11302062](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tqd5NfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) When NRBTS/NRCELL/actCsiImRandomizationFddNonDss is True, for zpCsiRs for CSI-IM, according to 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_12813_replaced([11301928](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqdSIvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). May or may not be multiple of 4 due to wideband ZP-CSI-RS configuration.  
zpCsiRsConfig | M | When actRateMatchedCsiIm is True, only row5 **is supported even if there are only two TX ports.** when NRBTS.actTddCsirsOpt is True[CB015668-A]and NRCELL.numOfSubSectors is equal to ‘0sub-sector’,[End CB015668-A] additional when actSubTRSRateMatch is True, for zpCsiRs for subband TRS, row9 is used additional when NRBTS.actTddCsiImRm is True[CB015668-A]and NRCELL.numOfSubSectors is equal to ‘0sub-sector’[End CB015668-A], for zpCsiRs for CSI-IM, row4 is used When NRBTS/NRCELL/actCsiImRandomizationFddNonDss is True, for zpCsiRs for CSI-IM, row4 is used according to 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_12813_replaced([11301928](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqdSIvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))  
zpCsiRsDensity | M | When actRateMatchedCsiIm is True, set to ZP-CSI-RS-ResourceMapping.density defined in 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2638_replaced([11301875](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqcrHvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) when NRBTS.actTddCsirsOpt is True[CB015668-A]and NRCELL.numOfSubSectors is equal to ‘0sub-sector’[End CB015668-A], for zpCsiRs for subband TRS, according to 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_13245_replaced([11302030](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tqd5MfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) additional when NRBTS.actTddCsiImRm is True[CB015668-A]and NRCELL.numOfSubSectors is equal to ‘0sub-sector’[End CB015668-A], for zpCsiRs for CSI-IM, according to 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_13257_replaced([11302062](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tqd5NfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) When NRBTS/NRCELL/actCsiImRandomizationFddNonDss is True, for zpCsiRs for CSI-IM, 'one' is used according to 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_12813_replaced([11301928](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqdSIvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))  
zpCsiRsfreqDomainAllocation | M | When actRateMatchedCsiIm is True, Set to ZP-CSI-RS-ResourceMapping.frequencyDomainAllocation defined in 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_2638_replaced([11301875](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqcrHvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) when NRBTS.actTddCsirsOpt is True[CB015668-A]and NRCELL.numOfSubSectors is equal to ‘0sub-sector’[End CB015668-A], for zpCsiRs for subband TRS, according to 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_13245_replaced([11302030](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tqd5MfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) additional when NRBTS.actTddCsiImRm is True[CB015668-A]and NRCELL.numOfSubSectors is equal to ‘0sub-sector’[End CB015668-A], for zpCsiRs for CSI-IM, according to 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_13257_replaced([11302062](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_Tqd5NfvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) When NRBTS/NRCELL/actCsiImRandomizationFddNonDss is True, for zpCsiRs for CSI-IM, according to 5G_CP_ARC_ALG_12813_replaced([11301928](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_TqdSIvvcEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))

**2.12.2.1.9.3.0-1.0-17**  (ID: `13462734`)

FD Scheduler When the DL FD scheduler has completed its processing for a given DL data slot and subcell, for each UE scheduled in the subcell the information defined in the following structure shall be traced:

**dlFdSchedData record entry:**

|  |  |  |   
---|---|---|---|---  
**Field** | Range | **Description** | **Reference** | **First Feature**  
EventHeader | structure see reference | SFN on air, Slot on air, UE identifier, Physical Cell ID | [11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) |   
subcellId | 0..dlSubcellIdMax | DL Subcell Identifier. Same as subcellId in [dlSubcellList](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UVvtvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ) structure | [10967982](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UVvtvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ) |   
ueType | Enum{ non CA, PCell, SCell, fake } | UE type |  | CNI-109641  
priorityIndex | Enum, for supported values see reference | Value is set in the gNB DL Pre-Scheduler. It represents the highest scheduling priority for all subcells. | [11148498](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24RZ0vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CNI-109641  
cqiDerivedMcs | (0..31, 32), step size: 1 | MCS value derived from the corrected average CQI dlFdSchedData.rrmCorrAvgCqi without considering any downgrades to the MCS due to any other reasons (including code-rate limitations etc.). Note 1:

**cqiAlSelection is set according to section 5G_UP_ALG_4071_replaced([11170399](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kt-pGPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

**cqiPdcchOffset is set according to section 5G_UP_ALG_4074_replaced([11170531](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kt_QJ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).**

_If UE is configured with at-least one DRB which is associated with drbPdschLaProfile (refer 5G_UP_ALG_15105_replaced([11125150](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqsrnPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), i.e. if structure pdschHrConfig was present in drbAddReqPs (see 5G_L2_IF_397_replaced([10974876](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2U-o4vu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)))_

  * Delta CQI (cqiAlSelection [t, **k]) contains value corresponding to high reliable link adaptation.**

  * cqiPdcchOffset(cqiPdcchOffset [t, **k]) contains value corresponding to high reliable link adaptation.**




_else_

  * Delta CQI (cqiAlSelection [t, **k]) contains value corresponding to basic reliable link adaptation.**

  * cqiPdcchOffset(cqiPdcchOffset [t, **k]) contains value corresponding to basic reliable link adaptation.**




[CB015279-F]

Note 2:

In case of sending DCI format 1_0 for PDCCH Order as part of UL SCell Timing alignment procedure (dciFormat = DL_10_PDCCHORDER, see: [13414170](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_QPSsZBLqEfG3gf_qmG8Vww)) only following fields in trace are relevant: EventHeader, subcellId, ueType, priorityIndex, antPort, beamId, pdcchBeamId, startCce, pdcchStartSymbol, searchSpaceId, sssgIndex, dciFormat, cqiAlSelection, cqiPdcchOffset, dciSizeOffset, pdcchCqi, cqiPdcchReduction, aggregationLevel, pdcchPowerBoostType, ueBwpId, cellBwpId, beamType. This is beacause there is no other transmission (PDSCH, PUCCH, PUSCH) associated with this DCI.

[End CB015279-F]

---

###### 2.12.2.1.9.3.0-2 FD Scheduler dlFdSchedAdditionalData (ID: 11202153)

**2.12.2.1.9.3.0-2.0-6**  (ID: `13471027`)

FD Scheduler These data is triggered by the same event as dlFdSchedData data.

Meant to collect information previously traced within dlFdSchedData, which have been considered less important/critical for the analysis.

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
**Field** | **Description** | **Reference** | **First Feature**  
EventHeader | SFN on air, Slot on air, UE identifier, Physical Cell ID | 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
remainingDataVolumeDl | instantaneous UE remaining data volume in DL | 5G_UP_ALG_4632_replaced([11192333](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvj9dPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
maxDataVolumeDl | UE initial max data volume in DL | 5G_UP_ALG_4632_replaced([11192333](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvj9dPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
dlHarqBufferIndex | Index of the DL HARQ buffer in L2-LO | 5G_L2_282_replaced([11149470](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24WSVfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) Not meaningful for msg2 Transmission |   
maxHarqTxNum | Maximum number of HARQ transmissions | 5G_L2_8389_replaced([11149541](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24W5YfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009189-B  
targetBLER | Represents the target BLER for the transmission | 5G_UP_ALG_3064_replaced([11129684](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq9KQvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008246-A  
subcellId | 0..dlSubcellIdMax | DL Subcell Identifier. Same as subcellId in [dlSubcellList](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UVvtvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ) structure ([10967982](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UVvtvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |

###### 2.12.2.1.9.3.0-3 FD Scheduler FdSchedBlockUeData (ID: 11202175)

**2.12.2.1.9.3.0-3.0-3**  (ID: `12567036`)

FD Scheduler L2-PS DL scheduler shall trace the fdSchedBlockUeData event for all the slots which satisfy any of the conditions below

  * At least one UE is blocked with defined reasons in DL FD scheduling



**FdSchedBlockUeData record entry:**

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
**Field** | **Description** | **Reference** | **First Feature**  
eventHeader | SFN on air/Slot on air, no Ue identifier, Physical Cell ID | 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
fdBlockUeList | An array with max size of MAX_NUM_SCHED_UES_PER_CELL=16. |  |   
>rnti | Ue identifier: C-RNTI |  |   
>reason | enum{ FD_NOVALUESET FD_PUCCHBLOCK FD_ADDUEDBFAILED FD_NOPRBALLOCATED FD_SYMBOLSLESSTHANMIN FD_NOSUITABLESLIVFOUND FD_INVALIDSYMBOLS FD_NOTVALIDSLIV FD_NOMSG3OCCASION FD_NOHARQPROCESSERR FD_RENUMBERNOTSATISFY FD_RETXSTARTSYMBOLBIGGERTHANINITTX FD_NOTENOUGHPDSCHSYMBOLSFORRETX [CB013199-B] FD_ALLOCTPUTLIMITEXCEEDED [END CB013199-B] FD_UNBLOCKED [PR829520] FD_SRB0EXCEEDSTBS [End PR829520] } |  |

#### 2.12.2.1.13 Harq Processes release Event (ReleasedHarqProcesses)

##### 2.12.2.1.13.0-1 Harq Processes release Event (ReleasedHarqProcesses) ReleasedHarqProcesses (ID: 11202280)

**2.12.2.1.13.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11202286`)

Harq Processes release Event (ReleasedHarqProcesses) When L2-PS releases an UL or DL HARQ processe (only UL is implemented) if the amount of resources is not available to schedule the retransmission UE when CG UEs are activated or CG deactivation, or during transition phase or CG modfication for CG UEs, the event shall be traced by logging the information defined in the following structure:

ReleasedHarqProcesses record entry:

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
Field | Description | Reference | First Feature  
EventHeader | SFN on air, Slot on air, Ue identifier, Physical Cell ID | 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | PR726303  
csRnti | CS-RNTI for PUSCH Configured Grant Type 2 Set to C-RNTI when CS-RNTI is not available | 5G_UP_ALG_14594_replaced([11172896](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuPHwvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | PR726303  
direction | ReleasedHarqProcessesDirection: 0: DOWNLINK 1: UPLINK | 5G_L1_5G21A_208 5G_UP_ALG_4531_replaced([11184177](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kvQbgPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | PR726303  
harqId | Harq process Index | 5G_L1_5G21A_208 | PR726303  
Cause | 0: DG_RETX_RESOURCE_MISSING_DUE_TO_CG // release dg retx harq processes when non avalaible resources because of CG Users 1: CG_DEACTIVATION //release harq processes when cg deactivation 2: CG_TRANSIENT_RETX // flush CG reTx in transient phase 3: CG_MODIFICATION // release harq processes when cg modification 4: CG_CLEAN // reset remaining harq processes when CG statemachine cleaning 5: CG_ERROR // reset harq processes on CG error | 5G_UP_ALG_11420_replaced([11196526](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwDFrfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) 5G_UP_ALG_15131_replaced([11173098](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuQV7vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) 5G_UP_ALG_15133_replaced([11173106](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuQ88fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | PR726303

#### 2.12.2.1.14 UL BSR Reception Event (ulBsrRxData)

##### 2.12.2.1.14.0-1 UL BSR Reception Event (ulBsrRxData) ulBsrRxData (ID: 11202298)

**2.12.2.1.14.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11202314`)

UL BSR Reception Event (ulBsrRxData) When L2-PS receives LoCtrl_UlMacPduReceiveInd containing the UL BSR MAC CE for at least one UE, the record below shall be logged for each UE reporting an UL BSR. Note:currently within one LoCtrl_UlMacPduReceiveInd message only 1 MAC PDU is supported (meaning up to one UL BSR). And in PCell for FR1 UL CA, BSR forwarded from SCell by message PsPeerCtrl_ScellUlInfoUpdateInd should be recorded also.

## ulBsrRxData record entry:

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
Field | Description | Reference | First Feature  
EventHeader | SFN on air, Slot on air, Ue identifier, Physical Cell ID | 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) 5G_L1_5G21A_199 |   
ulHarqProcessIndex | if BSR forwarded from SCell, this IE is set invalid as value 255. | 5G_L2_IF_3473_replaced([10984729](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WCY1_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
hfn | Hyper frame number on for the BSR initial transmission on air slot | the value keep in harq for the BSR initial transmission. If the harq is released, the value should be 0xFFFF as invalid. | CB006137-AB CNI-109641  
sfn | system frame number for the BSR initial transmission on air slot | the value keep in harq for the BSR initial transmission. If the harq is released, the value should be 0xFFFF as invalid. | CB006137-AB CNI-109641  
slot | slot on air for the BSR initial transmission | the value keep in harq for the BSR initial transmission. If the harq is released, the value should be 0xFF as invalid. | CB006137-AB CNI-109641  
bsrFormat | The BSR format (short BSR or long BSR or short Truncated BSR or long Truncated BSR) | 5G_L2_IF_3473_replaced([10984729](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WCY1_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
bufferSizeIndex | An array with max size of MAX_NUM_LCG =8. | 5G_L2_IF_3473_replaced([10984729](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WCY1_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CNI-109641

#### 2.12.2.1.16 UL Beam measurement report

##### 2.12.2.1.16.0-1 UL Beam measurement report [NOTE. This requirement has not been implemented (originally planned to be part of 5GC000533-E)] When Beam measuremen report is received over a PUCCH, 5G-L2-PS shall generate the UL Beam measurement report according to following structure: Field Description Reference First Feature rnti UE identifier: C-RNTI time Slot/sfn on air when the PUCCH was received beamReport 5G_UP_ALG_3594_replaced( 11159910 ) &gt; cri1stBeam CRI of the best beam. &gt; cri2ndBeam CRI of the second best beam. &gt; rsrp1stBeam RSRP measurement of the best beam. &gt; rsrp2ndBeam RSRP of the second best beam. filtRsrp1stBeam Filtered RSRP value of the best beam. filtRsrp2ndBeam Filtered RSRP value of the second best beam. selectedBestBeam Beam ID selected as the best beam.  Note that this is not used immediately for data transmission/reception as there is certain delay for applying the new beam ID. 5G_UP_ALG_1973_replaced( 11112001 ) selectedSecondBestBeam Beam ID selected as the second best beam.  Note that this is not used immediately for data transmission/reception as there is certain delay for applying the new beam ID. 5G_UP_ALG_1973_replaced( 11112001 ) beamTogglingIdentified Flag to indicate if beam toggling was detected. 5G_UP_ALG_2022_replaced( 11112178 ) dtx Should be set to 0 if the message was decoded and received properly; Should be set to 1 if L1 was not able to decode the message and L2-PS received a dtx in the Response. sfnForProcessing SFN when the actual L1 processing is done 5G_L1_5G21A_265 slotForProcessing Slot when the actual L1 processing is done 5G_L1_5G21A_265 (ID: 11202371)
