---

#### 2.12.2.1.20 beamProbing

##### 2.12.2.1.20.0-1 beamProbing Trigger and content of beamProbing event (ID: 11202509)

**2.12.2.1.20.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11202514`)

beamProbing When L2-PS receives UlData_PuschReceiveRespPs, parameters for beam probing shall be traced in the following situations.

  1. After procedure of probing.

  2. After procedure of reprobing. Procedure of reprobing means that when rdUlBeamProbingCounter_slots after fall back, L2-PS should update the serving DL beams for reprobing. Refer to 5G_UP_ALG_2051_replaced([11112493](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpWAwfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

  3. After SINR process when beamIdInHarq1/beamIdInHarq2 are not match with primaryBeamId/secondBeamId in UE context(probing can’t be processed in this case).




beamProbing record entry:

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
Field | Description | Reference | First Feature  
EventHeader | SFN on air, Slot on air, Ue identifier, Physical Cell ID | 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009363-I  
isUlBeamUnderProbing | Indication of ul probing state, including reprobing | 5G_UP_ALG_2040_replaced([11112412](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpVZrvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009363-I  
isUlBeamUnderFallback | Indication of ul fallback state. Best serving DL beam is not used by UL in this state. And after rdUlBeamProbingCounterInSlots, reprobing will be trigged | 5G_UP_ALG_2051_replaced([11112493](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpWAwfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009363-I  
isDlBeamUnderProbing | Indication of dl probing state. | 5G_UP_ALG_2055_replaced([11112504](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpWnwvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009363-I  
beamIdInHarq1 | BeamId1 stored in harq, which is used for extension for this scheduling. | 5G_UP_ALG_2049_replaced([11112474](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpWAvPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009363-I

#### 2.12.2.1.21 ulbeamswitch

##### 2.12.2.1.21.0-1 ulbeamswitch Trigger and content of ulbeamswitch event (ID: 11202529)

**2.12.2.1.21.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11202547`)

ulbeamswitch In case of **Pusch is 4Rx or 8Rx or 16Rx(numOfRxPusch=4 or 8 or 16, see 5G_L2_16925_replaced([11141685](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_23qV0_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), when UL receives PsInternal_DlToUlIntraSchedUpdate with newRandomAccessUeArray or ueBeamChange from DL, parameters for beam switch shall be traced.**

**ulbeamswitch record entry:**

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
**Field** | **Description** | **Reference** | **First Feature**  
EventHeader | SFN on air, Slot on air, Ue identifier, Physical Cell ID | 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009363-I  
isRach | Indication if UE in the RACH procedure | 5G_UP_ALG_3373_replaced([11152251](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kse0SfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009363-I  
isDlRequestProbeBeamBeforeDlChange | Indication if dl probing enabled, which controlled by rdActDlBeamFallback and rdThresholdUlProbingBeforeDlBeamChange. | 5G_UP_ALG_1888_replaced([11111451](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpNd3vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) 5G_UP_ALG_2104_replaced([11112678](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpYc9fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009363-I  
newFirstBeamId | New primary beam which prepare to be used. It is carried by the message from DL(raBeamId or beamId). | 5G_UP_ALG_2040_replaced([11112412](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpVZrvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009363-I  
newSecondBeamId | New second beam which prepare to be used. If newSecondBeamIsNeighborSelected = TRUE, it is carried by the message from DL(secondRaBeamId or secondBeamId). Else, it is neighbor beam selected by UL. | 5G_UP_ALG_2040_replaced([11112412](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpVZrvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009363-I  
newSecondBeamIsNeighborSelected | Indicate if secondBeamId in the message is neighbor selected. It is carried by the message from DL(isUlSecondBeamIdNeighborSelected or secondUlBeamShouldBeNeighborSelected). | 5G_UP_ALG_2040_replaced([11112412](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpVZrvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009363-I  
oldFirstBeamId | primaryBeamId in UE context before processing the message. | 5G_UP_ALG_2040_replaced([11112412](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpVZrvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009363-I  
oldSecondBeamId | secondBeamId in UE context before processing the message | 5G_UP_ALG_2040_replaced([11112412](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpVZrvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009363-I  
oldSecondBeamIsNeighborSelected | secondUlBeamShouldBeNeighborSelected in UE context before processing the message | 5G_UP_ALG_2040_replaced([11112412](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpVZrvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009363-I  
primaryBeamID | primaryBeamId in UE context after processing the message. | 5G_UP_ALG_2040_replaced([11112412](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpVZrvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009363-I  
secondBeamID | secondBeamId in UE context after processing the message | 5G_UP_ALG_2040_replaced([11112412](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpVZrvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009363-I  
previousBeamId | previousBeamId in UE context after processing the message | 5G_UP_ALG_2040_replaced([11112412](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpVZrvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009363-I  
candidateBeamId1 | candidateBeamId1 in UE context after processing the message | 5G_UP_ALG_2040_replaced([11112412](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpVZrvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009363-I  
candidateBeamId2 | candidateBeamId2 in UE context after processing the message | 5G_UP_ALG_2040_replaced([11112412](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpVZrvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009363-I  
secondBeamIsNeighborSelected | secondUlBeamShouldBeNeighborSelected in UE context after processing the message | 5G_UP_ALG_2040_replaced([11112412](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpVZrvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009363-I  
slotScheduleType | Enum { NotUsed, DlOnly, UlOnly, UlOnlyFirstK2, UlOnlySecondK2, DlUlFirstK2, DlUlSecondK2, Nrt } * Only applicable for TDD FR1 frame structure tdLteConfig0, which supports DL and UL scheduled in dedicated slot separately, and also one PDCCH slot could schedule two UL slot with different K2 values. * For FDD, TDD FR2, and TDD FR1 frame structure other than tdLteConfig0, "NotUsed" shall be filled. | 5G_L2_23169_replaced([11157417](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25FSLvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009422-A

##### 2.12.2.1.22.0-1 ulBeamChangeForFdd trigger and content of ulBeamChangeForFdd (ID: 13340119)

**2.12.2.1.22.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `13340079`)

ulBeamChangeForFdd In case FDD cell is actBeamforming = TRUE, when receiving PMI beam update from L2-PS DL scheduler, L2-PS UL scheduler shall record the corresponding UL PMI pattern ID for later scheduling usage:

|  |  |  |  |   
---|---|---|---|---|---  
**Field** | Type | Range | **Description** | **Reference** | **First Feature**  
eventHeader | structure | NA | SFN/Slot on air is the value from the received message, Ue identifier is the UE's RNTI, Physical Cell ID is for the scheduler's cell. | [11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CB008577-C  
bestPmiPatternIdUl | Uint16 | [0,65535] | The best PMI beam pattern ID for UL later scheduling， 65535 means the PMI beam is aged so can't be used. | [12777257: FDD: Maximum Two beams from CSI feedback](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ldAtcI1KEfCrqOdGJPoCRA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) and [12771852: FDD: four beams for 8RX receiver](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI__UhkgYlZEfCrqOdGJPoCRA) | CB008577-C

**2.12.2.1.25.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11202605`)

DRX Data [Before CNI-116831] UlIntraDlToUlDrxSyncDlData [CNI-116831] DlFdSchedUeDrxState [End CNI-116831] record entry:

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
Field | Description | Reference | First Feature  
eventHeader | Generic event header. | 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | 5GC000776-F  
drxEnabled | DRX state. | 5G_L2_8530_replaced([11156444](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24_ykfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | 5GC000794-FW  
dlDrxOndurationTimerOn | DRX OnDuration Timer Status in DL. | 5G_L2_8530_replaced([11156444](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24_ykfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | 5GC000794-FW  
dlDrxInactivityTimerOn | DRX Inactivity Timer Status in DL. | 5G_L2_8530_replaced([11156444](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24_ykfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | 5GC000794-FW  
dlDrxInactivityTimerPeerOn | inactivityTimerPeer state in DRX TTI trace. | 5G_L2_IF_426_replaced([10975509](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VBFLvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | PR707654  
dlDrxInactivityTimerPsPeerOn | inactivityTimerPsPeer state in DRX TTI trace. | 5G_L2_8421_replaced([11156499](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24_ymfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB006137-C  
dlDrxUlCgReTransTimerOn | UL CG DRX ReTx timer state. | 5G_L2_IF_426_replaced([10975509](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VBFLvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | PR707654  
  
[CNI-116831]

Note: Before CNI-116831, this event is recorded in DL FD scheduler in the end of DL FD scheduling for both FR1 and FR2. But the event name is not correct that make the decoded trace always place in UL TTI trace in excelCsv format. From CNI-116831 onwards, this event is renamed so that the decoded trace will place in DL TTI trace in excelCsv format. The renamed event only used for FR2. For FR1, new events refer to 5G_L2_16812_replaced([11202624](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_292davvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and 5G_L2_16813_replaced([11202637](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_292dbPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) introduced to record UE DRX state in DL/UL TD scheduler.

[End CNI-116831]

puxchSlot | pucch/pusch slot the traced information is referred to | 5G_UP_ALG_2270_replaced([11114455](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpkqOfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
retxStartSfn | start sfn of the drx retransmission timer window | 5G_UP_ALG_2270_replaced([11114455](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpkqOfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
retxStartSlot | start slot of the drx retransmission timer window | 5G_UP_ALG_2270_replaced([11114455](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpkqOfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
retxExpireSfn | expire sfn of the drx retransmission timer window | 5G_UP_ALG_2270_replaced([11114455](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpkqOfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |

#### 2.12.2.1.26 DL SCell activation data for Carrier Aggregation (dlSCellActivationData)

##### 2.12.2.1.26.0-1 DL SCell activation data for Carrier Aggregation (dlSCellActivationData) DL SCell Activation Data (ID: 11202669)

**2.12.2.1.26.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `11202690`)

DL SCell activation data for Carrier Aggregation (dlSCellActivationData) When L2-PS DL run the checking procedure for SCell activation/deactivation, the event shall be traced by logging the information defined in the following structure:

DL SCell Activation Data record entry:

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
Field | Description | Reference | First Feature  
EventHeader | SFN on air, Slot on air, Ue identifier, Physical Cell ID | 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
currentCellActiveMask | Bitmask for the active SCell (indicated by sCellIndex), 1 means active, 0 for other status. Include DL+UL and DL only SCells. Bit at PSCell position will be set as 0. | Cell status defined in 5G_UP_ALG_2804_replaced([11121880](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqa-y_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
dlRlqDeactMask | Bitmask for the cell check result if DL RLQ is bad (1 means RLQ bad). Set to 0 if previous checks during same period have already shown different results. | Criteria defined in 5G_UP_ALG_2746_replaced([11121446](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqYikPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
dlRlqActMask | Bitmask for the cell check result if DL RLQ fulfil activation criteria (1 means RLQ activate criteria fulfilled). Set to 0 if previous checks during same period have already shown different results. | Criteria defined in 5G_UP_ALG_2746_replaced([11121446](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqYikPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
dlBufferLevel | Current UE buffer level in DL, used for buffer based check. Fill 0 if previous checks during same period have already shown different results. (Unit byte) | 5G_UP_ALG_2709_replaced([11120941](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqVfNvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
dlActBufferThreshold | Buffer activation threshold in DL. Fill 0 if previous checks during same period have already shown different results. (Unit byte) | 5G_UP_ALG_2709_replaced([11120941](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqVfNvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
dlDeactBufferThreshold | Buffer deactivation threshold in DL. Fill 0 if previous checks during same period have already shown different results. (Unit byte) | 5G_UP_ALG_2709_replaced([11120941](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqVfNvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
dlPCellPathloss | Current DL PCell Pathloss. (Unit dB) | 5G_UP_ALG_2746_replaced([11121446](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqYikPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
checkCount | Number of checks in a checking period, equal to rdNumOfScellChecks means last check | 5G_UP_ALG_2778_replaced([11120862](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqU4JfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
dlCurrentBufferResult | DL Buffer based check result. Can be one of " activation/ buffer based deactivation / No Action " | 5G_UP_ALG_2709_replaced([11120941](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqVfNvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
auLoadBasedSCellDeactCheck | If active Ue load based SCell deactivation is enabled for FR2, and in each periodic cell group level checking the active Ue load exceeding the threshold(defined by NRCELLGRP.nbActiveCarriersThreshold or rdScellReductionThreshold), this parameter shall be set as True(1). Otherwise, it's set as default value False(0). | 5G_UP_ALG_26309_replaced([11122151](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqdbAvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB012734-B  
dlActiveUeLoadDeactMask | If active Ue load based SCell deactivation is enabled for FR2, and in the periodic cell group level active Ue load checking this Ue identified to do SCell deactivation, this bitmask indicates the SCell(s) to be deactivated(bit 1 means deactivation). Otherwise, the bitmask shall be as as 0. Note: 1. When active Ue load SCell deactivation is enabled, and sCellActivationMethod is "bufferAndRLQualityBased", there's possibility that this bitmask has the same bit with dlRlqDeactMask. | 5G_UP_ALG_26313_replaced([11122168](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqdbDPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB012734-B  
latestResult | Final action for this checking period combined with UL and DL, only available when this is the last check in period. Can be one of " activation/ buffer based deactivation / RLQ deactivation / No Action [CB012734-B]/ activeUeLoad deactivation[End CB012734-B]" | 5G_UP_ALG_2709_replaced([11120941](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqVfNvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CNI-109641  
decisionCellMask | Final decided cell mask for activation or deactivation. When latestResult = activation, bit 1 = activate. When latestResult = buffer based deactivation or RLQ deactivation [CB012734-B]or activeUeLoad deactivation[End CB012734-B], 1 = deactivate. All 0 when latestResult = No Action | 5G_UP_ALG_2709_replaced([11120941](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqVfNvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CNI-109641  
burstCount | Number of traffic burst detected according to zero buffer. | 5G_UP_ALG_2740_replaced([11121344](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqX7efvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
deactSkipCount | Number of continuous buffer based deactivation is skipped. | 5G_UP_ALG_2740_replaced([11121344](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqX7efvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
zeroBufferCounter | Number of continuous zero buffer deactivation happened. This is used to count for 300ms no buffer period to reset the burst count. | 5G_UP_ALG_2740_replaced([11121344](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqX7efvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CNI-109641  
CurrentState |  |  |

##### 2.12.2.1.27.0-1 UL SCell activation data for Carrier Aggregation (ulSCellActivationData) UL SCell Activation Data (ID: 11202704)

**2.12.2.1.27.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11202717`)

UL SCell activation data for Carrier Aggregation (ulSCellActivationData) When L2-PS UL run the checking procedure for SCell activation/deactivation, the event shall be traced by logging the information defined in the following structure:

UL SCell Activation Data record entry:

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
Field | Description | Reference | First Feature  
EventHeader | SFN on air, Slot on air, Ue identifier, Physical Cell ID. | 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
currentULCellActiveMask | Bitmask for the active SCell (indicated by sCellIndex), 1 means active, 0 for other status. Only available for DL+UL SCells. Bit at PSCell position will be set as 0. | Cell status defined in 5G_UP_ALG_2804_replaced([11121880](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqa-y_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
ulRlqDeactMask | Bitmask for the cell check result if UL RLQ is bad (1 means RLQ bad). Set to 0 if previous checks during same period have already shown different results. | Criteria defined in 5G_UP_ALG_2748_replaced([11121531](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqYik_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
ulRlqActMask | Bitmask for the cell check result if UL RLQ fulfil activation criteria (1 means RLQ activate criteria fulfilled). Set to 0 if previous checks during same period have already shown different results. | Criteria defined in 5G_UP_ALG_2748_replaced([11121531](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqYik_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
ulBufferLevel | Current UE buffer level in UL, used for buffer based check. Fill 0 if previous checks during same period have already shown different results. (Unit byte) | 5G_UP_ALG_2738_replaced([11120974](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqVfO_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
ulActBufferThreshold | Buffer activation threshold in UL. Fill 0 if previous checks during same period have already shown different results. (Unit byte) | 5G_UP_ALG_2738_replaced([11120974](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqVfO_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
ulDeactBufferThreshold | Buffer deactivation threshold in UL. Fill 0 if previous checks during same period have already shown different results. (Unit byte) | 5G_UP_ALG_2738_replaced([11120974](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqVfO_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
ulPCellPathloss | Current UL PCell Pathloss. (Unit dB) | 5G_UP_ALG_2748_replaced([11121531](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqYik_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
checkCount | Number of checks in a checking period, equal to rdNumOfScellChecks means last check | 5G_UP_ALG_2778_replaced([11120862](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqU4JfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
ulCurrentBufferResult | UL Buffer based check result. Can be one of " activation/ buffer based deactivation / No Action " | 5G_UP_ALG_2738_replaced([11120974](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqVfO_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
ulLatestResult | Final UL check result sent to DL, only available when this is the last check in period. Can be one of " activation/ buffer based deactivation / RLQ deactivation / No Action " | 5G_UP_19264 |   
ulProposalMask | Final cell mask of UL check result that will send to DL, only available when this is the last check in period. * When ulLatestResult = activation, If sCellActivationMethod = bufferBased [CB012734-C] and FR2 active Ue load based SCell deactivation is disabled[End CB012734-C], 1 = least loaded cells among inactive SCells. [CB012734-C] If sCellActivationMethod = bufferBased and FR2 active Ue load based SCell deactivation is enabled, all bits set to 0 in this proposal mask sent by L2-PS UL to L2-PS DL, L2-PS DL will find the Scell(s) with least UL load based on beam/carrier matrix maintained in DL. [End CB012734-C] If sCellActivationMethod = bufferAndRLQualityBased, 1 = cells which fulfill RLQ activation criteria among inactive SCells. * When ulLatestResult = buffer based deactivation, If sCellActivationMethod = bufferBased [CB012734-C] and FR2 active Ue load based SCell deactivation is disabled[End CB012734-C], 1 = most loaded cells among active SCells. [CB012734-C] If sCellActivationMethod = bufferBased and FR2 active Ue load based SCell deactivation is enabled, all bits set to 0 in this proposal mask sent by L2-PS UL to L2-PS DL, L2-PS DL will find the SCell(s) with most UL load based on beam/carrier matrix maintained in DL, if for UL empty buffer case, the LSB will be set to 1 in proposal mask. [End CB012734-C] If sCellActivationMethod = bufferAndRLQualityBased [CB012734-C] and FR2 active Ue load based SCell deactivation is disabled[End CB012734-C], 1 = most loaded cells among active SCells and cells which fulfill RLQ activation criteria among inactive SCells. [CB012734-C] If sCellActivationMethod = bufferAndRLQualityBased and FR2 active Ue load based SCell deactivation is enabled, 1 = cells which fulfill RLQ activation criteria among inactive SCells, L2-PS DL will find the SCell(s) with most UL load based on beam/carrier matrix maintained in DL, if for UL buffer empty case, the LSB will be set to 1 as well in proposal mask. [End CB012734-C] For both activation method LSB = 1 means 0 buffer in UL. * When ulLatestResult = RLQ deactivation, 1 = cells with degraded UL RL among active SCells. * When ulLatestResult = No Action, If sCellActivationMethod = bufferBased, all bits set to 0, no proposal mask sent by L2-PS UL to L2-PS DL. If sCellActivationMethod = bufferAndRLQualityBased, 1 = cells which fulfill RLQ activation criteria among inactive SCells. | 5G_UP_19264 |   
CurrentState |  |  |

Dl Remote SCell OH Deactivation Data record entry:

Field | Description | Reference | First Feature

maxNumberOfActiveSCellsDl | Maximum number of allowed SCells according to OAI mechanism. Fill 0 in case nothing has changed since last slot. | 5G_L2_IF_2237_replaced([10978009](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VQVsfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008697-A  
numRemoteSCells | The number of Dl SCells that are configured and located in other L2RT instances. | 5G_UP_ALG_2666_replaced([11120257](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqPYkfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |

numActiveRemoteSCellsUl | The number of active Ul SCells that are configured and located in other L2RT instances. |  | CB006137-BB  
currentSCellMask | Bitmask for the active SCell (indicated by sCellIndex), 1 means active, 0 for other status. Include DL+UL and DL only SCells. Bit at PSCell position will be set as 0. |  |   
decisionMask | Bitmask for cells that were selected for the deactivation due to UE assisted overheating. 1 means cell has been selected for deactivation, 0 means no change for cell state due to overheating. |  | CB008697-A  
legacyOhMask | CQI based overheating reporting mask for configured SCells (0 means SCell has no overheating reported, 1 means CQI based, legacy overheating has been reported and maintained for SCell) | 5G_UP_ALG_2821_replaced([11121920](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqbl0vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008697-A  
rlqMask | Bitmask for the cell check result if UL RLQ is bad (1 means RLQ bad). Set to 0 if previous checks during same period have already shown different results. | Criteria defined in 5G_UP_ALG_2746_replaced([11121446](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqYikPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CNI-109641

#### 2.12.2.1.31 L1 PUCCH REQ Data (ulPucchReceiveReqData)

##### 2.12.2.1.31.0-1 L1 PUCCH REQ Data (ulPucchReceiveReqData) Trigger and content of ulPucchReceiveReqData event (ID: 11202832)

**2.12.2.1.31.0-1.0-11**  (ID: `12882468`)

L1 PUCCH REQ Data (ulPucchReceiveReqData) When L2-PS sends UlData_PucchReceiveReq, the following information carried directly or indirectly (beamID instead of patternId) in the message shall be traced for each PUCCH resource handled in the message. See ulPucchReceiveReqAdditionalData event (5G_L2_17275_replaced([11202900](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_294Sl_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) for supplementary data.

---|---|---|---|---|---

const MAX_NUM_OF_PUCCH_XPOL | const |  | uint8 = 4 |  | CNI-109641  
const LONG_TERM_CFO_METRIC_OF_BEAM_SIZE | const |  | uint8 = 4 |  | CNI-109641

srBitDetection | srBitDetection parameter defined in [11514147](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR1aPvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) |  | Informs whether SR detection shall be performed | 5G_L1_IF_219_replaced([11514147](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR1aPvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB010596-A  
beamIdPerXpol | u8 |  | array[MAX_NUM_OF_PUCCH_XPOL] of u8, [CB008577-A]For TDD[End CB008577] beamIdPerXpol[0] is the beamID of Rx antenna streams 0 & 1 (XPol0) (if 4RX or 8RX:) beamIdPerXpol[1] is the beamID of Rx antenna streams 2 & 3 (XPol1) (if 8RX:) beamIdPerXpol[2] is the beamID of Rx antenna streams 4 & 5 (XPol2) beamIdPerXpol[3] is the beamID of Rx antenna streams 6 & 7 (XPol3) [CB008577-A] For FDD, it should be ignored and will be filled with invalid beamID. [End CB008577] | 5G_UP_ALG_2214_replaced([11113079](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpaSKvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CNI-109641  
patternIdPerXpol | u16 |  | array[MAX_NUM_OF_PUCCH_XPOL] |  | CNI-109641  
patternIdForEcpri | u16 |  | array[MAX_NUM_OF_PUCCH_XPOL] |  | CNI-109641  
pucchBeamsFromUeContext1 | u8 |  | Beam Identifier(u8). For not numberOfRxPucch = 8, primary beam from UE context which will be used for PUCCH scheduling. If in the process of probing, it should be the beam not under probing(i.e. beam before probing). For numberOfRxPucch = 8, primary beam from UE context for PUCCH before extension. If in the process of probing, it should be the beam not under probing(i.e. beams before probing). [CB008577-A]Not used for FDD numberOfRxPucch = 8 as per [12823081: Beam usage for UL](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_GGTJ4KpBEfCrANRYxAlR5A?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9). [End CB008577-A] | 5G_UP_ALG_10371_replaced([11112443](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpWAtfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) 5G_UP_ALG_21307_replaced([11113379](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kpbgTvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009363-I  
pucchBeamsFromUeContext2 | u8 |  | Beam Identifier(u8). For not numberOfRxPucch = 4 or numberOfRxPucch = 8, pucchBeamsFromUeContext2 is invalid. For numberOfRxPucch = 4, second beam from UE context which will be used for PUCCH scheduling. If in the process of probing, it should be the beam not under probing(i.e. beam before probing). For numberOfRxPucch = 8, second beam from UE context for PUCCH before extension. If in the process of probing, it should be the beam not under probing(i.e. beam before probing). When only one beam is valid, it is the neighbor beam selected randomly, which will not be used for extension. [CB008577-A]Not used for FDD numberOfRxPucch = 8 as per [12823081: Beam usage for UL](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_GGTJ4KpBEfCrANRYxAlR5A?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9). #### 2.12.2.1.33 L1 PUCCH F3 based serving subcell switch data for FDD Supercell

##### 2.12.2.1.33.0-1 L1 PUCCH F3 based serving subcell switch data for FDD Supercell Trigger and content of ulServingSubcellSwitchDataSuperCellFdd event**** (ID: 12654809)

**2.12.2.1.33.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12654810`)

L1 PUCCH F3 based serving subcell switch data for FDD Supercell In case of FDD supercell (CellTechnology = FDD, numOfSuperSubcells > 1 and actSupercellSingleSSB = False is set in PsCell_CellSetupReq) the UEs shall get SINR reports over PUCCH F3 from L1-UL. L2-PS shall use those SINR reports to compute filteredSINR as per [12582938](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_GtKjwDScEfCKaNlcHOQWmg) to further decide the serving subcell switch as per [12584579](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_1-sdQTVJEfCKaNlcHOQWmg). The L2 tracing event ulServingSubcellSwitchDataSuperCellFdd is triggered once for every UE which is part of ShortlistedUesForSubcellSwitch as described in [12584579](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_1-sdQTVJEfCKaNlcHOQWmg)

ulServingSubcellSwitchDataSuperCellFdd record entry:

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
**Field** | **Description** | **Reference** | **First Feature**  
EventHeader | SFN on air, Slot on air, Ue identifier, Physical Cell ID | 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CNI-106614  
ulServingSubcellId | Current UL serving subcell ID or Target UL serving subcell selected during [12584579](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_1-sdQTVJEfCKaNlcHOQWmg) | 5G_L2_IF_75_replaced([10967982](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UVvtvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [12584579](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_1-sdQTVJEfCKaNlcHOQWmg) | CB009543-B  
ulSubcellData | Per subcell data for upto 6 UL subcells. Dynamic array, MAX element number is 6**.** |  | CB009543-B  
>subcellId | UL Subcell identifier | 5G_L2_IF_75_replaced([10967982](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UVvtvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009543-B  
>filteredSINR | Latest computed filtered SINR for this subcell after processing PUCCH F3 SINR. | [12582938](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_GtKjwDScEfCKaNlcHOQWmg) and [12584579](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_1-sdQTVJEfCKaNlcHOQWmg) | CB009543-B  
  
Event ulServingSubcellSwitchDataSuperCellFdd is designed to hold information of upto 6 subcells using the dynamic array. ~~Default values of~~ ~~subcellId = 'Invalid subcell ID' and filteredSINR = 0 shall be used in case of non-configured subcells(Less than 6 subcells are configured). Example: If only 2 subcells are configured,~~ ~~ulServingSubcellSwitchDataSuperCellFdd.ulSubcellData for the non-configured 4 subcells are filled with default values.~~

Event field ulServingSubcellSwitchDataSuperCellFdd.ulServingSubcellId shall be filled with current ul serving subcell ID if there is no target ul subcell ID selected in [12584579](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_1-sdQTVJEfCKaNlcHOQWmg)

#### 2.12.2.1.36 L1 SRS Data (ulSrsReceiveRespPsData)

##### 2.12.2.1.36.0-4 L1 SRS Data (ulSrsReceiveRespPsData) When L2-PS receives UlData_SrsReceiveRespPs, for each non DTX SRS reception, a selection of the L1 measurements carried in the message and the additional SRS statistics shall be traced for each SRS resource handled in the message: ulSrsReceiveRespPsData record entry: Field Description Reference First Feature EventHeader SFN on air, Slot on air, Ue identifier, Physical Cell ID 5G_L2_1605_replaced( 11201048 ) snr 5G_L1_5G21A_251 dtx ulRank 5G_L1_5G21A_251 ulPmiRank2 5G_L1_5G21A_251 ulPmiRank1 5G_L1_5G21A_251 ulPmiRank1Sinr 5G_L1_5G21A_251 ulPmiRank2Sinr[2] 5G_L1_5G21A_251 longTermRank corresponds to rrmUlRiLongTerm calculated in 5G_UP_ALG_3224_replaced( 11139906 ) 5G_UP_ALG_3224_replaced( 11139906 ) rrmUlRiShortTerm Uint8_t value, by default set to 0. Short term rank used for calculation of rrmUlRiLongTerm. 5G_UP_ALG_19663_replaced( 11139919 ) CB013202-B predictedMcsRank1 Uint8_t value, by default set to 0. Corresponds to predicted_mcs_rank1 and used for short term rank computation. 5G_UP_ALG_30873_replaced( 11139935 ) CB013202-B predictedMcsRank2 Uint8_t value, by default set to 0. Corresponds to predicted_mcs_rank2 and used for short term rank computation. 5G_UP_ALG_30873_replaced( 11139935 ) CB013202-B seRank1 Float value, by default set to 0.0. Spectral efficiency selected based on predictedMcsRank1. Used for rrmUlRiShortTerm calculation 5G_UP_ALG_30873_replaced( 11139935 ) CB013202-B seRank2 Float value, by default set to 0.0. Spectral efficiency selected based on predictedMcsRank2. Used for rrmUlRiShortTerm calculation 5G_UP_ALG_30873_replaced( 11139935 ) CB013202-B rrmInstSinrRank2 Float value, by default set to 0.0.  Used for calculation of predicted_mcs_rank2 in short term rank computation. 5G_UP_ALG_30873_replaced( 11139935 ) CB013202-B rrmSinrCorrection Float value, by default set to 0.0. Calculated according to 5G_UP_ALG_9935_replaced( 11130229 ). Used for MCS prediction in ST rank method. 5G_UP_ALG_30887_replaced( 11132172 ) CB013202-B rrmDeltaSinr Float value, by default set to 0.0. Calculated according to 5G_UP_ALG_11058_replaced( 11137940 ). Used for MCS prediction in ST rank method. 5G_UP_ALG_30887_replaced( 11132172 ) CB013202-B numOfPrbsForMcsPrediction PRB number used for the calculation of predicted_mcs_rank1 and predicted_mcs_rank2, see MCS selection algorithm 5G_UP_ALG_17281_replaced( 11131699 ), 5G_L2_13538_replaced( 11163792 ).  By default set to 0. 5G_UP_ALG_17281_replaced( 11131699 ) CB013202-B sfnForProcessing SFN when the actual L1 processing is done 5G_L1_5G21A_265 slotForProcessing Slot when the actual L1 processing is done 5G_L1_5G21A_265 rrmUlPmiRank1SinrSrsLT Computed long term average for uncompensated rank1 SRS PMI SINR 5G_UP_ALG_19678_replaced( 11140301 ) CB009363-D rrmUlPmiRank2SinrSrsLT Computed long term average for uncompensated rank2 SRS PMI SINR 5G_UP_ALG_19680_replaced( 11140371 ) CB009363-D avgTimeSrsReport Average time in slots between the two consecutive non DTX UlData_SrsReceiveRespPs resource reports for the UE, with no PUSCH rank2 transmission in between the reports.  The value shall be calculated as a sum of all computed durations divided by total number of computations. CB009363 CFAM CB009363-D notEnoughPrbsForASrsRatio Ratio between (A/B):  A:  The number of cases when amount of PRBs available for PUSCH in the UL slot is not large enough to fit the configured SRS BW (see 5G_UP_ALG_5057_replaced( 11201982 ) for details)  B:  The number of total aperiodic SRS transmitted as specified in 5G_UP_ALG_5057_replaced( 11201982 ) plus the cases from 'A'. CB009363 CFAM CB009363-D shortTermTaMetric int16[-80..80] 13442068 CB015279-F (ID: 13482870)

#### 2.12.2.1.37 Paging Scheduling Information

##### 2.12.2.1.37.0-1 Paging Scheduling Information pagingScheduleData (ID: 11203072)

**2.12.2.1.37.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11203075`)

Paging Scheduling Information When L2-PS schedules Paging for a PO in the first beam per cell, the event shall be traced by logging the information defined in the following structure.

pagingSchedulingData entry:

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
Field | Description | Reference | First Feature  
EventHeader | SFN on air, Slot on air, Ue identifier (P-RNTI), Physical Cell ID | 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
nrCellId | This shall be set as NR Cell ID of the cell. | 5G_L2_IF_61_replaced([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
isModificationPeriodStart | This shall be set for the 1st PO of a Modification period. Otherwise it shall be reset. | 5G_UP_ALG_3918_replaced([11167942](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kts8SPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
isShortMsgScheduled | This shall be set if Short message is scheduled in DCI 1_0 | 5G_UP_ALG_3921_replaced([11168085](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kttjXfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
isSystemInfoModificationPresent | This shall be set if gNB is paging due to system information modification. | 5G_UP_ALG_3921_replaced([11168085](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kttjXfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
stmsiCountInPagingMsg | Number of sTmsi is packed into Paging message for the opportunity. | 5G_UP_ALG_11739_replaced([11167674](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktrHIvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
noOfStmsiDroppedInCurrentPo | Number of sTmsi dropped due to Paging limit in the given opportunity | 5G_UP_ALG_11739_replaced([11167674](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktrHIvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
totalNoOfIncomingPaging | Total number of sTmsi received so far in this cell | 5G_UP_ALG_3908_replaced([11167780](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktsVMfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |

---

##### 2.12.2.1.37.0-2 Paging Scheduling Information pagingScheduleData 24R1 (ID: 11203081)

**2.12.2.1.37.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11203087`)

Paging Scheduling Information When L2-PS schedules Paging for a PO in the first beam per cell, the event shall be traced by logging the information defined in the following structure.

pagingScheduleData entry:

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
Field | Description | Reference | First Feature  
EventHeader | SFN on air, Slot on air, Ue identifier (P-RNTI), Physical Cell ID | 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
nrCellId | This shall be set as NR Cell ID of the cell. | 5G_L2_IF_61_replaced([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
isModificationPeriodStart | This shall be set for the 1st PO of a Modification period. Otherwise it shall be reset. | 5G_UP_ALG_3918_replaced([11167942](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kts8SPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
isShortMsgScheduled | This shall be set if Short message is scheduled in DCI 1_0 | 5G_UP_ALG_3921_replaced([11168085](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kttjXfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
isSystemInfoModificationPresent | This shall be set if gNB is paging due to system information modification. | 5G_UP_ALG_3921_replaced([11168085](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kttjXfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
[Before CB008225-C]stmsiCountInPagingMsg[CB008225-C]pagRecordsInPagingMsg[End CB008225-C] | Number of sTmsi[CB008225-C]or iRnti[End CB008225-C] is packed into Paging message for the opportunity. | 5G_UP_ALG_11739_replaced([11167674](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktrHIvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
[Before CB008225-C]noOfStmsiDroppedInCurrentPo[CB008225-C]noOfPagRecordsDroppedInCurrentPo[End CB008225-C] | Number of sTmsi[CB008225-C] or iRnti[End CB008225-C] dropped due to Paging limit in the given opportunity, see Note. | 5G_UP_ALG_11739_replaced([11167674](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktrHIvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
totalNoOfIncomingPaging | Total number of sTmsi received so far in this cell, see Note. | 5G_UP_ALG_3908_replaced([11167780](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktsVMfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
totalNoOfPagingDropped | Number of sTmsi dropped so far, see Note. | 5G_UP_ALG_3908_replaced([11167780](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktsVMfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
  
[CB008225-C]

Note: When UE is in RRC Inactive state, the value of sTmsi is unavailable. In that case, L2-PS shall use ueIdIndex when calculating PO per 5G_UP_ALG_3918_replaced([11167942](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kts8SPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Both sTmsi and ueIdIndex are received in PsSgnl_PcchDataSendReq message, see 5G_L2_IF_2546_replaced([10978576](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VUnKvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for more details.

[End CB008225-C]

##### 2.12.2.1.37.0-3 Paging Scheduling Information pagingScheduleData 24R2 onwards (ID: 11203094)

**2.12.2.1.37.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11203100`)

Paging Scheduling Information When L2-PS schedules Paging for a PO in the first beam per cell, the event shall be traced by logging the information defined in the following structure.

pagingScheduleData entry:

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
Field | Description | Reference | First Feature  
EventHeader | SFN on air, Slot on air, Ue identifier (P-RNTI), Physical Cell ID | 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
nrCellIdentity | This shall be set as NR Cell ID of the cell. | 5G_L2_IF_61_replaced([10967196](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTc_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CNI-109641  
isModificationPeriodStart | This shall be set for the 1st PO of a Modification period. Otherwise it shall be reset. | 5G_UP_ALG_3918_replaced([11167942](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kts8SPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
isShortMsgScheduled | This shall be set if Short message is scheduled in DCI 1_0 | 5G_UP_ALG_3921_replaced([11168085](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kttjXfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
isSystemInfoModificationPresent | This shall be set if gNB is paging due to system information modification. | 5G_UP_ALG_3921_replaced([11168085](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kttjXfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
pagRecordsInPagingMsg | Number of sTmsi or iRnti is packed into Paging message for the opportunity. | 5G_UP_ALG_11739_replaced([11167674](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktrHIvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
noOfPagRecordsDroppedInCurrentPo | Number of sTmsi or iRnti dropped due to Paging limit in the given opportunity, see Note. | 5G_UP_ALG_11739_replaced([11167674](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktrHIvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
totalNoOfIncomingPaging | Total number of sTmsi received so far in this cell, see Note. | 5G_UP_ALG_3908_replaced([11167780](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktsVMfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
totalNoOfPagingDropped | Number of sTmsi dropped so far, see Note. | 5G_UP_ALG_3908_replaced([11167780](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktsVMfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
  
Note: When UE is in RRC Inactive state, the value of sTmsi is unavailable. In that case, L2-PS shall use ueIdIndex when calculating PO per 5G_UP_ALG_3918_replaced([11167942](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kts8SPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Both sTmsi and ueIdIndex are received in PsSgnl_PcchDataSendReq message, see 5G_L2_IF_2546_replaced([10978576](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VUnKvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for more details.

isShortMsgScheduled | This shall be set if Short message is scheduled in DCI 1_0 | 5G_UP_ALG_3921_replaced([11168085](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kttjXfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
isSystemInfoModificationPresent | This shall be set if gNB is paging due to system information modification. | 5G_UP_ALG_3921_replaced([11168085](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kttjXfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |

pagRecordsInPagingMsg | Number of sTmsi or iRnti is packed into Paging message for the opportunity. | 5G_UP_ALG_11739_replaced([11167674](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktrHIvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
noOfEdrxCNPagInPagingMsg | Number of eDRX CN paging UEs in this Paging message for the opportunity. | 5G_UP_ALG_27237_replaced([11168024](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kttjU_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB012544-D  
noOfEdrxRANPagInPagingMsg | Number of eDRX RAN paging UEs in this Paging message for the opportunity. | 5G_UP_ALG_27238_replaced([11168037](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kttjVfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB012544-D

totalNoOfIncomingPaging | Total number of sTmsi received so far in this cell, see Note. | [Before CB011041-B] 5G_UP_ALG_3908_replaced([11167780](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktsVMfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [CB011041-B] 5G_L2_824_replaced([11173540](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26b9DPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [End CB011041-B] |

#### 2.12.2.1.38 Dynamic Shared Spectrum

##### 2.12.2.1.38.0-1 Dynamic Shared Spectrum ulLoadIndData (ID: 11203129)

**2.12.2.1.38.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `12819359`)

Dynamic Shared Spectrum 5G-L2-PS, as a CRM Client, shall trace the measured UL load.

This event is triggered every ulloadIndicationDuration, as defined in 5G_L2_100_replaced([11143404](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_230G2fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

**UlLoadIndData record entry:**

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
**Field** | **Description** | **Reference** | **First Feature**  
eventHeader | Generic event header. | 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | 5GC001586-K  
isMessageSentToCrm | True if message ‘EN DSS UL QOS Load Indication’ has been sent to CRM. False if the message has been filtered | 5G_UP_ALG_26734_replaced([11172637](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuMri_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CNI-99801  
isCrmOverload | True if CRM notified UL Scheduler that it is in overload state, else false | 5G_UP_ALG_26734_replaced([11172637](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuMri_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CNI-99801  
isSchedulerOverload | True [Before CB014088-B] if UL Scheduler is in overload state [CB014088-B] if the L2-PS scheduling overload threshold for DSS/CRM client is reached in UL as defined by([12688465: Indicating Scheduling Overload by L2-PS Client](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_REod0lXNEfC45IKMrv0u7Q?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9)) [End CB014088-B], else false | 5G_UP_ALG_26734_replaced([11172637](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuMri_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CNI-99801  
measuredNgbrNnbrLoad | Measured UL nGBR nNBR Load. | 5G_L2_5964_replaced([11181363](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27Tfs_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | 5GC001586-K  
measuredGbrLoad | Measured UL GBR Load. | 5G_L2_5963_replaced([11181354](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27TfsfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008379

---

##### 2.12.2.1.38.0-2 Dynamic Shared Spectrum dlLoadIndData (ID: 11203156)

**2.12.2.1.38.0-2.0-4**  (ID: `12819417`)

Dynamic Shared Spectrum 5G-L2-PS, as a CRM Client, shall trace the measured DL load.

this event is triggered every dlloadIndicationDuration, as defined in 5G_L2_100_replaced([11143404](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_230G2fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

**DlLoadIndData record entry:**

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
**Field** | **Description** | **Reference** | **First Feature**  
eventHeader | SFN on air, Slot on air, Ue identifier (set to invalidRnti), Physical Cell ID | 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | 5GC001586-K  
isMessageSentToCrm | True if the message ‘EN DSS DL QOS Load Indication’ has been sent to CRM, false if the message has been filtered | 5G_UP_ALG_26732_replaced([11172308](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuLdYvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CNI-99801  
isCrmOverload | True if CRM notified DL Scheduler that it is in overload state, else false | 5G_UP_ALG_26732_replaced([11172308](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuLdYvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CNI-99801  
isSchedulerOverload | True [Before CB014088-B] if DL Scheduler is in overload state [CB014088-B] if the L2-PS scheduling overload threshold for DSS/CRM client is reached in DL as defined by ([12688465: Indicating Scheduling Overload by L2-PS Client](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_REod0lXNEfC45IKMrv0u7Q)) [End CB014088-B], else false | 5G_UP_ALG_26732_replaced([11172308](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuLdYvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CNI-99801  
measuredGbrLoad | Measured DL GBR Load. | 5G_L2_8590_replaced([11152240](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24nYGPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | 5GC001586-K  
measuredNgbrNnbrLoad | Measured DL nGBR nNBR Load | 5G_L2_5964_replaced([11181363](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27Tfs_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | 5GC001586-K  
measuredPdcch | Measured PDCCH Load | 5G_L2_3501_replaced([11181371](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27TftfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008379

##### 2.12.2.1.38.0-3 Dynamic Shared Spectrum ulSubcarrierResourceAllocData (ID: 11203184)

**2.12.2.1.38.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `11203197`)

Dynamic Shared Spectrum UlSubcarrierResourceAllocData record entry:

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
Field | Description | Reference | First Feature  
eventHeader | Generic event header. | 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | 5GC001586-K

allocatedUlRatio | Allocated uplink sharing ratio as received in EN DSS UL SUBCARRIER RESOURCE ALLOCATION REQUEST (CRM_1114). | 5G_UP_ALG_5180_replaced([11172453](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuMrgPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | 5GC001586-K  
startPrb | Start PRB usable by L2PS. | 5G_UP_ALG_5180_replaced([11172453](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuMrgPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | 5GC001586-K  
endPrb | End PRB usable by L2PS. | 5G_UP_ALG_5180_replaced([11172453](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuMrgPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | 5GC001586-K

sfnActivationTime | SFN when the new PRB area will be active. | 5G_UP_ALG_5180_replaced([11172453](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuMrgPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | 5GC001586-K

##### 2.12.2.1.38.0-4 Dynamic Shared Spectrum dssSlotTypeData (ID: 11203205)

**2.12.2.1.38.0-4.0-3**  (ID: `11203224`)

Dynamic Shared Spectrum Anytime when 5G-L2-PS activates a new DSS resource allocation (rrmFddCurrentDlShareBitmap, see 5G_UP_ALG_4748_replaced([11172273](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuK2WPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the event shall be traced by logging the information defined in the following structure. This shall be done no matter if the new value of rrmFddCurrentDlShareBitmap differs from the old one or not.

nrLteDssMode_EVENT_MSG_DATA record entry

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
Field | Description | Reference | First Feature  
EventHeader | SFN on air, Slot on air, Ue identifier, Physical Cell ID | 5G_L1_5G21A_199 |   
traceType | Enumeration, to indicate whether current trace record entry is event triggered (as usual) or periodically logged. - EVENT (0): event triggered trace - PERIODIC (1): periodically logged trace | n/a | CNI-128913  
rrmFddCurrentDlShareBitmap80 | Bit string (size 80 bits) | 5G_UP_ALG_4741_replaced([11172240](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuK2UfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CNI-109641  
  
In 5G19B the event shall not be traced at all.

#### 2.12.2.1.39 CSI-RS Scheduler Output Event (csiRsSchedData)

##### 2.12.2.1.39.0-1 CSI-RS Scheduler Output Event (csiRsSchedData) CSI-RS for channel measurement structure (ID: 11203236)

**2.12.2.1.39.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `12578419`)

CSI-RS Scheduler Output Event (csiRsSchedData) When L2-PS schedules CSI-RS for channel measurement for a given slot and subcell, for each CSI-RS resource scheduled in the subcell in that slot, the information defined in the following structure shall be traced:

**csiRsSchedData entry:**

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
**Field** | **Description** | **Reference** | **First Feature**  
EventHeader | SFN on air, Slot on air, Ue identifier (set to RNTI of the UE for which CSI-RS is requested), Physical Cell ID | 5G_L1_5G21A_199 |   
subcellId | DLsubcell Identifier | 5G_L2_IF_75_replaced([10967982](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UVvtvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
csiRsTraceType | The trace type of the CSI-RS resource | enumeration CsiRsTraceType { CellCsiRs = 0 UeCsiRs = 1 CellCsiIm = 2 CellTrs = 3 Unknown = 255 } | CNI-115904-A  
startSymbol | The symbol in which CSI-RS transmission is requested | 5G_UP_ALG_3565_replaced([11159629](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktKwyvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
density | The density parameter of the CSI-RS resource | 5G_L1_5G21A_102 |   
densityDot5PrbLocation | The densityDot5PrbLocation parameter of the CSI-RS resource | 5G_L1_5G21A_102 |   
startPrb | The startPrb parameter of the CSI-RS resource | 5G_L1_5G21A_102 |   
numOfPrb | The numOfPrb parameter of the CSI-RS resource | 5G_L1_5G21A_102 |   
csiRsConfig | Configuration table row number in 38.211, table 7.4.1.5.3-1. | 5G_L1_5G21A_102 | 5GC002200-A  
csiTransmitPower | The csiTransmitPower parameter of the CSI-RS resource | 5G_L1_5G21A_102 |   
eCpriConfigFourPatternIds | structure | 5G_L1_5G21A_110 | 5GC002200-A  
>numCeAxcIndex | u8. Numer of ceAxC indices. Same as eCpriConfigFourPatternIds.numCeAxcIndex of DlData_CsiRsSendReq. Note: for CPRI, value 0 should be filled in this field. | 5G_L1_5G21A_110 | 5GC002200-A  
>ceAxcIndex1 | u8. 1st ceAxC Index Same as eCpriConfigFourPatternIds.ceAxcIndex[0] of DlData_CsiRsSendReq. | 5G_L1_5G21A_110 | 5GC002200-A  
>ceAxcIndex2 | u8. 2nd ceAxC Index Same as eCpriConfigFourPatternIds.ceAxcIndex[1] of DlData_CsiRsSendReq. | 5G_L1_5G21A_110 | 5GC002200-A  
>ceAxcIndex3 | u8. 3rd ceAxC Index Same as eCpriConfigFourPatternIds.ceAxcIndex[2] of DlData_CsiRsSendReq. | 5G_L1_5G21A_110 | 5GC002200-A  
>ceAxcIndex4 | u8. 4th ceAxC Index Same as eCpriConfigFourPatternIds.ceAxcIndex[3] of DlData_CsiRsSendReq. | 5G_L1_5G21A_110 | 5GC002200-A  
patternId1 | u16. 1st pattern ID. - For eCPRI, same as eCpriConfigFourPatternIds.patternId[0] of DlData_CsiRsSendReq message - For CPRI, same as CSI-RS symbol’s patternIdPolList[][0] of DLData_PatternConfigReq message | 5G_L1_5G21A_110 5G_L1_5G21A_60 | 5GC002200-A  
patternId2 | u16. 2nd pattern ID. - For eCPRI, same as eCpriConfigFourPatternIds.patternId[1] of DlData_CsiRsSendReq message - For CPRI, same as CSI-RS symbol’s patternIdPolList[][1] of DLData_PatternConfigReq message | 5G_L1_5G21A_110 5G_L1_5G21A_60 | 5GC002200-A  
patternId3 | u16. 3rd pattern ID. - For eCPRI, same as eCpriConfigFourPatternIds.patternId[2] of DlData_CsiRsSendReq message - For CPRI, same as CSI-RS symbol’s patternIdPolList[][2] of DLData_PatternConfigReq message | 5G_L1_5G21A_110 5G_L1_5G21A_60 | 5GC002200-A  
patternId4 | u16. 4th pattern ID. - For eCPRI, same as eCpriConfigFourPatternIds.patternId[3] of DlData_CsiRsSendReq message - For CPRI, same as CSI-RS symbol’s patternIdPolList[][3] of DLData_PatternConfigReq message | 5G_L1_5G21A_110 5G_L1_5G21A_60 | 5GC002200-A  
csiBestBeamPowerOffset | power offset that balance two beams power received by UE | 5G_UP_ALG_13465_replaced([11118538](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqDyZ_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB010602-A  
  
[CB008577-E]

Note1: For 32Port Row16 CSIRS in FDD dlMimoMode=CL32x4, there has 8 patternIds per CsiRsResource[] in CsiRsSendReq message, the TtiTrace only fill first 4 patternIds for each CsiRsResource[], the remain 4 patternIds are not filled in TtiTrace for simplify. Rational: The row16 is disabled by default.

[End CB008577-E]

#### 2.12.2.1.44 Remote Scell Activation

##### 2.12.2.1.44.0-1 Remote Scell Activation dlRemoteScellActivationData (ID: 11203367)

**2.12.2.1.44.0-1.0-5**  (ID: `13384188`)

Remote Scell Activation When L2-PS DL finished the checking procedure for Remote SCell activation (number of checks done = rdNumOfScellChecksFR1), the event shall be traced by logging the information defined in the following structure:

DL Remote SCell Activation Data record entry:

|  |  |  |   
---|---|---|---|---  
Field | Range | Description | Reference | First Feature  
EventHeader | [CNI-153420-O] structure (see [11201053](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTf_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [End CNI-153420-O] | SFN on air, Slot on air, Ue identifier, Physical Cell ID | [11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) |   
numOfPassedBufferChecks | [CNI-153420-O] (0.. 10), step size: 1 [End CNI-153420-O] | Number of passed checks. If this value is equal to numOfChecks, then the decision is to activate the Scell | [11121013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqWGQPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) |   
numOfChecks | [CNI-153420-O] (0.. 10), step size: 1 [End CNI-153420-O] | Number of checks done in the checking period. This value can be lower than rdNumberOfScellChecksFR1 (see [11184651](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27shTPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) if a check has failed | [11121013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqWGQPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) |   
lastDecisionForFR1Ul | [CNI-153420-O] enum SCellActivationCmdType (see [13388107](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_xWoj0gKbEfGhFrIQm2O4Ew)) [End CNI-153420-O] | [Before CNI-153420-O] The decision from UL in FR1 UL CA. Joint DL/UL Scell is actived if lastDecisionForFR1UL or numOfPassedBufferChecks check passed. [CNI-153420-O] When, for FR1 UL CA, lastDecisionForFR1Ul is set to FR1_ULDECISION_ACTIVATE_DECISION or the number of passed buffer checks (numOfPassedBufferChecks) reaches the required threshold, then the System shall activate the joint DL/UL SCell. For lastDecisionForFR1Ul only 3 values of SCellActivationCmdType enum are valid: UNKNOWN_CMD, FR1_ULDECISION_ACTIVATE_DECISION, FR1_ULDECISION_DEACTIVATE_DECISION [End CNI-153420-O] | [11159027](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25OcFPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CNI-109641  
totalCurrentNonGbrDrbBufferSizes | [CNI-153420-O] (0.. 2^32 -1), step size: 1 [End CNI-153420-O] | sum of buffer level(currentDrbBufferSize) of all non-GBR bearers for CA UE | [11121013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqWGQPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) |   
rrmDlCaNonGbrBufferThreshold | [CNI-153420-O] (0.. 90000), step size: 1 [End CNI-153420-O] | rrmDlCaNonGbrBufferThres is the expected throughput of P(S)Cell and all current active Scells. [CNI-153420-O] Upper range limit of 90000 is the theoretical max value. [End CNI-153420-O] | [11121013](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqWGQPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) |   
sCellActivationMinDataThreshold | [CNI-153420-O] (1000.. 10000), step size: 1000 [End CNI-153420-O] | Threshold used for Scell activation. | [11121228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqWtW_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) |   
sCellDlOverload | [CNI-153420-O] (0.. 2^32 -1), step size: 1 [End CNI-153420-O] | [Before CNI-153420-O] uint32, each bit of the uint32 is a bit flag for SCell DL scheduler overload as [11122209: SCell scheduler level processing load status determination for CA activation decision for DL branch](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqeCEfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) or DL's core overload as [11122225: Core level scheduler processing load status determination for CA activation decision](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqeCFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ). The lowest bit is 0 for PCell, the second lowest bit is for serving cell index 1 and so forth. [CNI-153420-O] Each bit of the sCellDlOverload is a bit flag for SCell DL scheduler overload (see [11122209](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqeCEfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) ) or DL's core overload (see [11122225](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqeCFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Bit position = serving cell index, where bit 0 = PCell (index 0), bit 1 = serving cell index 1, bit 2 = serving cell index 2, … up to bit 31 = serving cell index 31. All bits are 0 by default; the bit is set to 1 only when the corresponding cell is in overload. [End CNI-153420-O] | [11122209](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqeCEfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) [11122225](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqeCFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CB013709-C  
sCellUlOverload | [CNI-153420-O] (0.. 2^32 -1), step size: 1 [End CNI-153420-O] | [Before CNI-153420-O] uint32, each bit of the uint32 is a bit flag for SCell UL scheduler overload as [11122218: SCell scheduler level processing load status determination for CA activation decision for UL branch](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqeCE_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) or UL's core overload as [11122225: Core level scheduler processing load status determination for CA activation decision](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqeCFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ). The lowest bit is 0 for PCell, the second lowest bit is for serving cell index 1 and so forth. Bit value default 0 and if overload then 1. [CNI-153420-O] Each bit of the sCellUlOverload is a bit flag for SCell UL scheduler overload (see 11122218) or UL's core overload (see 11122225). Bit position = serving cell index, where bit 0 = PCell (index 0), bit 1 = serving cell index 1, bit 2 = serving cell index 2, … up to bit 31 = serving cell index 31. All bits are 0 by default; the bit is set to 1 only when the corresponding cell is in overload. [End CNI-153420-O] | [11122218](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqeCE_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) [11122225](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqeCFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CB013709-C

numOfPassedBufferChecks | Number of passed checks. If this value is equal to rdNumberOfScellChecksFR1UL, then the decision is to activate the Scell. | 5G_UP_ALG_9698_replaced([11121066](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqWGTfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB006137-AB  
lastDecisionForFR1Ul | The decision from UL in FR1 UL CA. 19:FR1_ULDECISION_ACTIVATE_DECISION 20:FR1_ULDECISION_DEACTIVATE_DECISION | 5G_UP_ALG_9698_replaced([11121066](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqWGTfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) 5G_L2_7769_replaced([11159027](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25OcFPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB006137-AB

#### 2.12.2.1.46 DlScellRlqMonitoring

##### 2.12.2.1.46.0-1 DlScellRlqMonitoring When L2-PS DL finishes a Radio Link Quality monitoring evaluation for a SCell in Interband Ca configuration, the event shall be traced by logging the information defined in the following structure: DL Scell RLQ Monitoring Data record entry: Field Description Reference First Feature EventHeader SFN on air, Slot on air, Ue identifier, Physical Cell ID 5G_L2_1605_replaced( 11201048 ) rrmNumMcsCheckForRLQ Number of checks performed during the evaluation 5G_UP_ALG_2764_replaced( 11121572 ) rrmSamplesScellGoodRLQ Number checks where mcs is considered good 5G_UP_ALG_2764_replaced( 11121572 ) rrmSamplesScellBadRLQ Number checks where mcs is considered bad 5G_UP_ALG_2764_replaced( 11121572 ) rrmScellBadRLQTimes Number of evaluations where the mcs is considered bad 5G_UP_ALG_2764_replaced( 11121572 ) rrmScellRLQStatus Radio Quality Status good or bad 5G_UP_ALG_2764_replaced( 11121572 ) (ID: 11203422)

#### 2.12.2.1.50 UL PDU Demultiplexing

##### 2.12.2.1.50.0-1 UL PDU Demultiplexing ulPduDemuxData (ID: 11203529)

**2.12.2.1.50.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `13378240`)

UL PDU Demultiplexing When L2-PS receives LoCtrl_UlMacPduReceiveInd containing the UL received bearer for at least one UE, the record below shall be logged for each UE.

**ulPduDemuxData record entry:**

|  |  |  |   
---|---|---|---|---  
**Field** | [CNI-153420-L]Range[End CNI-153420-L] | **Description** | **Reference** | **First Feature**  
eventHeader | [CNI-153420-L] [structure](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) [End CNI-153420-L] | Generic event header. | [11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CB005876-G  
harqId | [CNI-153420-L] (0..15, 100), step size: 1 [End CNI-153420-L] | Indicates the HARQ process index of an HARQ process. [CNI-153420-L] Note: Value 100 is a special indicator to signal the existence of UL CA. This value is for internal communication (on [11513942: Physical Uplink Control Channel](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR0MFfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) procedures) and is never exchanged with the UE. Nevertheless those range sets are common to the whole L1 messages and defined for [11513870: PUSCH Receive Response Lo message](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRzlCPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9), which is the input of the [11216782: MAC PDU demultiplexing](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2_AT-_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) [End CNI-153420-L] | [11216782](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2_AT-_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CB005876-G  
isUlCcchData | [CNI-153420-L] TRUE, FALSE [End CNI-153420-L] | Indicates if in Msg3, MAC UL-SCH subheader LCID field equal to CCCH. | [10984729](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WCY1_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CB005876-G  
isTcpTraffic | [CNI-153420-L] TRUE, FALSE [End CNI-153420-L] | Indicates L2-PS its TCP traffic when the value is TRUE, then L2-PS can give UL grant by TCP traffic mode, not limited by SR. | [10984729](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WCY1_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CB005876-G  
tempCrnti | [CNI-153420-L] (0..(2^16-1)), step size:1 [End CNI-153420-L] | Temporary _crnti. Valid only if isUlCcchData or isMacCrntiCe equal TRUE._ | [10984729](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WCY1_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CB005876-G  
numOfVoNrRlcSdu | [CNI-153420-L] (0..6), step size:1 [End CNI-153420-L] | Number of RLC SDU corresponding to 5qi1/5qi65/5qi66 **received from 5G-L2-LO in LoCtr_UlMacPduReceivedInd** | [11151884](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24k73fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CB009567-W  
[Before CNI-153420-L] const MAX_NUM_RBS_PER_USER [End CNI-153420-L] |  | [Before CNI-153420-L] Const value used to set the size of the _rcvdBearers array. [End CNI-153420-L]_ |  | [Before CNI-153420-L] CB005876-G [End CNI-153420-L]  
rcvdBearers | [CNI-153420-L] Array[MAX_NUM_RBS_PER_USER] of structure [End CNI-153420-L] | List of Radio Bearers with data received. Max list size equals MAX_NUM_RBS_PER_USER[CNI-153420-L] (Note: limited to 2 SRBs+16 DRBs=18, while the bearerList array in the [10984729: LoCtrl_UlMacPduReceiveInd message](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WCY1_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/gc/configuration/9) could have up to MAX_NUM_OF_LOGICAL_CHANNEL_IDS=33 number of significant elements [End CNI-153420-L]. | [10984729](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WCY1_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CB005876-G  
> lcId | [CNI-153420-L] (1..32), step size:1 [End CNI-153420-L] | Logical channel identity of the radio bearer. | [10984729](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WCY1_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CB005876-G  
> rcvdBytes | [CNI-153420-L] (0..2^32-1), step size:1 [End CNI-153420-L] | Amount of data in bytes received excluding 5G-MAC sub-headers and 5G-RLC PDU headers. | [10984729](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2WCY1_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CB005876-G

#### 2.12.2.1.56 Overload Control

##### 2.12.2.1.56.1 UL Overload Control

###### 2.12.2.1.56.1.0-1 UL Overload Control ulLoadControlData (ID: 11203655)

**2.12.2.1.56.1.0-1.0-16**  (ID: `13388415`)

UL Overload Control L2-PS UL scheduler shall trace the ulLoadControlData event for all the slots which satisfy:

  * The total number of UEs in the Pre-Scheduler candidate set is at least one ([11151479](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24ifmPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

###### 2.12.2.1.56.1.0-2 UL Overload Control ulLoadControlDataFifoEnhancement (ID: 11203771)

**2.12.2.1.56.1.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11203776`)

UL Overload Control **[CB010482-A] not valid from this onwards [End CB010482-A]**

L2-PS UL scheduler shall trace the ulLoadControlDataFifoEnhancement event for all the slots including the slots where none UE is scheduled **in UL. The R &D parameter rdMessageFifoQueuesTtiTracesLevel (defined in 5G_L2_9697_replaced([11190462](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28WonvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is used to partially/fully enable or disable the TTI event ulLoadControlDataFifoEnhancement.**

**ulLoadControlDataFifoEnhancement entry:**

|  |  |  |  |   
---|---|---|---|---|---  
**Field** |  | **Description** | **Trace Type** | **Reference** | **First Feature**  
EventHeader |  | SFN on air, Slot on air, Physical Cell ID | Standard | 5G_L1_5G21A_199 | CB009092-A  
measurementInfo |  |  |  |  |   
>measurementInfoPerQueue |  |  |  |  |   
>> numOfEventsInFifoQueue |  | Number of events per FIFO queue at slot processing start-up. Unit : events | Standard | 5G_L2_9323_replaced([11212357](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-k2L_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009092-A  
| >> oldestAgeInFifoQueue | Maximum age of an event per FIFO queue at slot processing start-up. Unit : slots | Standard | 5G_L2_9323_replaced([11212357](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-k2L_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009092-A  
| >> numOfEventsOfOldestAgeInFifoQueue | Number of events having maximum age per FIFO Queue at slot processing start-up. Unit : events | Standard | 5G_L2_9323_replaced([11212357](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-k2L_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009092-A  
>>numberOfReceivedEventsInPreviousSlot |  | Number of received events in the previous slot per FIFO Queue Unit : events | Tunning | 5G_L2_9323_replaced([11212357](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-k2L_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009092-A  
>> numOfRemainingEventsPerAge [10] |  | Number events having “X” age per FIFO Queue where “X” is an item of the array [1…10]. "X = 10" corresponds to number of the events having age higher or equal to 10 slots. Unit : events | Tunning | 5G_L2_9323_replaced([11212357](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-k2L_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009092-A  
>mostConsumingEvents[] |  | Most consuming events in microseconds from previous slot proceeded by EO of TD UL scheduler. The size is the “used size”. Unit : events |  |  |

>>measOfEventId |  | The average processing time of the event whose ID is “eventId” since the cell setup. Unit : microseconds Forgetting factor: 0.66 for previous LT value and 0.33 for current ST value. | Tunning | 5G_L2_9323_replaced([11212357](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-k2L_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009092-A  
| >>numberOfHits | Number of occurrences of the eventId processed in the slot since the cell setup. Unit : events whose ID is "eventId" | Tunning | 5G_L2_9323_replaced([11212357](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-k2L_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009092-A  
| >>varOfEventId | Variance of the processing time of all events observed whose ID is “eventId” since the cell setup. | >>timeStampOfEventId | The time stamp in microseconds after the processing of the last event in the slot, where the last event ID is “eventId” and the end of the slot is considered as the reference. timeStampOfEventId is positive or equal to zero, when the last event has been processed before end of the slot; otherwise timeStampOfEventId is negative. Unit : microseconds | Standard | 5G_L2_9323_replaced([11212357](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-k2L_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009092-A

##### 2.12.2.1.56.2 DL Overload Control

###### 2.12.2.1.56.2.0-1 DL Overload Control dlLoadControlData (ID: 11203804)

**2.12.2.1.56.2.0-1.0-15**  (ID: `13388566`)

DL Overload Control L2-PS DL scheduler shall trace the dlLoadControlData event for all the slots which satisfy:

  * The total number of UEs in the Pre-Scheduler candidate set is at least one ([11147731](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24NIYPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

Type: Numeric Unit: number of UE(s) Note: rrmMaxNumUesFdmDl is defined in [11179079](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku3Z6_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ku3Z6_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9") | [12738383](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_uSlju3jVEfCdZt6bzaG3fw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_uSlju3jVEfCdZt6bzaG3fw?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9") | CNI-147562-A  
  
Note :

  * When rdActFr2EnhParallelDlFdFor8CC is set to 2 as defined in 5G_L2_14282_replaced([11181667](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27VU7vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), TTI event dlLoadControlData (5G_L2_6440_replaced([11203804](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_299yIvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) becomes obsolete for FR2 TDD 8CC and dlLoadControlDataWithPerFdMeasurements (5G_L2_16174_replaced([11203928](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29-ZMfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) becomes valid for FR2 TDD 8CC.

###### 2.12.2.1.56.2.0-2 DL Overload Control dlLoadControlDataFifoEnhancement (ID: 11203914)

**2.12.2.1.56.2.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `11203920`)

DL Overload Control [CB010482-A] not valid from this onwards [End CB010482-A]

L2-PS DL scheduler shall trace the dlLoadControlDataFifoEnhancement event for all the slots including the slots where none UE is scheduled in DL. The R&D parameter rdMessageFifoQueuesTtiTracesLevel (defined in 5G_L2_9697_replaced([11190462](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28WonvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) is used to partially/fully enable or disable the TTI event dlLoadControlDataFifoEnhancement.

dlLoadControlDataFifoEnhancement entry:

|  |  |  |  |   
---|---|---|---|---|---  
Field |  | Description | Trace Type | Reference | First Feature  
EventHeader |  | SFN on air, Slot on air, Physical Cell ID | Standard | 5G_L1_5G21A_199 | CB009092-A  
measurementInfo |  |  |  |  |   
>measurementInfoPerQueue |  |  |  |  |   
>> numOfEventsInFifoQueue |  | Number of events per FIFO queue at slot processing start-up. Unit : events | Standard | 5G_L2_9323_replaced([11212357](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-k2L_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009092-A  
| >> oldestAgeInFifoQueue | Maximum age of an event per FIFO queue at slot processing start-up. Unit : slots | Standard | 5G_L2_9323_replaced([11212357](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-k2L_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009092-A  
| >> numOfEventsOfOldestAgeInFifoQueue | Number of events having maximum age per FIFO Queue at slot processing start-up. Unit : events | Standard | 5G_L2_9323_replaced([11212357](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-k2L_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009092-A  
>>numberOfReceivedEventsInPreviousSlot |  | Number of received events in the previous slot per FIFO Queue Unit : events | Tunning | 5G_L2_9323_replaced([11212357](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-k2L_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009092-A

"X = 10" corresponds to number of the events having age higher or equal to 10 slots. Unit : events | Tunning | 5G_L2_9323_replaced([11212357](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-k2L_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009092-A

| >>timeStampOfEventId | The time stamp in microseconds after the processing of the last event in the slot, where the last event ID is “eventId” and the end of the slot is considered as the reference. timeStampOfEventId is positive or equal to zero, when the last event has been processed before end of the slot; otherwise timeStampOfEventId is negative. ###### 2.12.2.1.56.2.0-3 DL Overload Control dlLoadControlDataWithPerFdMeasurements (ID: 11203928)

**2.12.2.1.56.2.0-3.0-2**  (ID: `12776804`)

DL Overload Control When rdActFr2EnhParallelDlFdFor8CC is set to 2 as defined in 5G_L2_14282_replaced([11181667](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27VU7vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), then L2-PS DL scheduler shall trace the dlLoadControlDataWithPerFdMeasurements event for all the slots including the slots where none UE is scheduled in DL.

L2-PS DL scheduler shall trace the dlLoadControlDataWithPerFdMeasurements event for all the slots which satisfy any of the conditions below

  * Atleast one UE is scheduled **in DL**
  * UEs skipped due to overload control > 0 (see 5G_L2_1858_replaced([11213112](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-purPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)))



**dlLoadControlDataWithPerFdMeasurements entry:**

---|---|---|---  
**Field** | **Description** | **Reference** | **First Feature**  
EventHeader | SFN on air, Slot on air, Physical Cell ID | 5G_L1_5G21A_199 |   
slotRatio | slotAwareOptimalRatio . Ratio of allocated slot time over complete Slot duration. |  | CNI-105882-B  
measurementInfo |  |  |

##### 2.12.2.1.56.3 Load Control Event Trace

###### 2.12.2.1.56.3.0-1 Load Control Event Trace olcEventTraceData (ID: 11203964)

**2.12.2.1.56.3.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11203970`)

Load Control Event Trace [CNI-106744]

L2-PS DL /UL scheduler shall trace the olcEventTraceData event for all the slots if the R&D parameter rdOlcEventTraceData is enabled. (See 5G_L2_16856_replaced([11190906](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28aS8PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))).

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
Field | Description | Reference | First Feature  
EventHeader | SFN on air, Slot on air, Physical Cell ID | 5G_L1_5G21A_199 |   
OlcEventTrace |  |  | CNI-106744  
>eventId | Received Event Id for which the start time and cpu time consumption shall be captured (2 bytes). |  | CNI-106744  
>duration | time consumed for processing the event (2 bytes) |  | CNI-106744  
>eoId | Event Object Id for which the event received (2 bytes). |  | CNI-106744  
> physicalCellId | Physical Cell Id for which the event was processed. (2 bytes). |  | CNI-106744  
>startTime | Start time stamp at which the event processing started. (4 bytes). |  | CNI-106744  
  
[End CNI-106744]
