##### 2.12.2.1.56.4 Core Level Event Trace

###### 2.12.2.1.56.4.0-1 Core Level Event Trace coreLoadControlData (ID: 12460881)

**2.12.2.1.56.4.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `13388130`)

Core Level Event Trace L2-PS will trace the coreLoadControlData event on every slot, regardless of the slot type. If there [Before CB015327-SR-B] is no scheduling (UL and DL) [CB015327-SR-B] are no UEs in the pre-scheduler candidate set [End CB015327-SR-B] for a contiguous frame (10 slots in FDD and 20 slots in TDD) across all cells/schedulers deployed on the core, tracing will be halted until scheduling resumes.

coreLoadControlData entry:

|  |  |  |   
---|---|---|---|---  
Field | Range | Description | Reference | First Feature  
EventHeader | structure (see [11201053](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTf_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | SFN on air, Slot on air, Physical Cell ID | [11201053](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTf_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) |   
slotUtilizationAvg | (0..2^32-1), step size: 1 | Average slot utilization measurement per 5G-L2-PS core, including CPU time spent on scheduling (DL+UL) and message processing. | [11213737](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-uAHfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CB012716-A  
lastSlotUtilization | (0..2^32-1), step size: 1 | Slot utilization measurement per 5G-L2-PS core from the previous slot, including CPU time spent on scheduling (DL+UL) and message processing. The value excludes the time spent for SRS BM processing, which is traced separately in the entry lastSrsBmSlotUtilization, see below. | [11213581](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-syAPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CB012716-A  
lastSrsBmSlotUtilization | (0..2^32-1), step size: 1 | Time measurement per 5G-L2-PS core for SRS BM processing from the previous slot. This includes SRS BM of all cells running on the core. | [11198054](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29TDwfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | PR753589  
adaptiveSlotProcessingRatio | floating point | Current slot processing ratio used by overload control. | [11212528](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-mESvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CB012716-A  
appliedAdditionalReserveRatio | floating point | Reduction of the slotProcessingRatio applied in the current slot (5G_L2_15692_replaced([11212528](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-mESvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). It may differ from the value of additionalReserveRatio (5G_L2_16997_replaced([11212539](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-mETPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) requested by 5G-L2-PS, when the min limit is applied to slotProcessingRatio, or when the max limit is applied to additionalReserveRatio. | [11212528](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-mESvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CB012528-E  
slotProcessingDurationBudget | (0..2^16-1), step size: 1 | Slot processing duration budget in Us of the current slot. | [12792665](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_tB8F85U2EfC7Wp-sWxcfJw) | CB013305-A  
nbTotalFlushableEvents | (0..2^16-1), step size: 1 | Number of total flushable events present in FIFO prio3 queue | [11212970](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-pHlfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-pHlfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9") | CB014680-C

numOfLowestPrioSysQueueEvents | (0..2^32-1), step size: 1 | Number of events present in lowest priority (Prio-0) System queue. | [11212970](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-pHlfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9 "https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-pHlfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9") | PR864437  
accumulatedSchedulingTimeNs | (0..2^32-1), step size: 1 | 5G-L2-PS shall compute accumulatedSchedulingTimeNs as the sum of all pureSchedulingTime values which all schedulers deployed on this core are logging in dlLoadControlData ([11203804](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_299yIvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) and ulLoadControlData ([11203655](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_299LEPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)) in the current slot. type: numeric unit: nano seconds | [13457301](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_-ZCpEi2vEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | CB015327-SR-B  
  
Note: The phyCellId and lcrId fields in the EventHeader are populated with one of the valid cells deployed in the core. This is necessary due to a limitation in the TTI trace decoder, which filters out events if it encounters invalid values. To distinguish between cores, please use the EventHeader.CoreId, as this event is specific to a particular core.

**2.12.2.1.59.0-1.0-5**  (ID: `11204282`)

DL Metric Indication (dlMetricIndData) When the DL Scheduler sends the message internal::dlMetricInd (5G_L2_3876_replaced([11244253](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3B1lh_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the event is traced and the content of internal::dlMetricInd is logged in the following data structure:

DlMetricIndData Entry:

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
Field | Description | Reference | First Feature  
EventHeader | SFN on air, Slot on air, no Ue identifier, Physical Cell ID | 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB007114-G  
nrCellIdentity | nrCellIdentity of the cell, as set in DlMetricInd | 5G_L2_3876_replaced([11244253](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3B1lh_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB007114-G  
resourceAllocType | Bitmap indicating which of the below metrics are valid, as set in DlMetricInd | 5G_L2_3876_replaced([11244253](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3B1lh_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB007114-G  
normalizedAggregatePrbDemand | Cell load metric used for subcell pooling (5G_UP_ALG_5240_replaced([11210173](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw4MEPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), as set in DlMetricInd | 5G_L2_3876_replaced([11244253](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3B1lh_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB007114-G  
avgPucchF3Demand | Cell load metric used for scheduledUe/slot pooling (5G_UP_ALG_5630_replaced([11220250](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxvHtPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), as set in DlMetricInd | 5G_L2_3876_replaced([11244253](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3B1lh_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB007114-G  
metricIndData | Structure MetricsInd providing the different demands. | 5G_L2_15694_replaced([11204287](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-AOY_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CNI-109641

avgLoadNonGbr | Cell load metric used for scheduledUe/slot pooling (5G_UP_ALG_7945_replaced([11210818](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw6BS_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), as set in DlMetricInd | 5G_L2_3876_replaced([11244253](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3B1lh_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB007114-G  
gbrDemandPrb | Cell load metric used for PRB pooling (5G_UP_ALG_6504_replaced([11212051](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw-5xvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), as set in DlMetricInd | 5G_L2_3876_replaced([11244253](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3B1lh_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | 5GC001227-B  
totalGbrTbs | Sum of scheduled DL GBR TBS during the previous pooling period used to compute the rrmInstNewGbrDataArrivalEst | 5G_L2_4566_replaced([11174607](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26lG-_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008940-L  
totalGbrBufferLength | DL GBR buffer occupancy of the cell at the start of the pooling period | 5G_L2_4581_replaced([11174588](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26lG9_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008940-L  
rrmAvgNewGbrDataArrivalEst | DL L2 new GBR data arrival estimate of the cell | 5G_UP_ALG_5246_replaced([11210209](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw4MFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008940-L  
nonGBRDemandPrb | Cell load metric used for PRB pooling (5G_UP_ALG_6504_replaced([11212051](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw-5xvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), as set in DlMetricInd | 5G_L2_3876_replaced([11244253](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3B1lh_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | 5GC001227-B  
totalNonGbrTbs | Sum of scheduled DL NonGBR TBS during the previous pooling period | 5G_L2_4566_replaced([11174607](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26lG-_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008940-L  
totalNonGbrBufferLength | DL NonGBR buffer occupancy of the cell at the start of the pooling period | 5G_L2_4581_replaced([11174588](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26lG9_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008940-L  
rrmAvgNewNonGbrDataArrivalEst | DL L2 new NonGBR data arrival estimate of the cell | 5G_UP_ALG_5246_replaced([11210209](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw4MFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008940-L  
rrmAvgSpectralEffSlot | Spectral efficency of Dl slot Spectral efficiency of Dl or UL slot. Further, cellSpectralEfficiency for DL/UL can be deduced from rrmAvgSpectralEffSlot as described in 5G_UP_ALG_6786_replaced([11212141](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw_g1vvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). | 5G_UP_ALG_6883_replaced([11212112](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw_g0fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) 5G_L2_3876_replaced([11244253](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3B1lh_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_L2_3878_replaced([11244369](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3B2Mm_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008940-L

---|---|---|---  
Field | Description | Reference | First Feature  
eventHeader | SFN on air, Slot on air, no Ue identifier, Physical Cell ID | 5G_L2_1605 | CB007114-G

resourceAllocType | Bitmap indicating which of the below metrics are valid, as set in UlMetricInd | 5G_L2_3878 | CB007114-G  
ulLoadMetric | Cell load metric used for buffered UL (5G_UP_ALG_5224), as set in UlMetricInd | 5G_L2_3878 | CB007114-G  
metricIndData | Structure MetricsInd | 5G_L2_15694 | CNI-109641  
ulCgType2DemandPrb | Represent the maximum number of PRBs among all the slots over the maximum Configured Grant (CG) periodicity (see 5G_UP_ALG_14663) used by all the CG UEs in a firing state. | 5G_UP_ALG_6786 | CB008124-F  
anticipatedCgSchedDensity | Anticipated scheduling density for CG | 5G_UP_ALG_16224 | CB008124-F  
maxNcg | Maximum number of CG UEs in a firing state in a CG slot | 5G_UP_ALG_16224 | CB008124-F  
rrmCellAvgMimoLayers | Estimated rank based PRB utilization factor | 5G_L2_11697 | CB012605-I

**2.12.2.1.61.0-1.0-10**  (ID: `13326822`)

BBRM allocated Resources (allocatedPooledResourcesData) After the BBRM completes the allocation of the UL pooled resources (related to a given period) for all the cells, the results are traced separately for each cell in the following data structure: 

ulAllocatedPooledResourcesData Entry:

|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |   
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---  
Field |  | Description |  | Reference |  | First Feature |  |   
EventHeader |  | \- SFN = the first SFN of the period the allocations are related to; - Slot = 0; - no Ue identifier; - Physical Cell ID = physical Cell ID of the cell the Event is related to; |  | 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |  | CB008847-E |  |   
nrCellIdentity |  | nrCellIdentity of the cell |  | 5G_L2_3876_replaced([11244253](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_3B1lh_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |  | CB008847-E |  |   
| maxNumPuschUes |  | Allocated PUSCH resources [CNI-136563] ~~(according to Round Robin or Load Metric based algorithm)~~ [END CNI-136563] for the period starting at the SFN indicated in EventHeader | 5G_UP_ALG_6361_replaced([11210614](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw5aQPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) or 5G_UP_ALG_6363_replaced([11210707](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kw6BQvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |  | CB008847-E |  |   
| allocStreamPrbCgUl |  | Allocation of stream-PRB per cell based on Configured Grant (CG) demand | 5G_UP_ALG_20537_replaced([11212532](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxB9FfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |  | CB008124-F |  |   
| allocStreamPrbGbrUl |  | Corresponds to AllocStreamPrbGbr in 5G_UP_ALG_6788_replaced([11212354](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxAu-fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | 5G_UP_ALG_6788_replaced([11212354](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxAu-fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |  | CB007113-B |  |

##### 2.12.2.1.61.0-3 BBRM allocated Resources (allocatedPooledResourcesData) ulRimRsPooledResourcesData (ID: 11204494)

**2.12.2.1.61.0-3.0-1**  (ID: `11204502`)

BBRM allocated Resources (allocatedPooledResourcesData) After the BBRM completes the allocation of the UL pooled resources for RIM RS detection (related to a given period) for all the cells, the results are traced separately for each cell in the following data structure: 

ulRimRsPooledResourcesData entry:

|  |  |  |   
---|---|---|---|---  
**Field** | **Description** | Range | **Reference** | **First Feature**  
EventHeader | \- SFN = the first SFN of the period the allocations are related to; - Slot = 0; - no UE identifier; - Physical Cell ID = physical Cell ID of the cell the Event is related to; |  | Refer to [11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CB011127-A  
l1RsCapacityForTotalRevalidation | Number of minimum resources requested by the cell that are needed for revalidation process. | L1RsCapacityForRevalidation [0...96] |  | CB011127-A  
l1RsCapacityForNewDetection | The maximum number of RIM RS resources the cell could utilize in the given time. | L1RsCapacityForNewDetection [0...512] |  | CB011127-A  
l1RsCapacityForExtraRevalidation | RS resources for revalidation which do not overlap with new detection region | L1RsCapacityForRevalidation [0...96] |  | CB011127-A  
rsDetectionCapacity | Number of RIM RS resources assigned to the cell by BBRM for the interval. | L1RsDetectionCapacity [0...560] |  | CB011127-A  
newRsPeriod | Indication of new RIM RS period starting in the interval. | [TRUE, FALSE] |  | CB011127-A  
sfnFromRequest | The onAir SFN value when request was created and sent. | Sfn [0...1023] |  | CB011127-A  
firstSfnOfNextPoolingPeriod | The SFN value when next RS pooling period starts / when next RimResourceReq shall be sent. | Sfn [0...1023] |  | CB011127-A  
availableDetectionElementsUlSlot | Detection-waiting normal RS elements used for maximum allocation step. | DetectionElementsUlSlot [0...16] |  | CB011127-A  
detectionElementsMeasured | The order of cells to be handled during minimum and maximum allocation steps. | DetectionElementsMeasured [0...19] |  | CB011127-A  
rsGranularityUlSlot | Minimal granularity of RS resources to be given to a cell in one loop during maximum allocation step. | RsGranularityUlSlot [0...56] |  | CB011127-A  
firstSfnOfPoolingPeriod | The first SFN of the current pooling period. | Sfn [0...1023] |  | CB011127-A  
lastSfnOfPoolingPeriod | The last SFN of the current pooling period | Sfn [0...1023] |  | CB011127-A  
status | Cell's pooling status. |  | poolingStatus | CB011127-A  
  
poolingStatus

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
**Field** | **Description** | **Reference** | **First Feature**  
poolingStatus | Enum [Respsent, Reqnotreceived, Celloutsideperiod] |  | CB011127-A

microDtxStatus | [CNI-153420-D] Enum { disabledByConfiguration, disabledDueToCellLoad, enabledButUeInCs1List, enabledButNoUeToAddInCs1List, enabledUeNotAddedInCs1List, enabledFirstUeScheduledCausePrb, undefined, max } [End CNI-153420-D] | disabledByConfiguration: spare, feature CB008238 not activated disabledDueToCellLoad: MicroDTX Disable, cause Cell Load (Nb Ue in CS1 List) enabledButUeInCs1List: MicroDTX Enable: Only non-MicroDTX UE, only MicroDTX UE or a mix of them to schedule. MicroDTX UE shall be co-scheduled with delay sensitive UE or Cell transmission (SIB or Paging channels, SSB or TRS signals) enabledButNoUeToAddInCs1List: MicroDTX Enable: no Ue to schedule (empty) enabledUeNotAddedInCs1List: MicroDTX Enable: No UE scheduled: Nb MicroDTx UEs in CS1 list < dDtxCS1SizeThreshold and PrbDemand < dtxPrbThreshold. enabledFirstUeScheduledCausePrb: MicroDTX enable: DTX UEs scheduled: Nb MicroDTX UEs in CS1 list >= dDtxCS1SizeThreshold or PrbDemand >= dtxPrbThreshold. [CNI-153420-D] undefined: default value, micro DTX status has not yet been determined max: Max number of Enum values [End CNI-153420-D] This ‘MicroDtxStatus’ will be traced if DlDtxOptimEvent = ‘microDtxStatusUpdated’ (value = 7) | 5G_UP_ALG_4209_replaced([11174627](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kudxRfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) 5G_UP_ALG_9471_replaced([11175687](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kulGAfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) 5G_UP_ALG_8238_replaced([11175696](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kulGA_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) 5G_UP_ALG_8943_replaced([11175708](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kulGBvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CNI-115810-A  
  
(*) Only UEs scheduled without entering MicroDTX shall be present in the RNTI list. It means that potential UE(s) in MicroDTX co-scheduled with those UEs, shall not be present in the RNTI list.

#### 2.12.2.1.68 UL eTH for FR1 UL CA Buffer Split

##### 2.12.2.1.68.0-1 UL eTH for FR1 UL CA Buffer Split ulEthForFr1UlCa (ID: 11204865)

**2.12.2.1.68.0-1.0-4**  (ID: `12721712`)

UL eTH for FR1 UL CA Buffer Split For FR1 UL CA UE on UL PCell, UE should calcaulate eTh for possible buffer split whenther its UL Scell is activated or not, and the **ulEthForFr1UlCa can be traced. For FR1 UL CA UE on UL SCell, UE should calcaulate eTh while the SCell is activated, and ulEthForFr1UlCa can be traced.**

The R&D parameter rdEnableFr1UlCaLowPrioTrace as 5G_L2_6876_replaced([11184762](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_27tIX_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) controls whether this event should be traced or not.

SCellInitalSplitTxPower | only valid for scell activation or scell resume, the value equals to the initial power triggered by case1/2/3/5 as 5G_UP_ALG_10879_replaced([11119799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHLfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). The unit is mW. | 5G_UP_ALG_10879_replaced([11119799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHLfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | **CNI-109641**  
[CB013709-CB] overloadForPerCcData [End CB013709-CB] | uint32, each bit of the uint8 is a bit flag for SCell UL scheduler overload as [11122241: Evaluation of Scell scheduler processing load for Scell deactivation for UL branch](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqeCGfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9). The lowest bit is 0 for PCell, the second lowest bit is for serving cell index 1 and so forth. Bit value default 0, if overload then 1. | [11122821: Evaluation criteria for scheduler processing overload in any of the UL carrier](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqgeW_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | CB013709-C

---|---|---|---  
**Field** | **Description** | **Reference** | **First Feature**  
EventHeader | SFN on air, Slot on air, Ue identifier, Physical Cell ID |  | CB008927-P

>subAreaStartPrb | To identify the subarea to which the vUE belongs |  | CB008927-P  
>startPrbOfVirtualUe |  |  | CB008927-P  
>numPrbOfVirtualUe |  |  | CB008927-P  
>vUe[0...7] | vUe (maxNumOfUeInVirtualUe 8). |  | CB008927-P  
>>rnti | UE Identifier within vUE List |  | CB008927-P  
>>neededPrb | The needed PRB calculated based on UE's nonGbr buffer and it's SU correct CQI. |  | CB008927-P  
>>allowedPrb | The allowedPrb of MU eligible UE |  | CB008927-P  
>>reqPrbUe | Request PRB calculated based on dlDataInBufferBits |  | CB008927-P  
>>startPrbOfVirtualUe | In case of unpaired su virtuval ue TTI tracing the startPrbOfVirtualUe is not available so L2-PS shall be update with dummy StartPrb as 65535. |  | CB008927-P  
>>numPrbOfVirtualUe |  |  | CB008927-P  
>>allocatedBits |  |  | CB008927-P  
>>dlDataInBufferBits |  |  | CB008927-P  
  
Note 1, Trace is added for when actRat1Alloc set is as true and Downlink MU MIMO is enabled and controlled by rdNumUeThdForTrace, by default trace will be disabled.

Note 2, Ue Identifier in EventHeader shall be set as zero since tracing is done slot level

**ulMuUeData record entry:**

|  |  |  |   
---|---|---|---|---  
**Field** | Range | **Description** | **Reference** | **First Feature**

#### 2.12.2.1.77 Remote Interference Management

##### 2.12.2.1.77.1 RIM-RS Transmission

###### 2.12.2.1.77.1.0-1 RIM-RS Transmission rimRsSendReq (ID: 11205234)

**2.12.2.1.77.1.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11205245`)

RIM-RS Transmission When RIM-RS needs to be scheduled for a given slot in a given cell, the information defined in the following structure shall be traced either if L2PS scheduled or blocked the RIM-RS transmission.

|  |  |  |  |  |  |  |   
---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---  
Field |  | Description |  | Reference |  | First Feature |  |   
| EventHeader |  | SFN on air, Slot on air, Ue identifier, Physical Cell ID |  | 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |  | CB011028-B |   
| rimRsScramblingSequenceInt |  | Based on [image-0][image_desc]The image contains a blurry mathematical expression. The expression appears to be $\vec{c}_{\text{init}}(t)$.[/image_desc][image_path]https://storage.googleapis.com/dng_files/images/HTML_m24dng_5G_L2_Entity_Level_file_10518.001.png[/image_path][/image-0] from 5G_UP_ALG_12629_replaced([11117907](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqAIBPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) calculations. |  | 5G_UP_ALG_12629_replaced([11117907](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqAIBPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |  | CB011028-B |   
| nscID |  | Element from the list "PsCell_CellSetupReq/PsCell_CellReconfiguraitonReq.rimRsConfig.rsType1NScId" |  | 5G_UP_ALG_12686_replaced([11118096](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqAIDvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |  | CB011028-B |   
| startSymbol |  | Starting OFDM symbol for RIM-RS. |  | 5G_UP_ALG_13072_replaced([11117793](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqAIAfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |  | CB011028-B |   
| startPrb |  | Starting PRB for RIM-RS |  | 5G_UP_ALG_12631_replaced([11117996](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqAICPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |  | CB011028-B |   
| numOfPrb |  | Number of PRBs for RIM-RS 48 or 96 |  | 5G_UP_ALG_13075_replaced([11118073](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqAIC_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |  | CB011028-B |   
| rimRsTransmitPower |  | Transmit power of RIM-RS expressed in dBFS (step of 0.1 dBFS). Value in dBFS = rimRsTransmitPower / 10. |  | 5G_UP_ALG_12777_replaced([11118655](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqEZefvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |  | CB011028-B |   
| antennaStream |  | Indicating which Antenna will be used to tranmit RIM-RS. |  | 5G_UP_ALG_12423_replaced([11101140](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_knUncvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |  | CB011028-B |   
| numCeAxcIndex |  | Number of ceAxcIndex that are valid for the RIM-RS transmission. |  |  |  | CB011028-B |   
| BlockedReason |  | Reason to block the RIMRS transmission: 0: not blocked 1: blocked due to insufficient BBRM allocation 2: blocked due to insufficient prbDemandRimRs 3: other |  | 5G_UP_ALG_12735_replaced([11160843](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktQ3ZfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |  | CB011028-B |

#### 2.12.2.1.78 Inter L1 subpools reconfiguration

**2.12.2.1.78.0-1.0-5**  (ID: `11205371`)

Inter L1 subpools reconfiguration After the BBRM completes the new UL L1 subpools capacity computation for reconfiguration **(related to a given period), the results are traced separately for each UL subpool in the following data structure:**

ulInterL1SubpoolReconfData entry:

**Field** | **Description** | **Reference** | **First Feature**

**2.12.2.1.80.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11205459`)

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
Field | Description | Reference | First Feature

UePowerSplitList | UE list for suspend or resume state changes in servingCell. Dynamic array, MAX element number is [Before CB012528-D-UPD001]60 [CB012528-D-UPD001] 72 [End CB012528-D-UPD001] (CA UE capacity in a single L2-RT). |  |   
>rnti | Ue identifier |  |   
>powerState | enum {suspend, resume} Note : the state is set when a servingCell received the suspend or resume request from peer servingCell | 5G_UP_ALG_10921_replaced([11119951](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqMVQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) 5G_UP_ALG_10923_replaced([11119968](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqMVRPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB006137-BA  
>cause | Enum {lowSplitPower, minPrbLimited invalid} Note: only valid if powerState equals to suspend, set to 0xFF(invalid) for powerState is resume. | 5G_UP_ALG_10921_replaced([11119951](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqMVQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB006137-BA  
>initalSpitTxPower | only valid if powerState equals to resume. The unit is mW. Set to 0xFFFF for invalid value. | 5G_UP_ALG_10879_replaced([11119799](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqLHLfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB006137-BA

**[** CB013500**-A]****_* SrsEoStates_ *[End **CB013500**-A]** **** | The highest overload state of SRS EO in this slot. Type: Enum { normal(default), overload, highOverload, unknown } | [11214197](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2-xDcvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CB013500-A

##### 2.12.2.1.89.0-1 Evaluation of Buffer Status for SCell Configuration in DL Branch evaluationDlBufferStatusForSCellConfiguration (ID: 11205688)

**2.12.2.1.89.0-1.0-6**  (ID: `13368288`)

Evaluation of Buffer Status for SCell Configuration in DL Branch When 5G-L2-PS DL run the checking procedure for Evaluation of Buffer Status for SCell Configuration in DL Branch, the event shall be traced by logging the information defined in the following structure:

Evaluation of Buffer Status for SCell Configuration in DL Branch record entry:

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
**Field** | **Description** | **Reference** | **First Feature**  
eventHeader | SFN on air, Slot on air, Ue identifier, Physical Cell ID | 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008311-A  
bufferMonitoring | **[Before CB012554-A] activate-dl: Activate DL buffer monitoring for SCell Addition.** deactivate-dl: Deactivate DL buffer monitoring for SCell Addition. **[CB012554-A]** caActivateDl: Activate DL buffer monitoring for CA purposes. caDeactivateDl: Deactivate DL buffer monitoring for CA purposes. **[End CB012554-A]** |  | CB008311-A  
dlSCellConfigLevel | [Before CB012554-A] The minimum number of TTIs required to empty the UE's DL non-GBR data buffer in order to trigger SCell addition. [CB012554-A] The minimum number of TTIs required to empty DL data buffer to trigger buffer criterion notification. [End CB012554-A] |  | CB008311-A  
dlSCellConfigLevelNum | The number of consecutive subframes that would require **[CB012554-A] either**[End CB012554-A] CA configuration for serving all the UE non-GBR DL data traffic **[CB012554-A] or to trigger inter-RAT handover based on non-GBR data traffic.**[End CB012554-A].**_*_** * |  | CB008311-A  
totalBufferSize | Current UE buffer level in DL, used for buffer based check. |  | CB008311-A  
totalRrmDlCaNonGbrBufferThreshold | Buffer activation threshold in DL |  | CB008311-A  
currentDrbBufferSizeAtHi | RLC PDU size at L2Hi |  | CB008311-A  
checkCounter | Number of checks in a checking period, equal to dlSCellConfigLevelNum means last check |  | CB008311-A  
timeWithGoodCqi | Time (in mSec) during which rrmCorrAvgCqi (see 5G_UP_ALG_7557_replaced([11125689](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqvu6fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) >= dlCaMinPcellCqi. | 5G_L2_13086_replaced([11162814](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ilI_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB006733-A  
timeWithGoodCqiVoNr | Time (in mSec) during which rrmCorrAvgCqi (see 5G_UP_ALG_7557_replaced([11125689](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqvu6fvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) >= dlCaMinPcellCqi5qi1. | 5G_L2_13086_replaced([11162814](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ilI_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB006733-A  
timeWithGoodSinr | Time (in mSec) during which rrmCorrAvgSinr (see 5G_UP_ALG_3087_replaced([11130243](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq_mhPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) >= ulCaMinPcellSinr. | 5G_L2_13088_replaced([11162826](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ilJfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB006733-A  
timeWithGoodSinrVoNr | Time (in mSec) during which rrmCorrAvgSinr (see 5G_UP_ALG_3087_replaced([11130243](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kq_mhPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) >= ulCaMinPcellSinr5qi1. | 5G_L2_13088_replaced([11162826](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25ilJfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB006733-A  
numOfSCellConfigured | number of UE's configured SCell | 5G_UP_ALG_15831_replaced([11120403](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqQmtvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB006139-AA  
numOfSCellActivated | number of UE's active SCell | 5G_UP_ALG_15831_replaced([11120403](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqQmtvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB006139-AA  
numOfSCellUnavail | number of UE's SCell which is not active but can't be activated due to it is in bad RLQ or it is inter-GNB SCell with unavailable Xp link or the SCell is out of Synchronization | 5G_UP_ALG_15831_replaced([11120403](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqQmtvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB006139-EA  
numOfSCellOverload | number of SCell that is overload as [11122209: SCell scheduler level processing load status determination for CA activation decision for DL branch](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqeCEfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) or as [11122225: Core level scheduler processing load status determination for CA activation decision](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqeCFfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | [11120407: Starting of DL Buffer Status monitoring of all DL non-GBR CA eligible DRBs](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqQmt_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) and [11120432: Stopping of DL Buffer Status monitoring of all DL non-GBR CA eligible DRBs](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqQmxPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | CB013709-C

Field | Description | Reference | First Feature

ueSpecificPriorityInSlot | Priority value of the UE specific priority traffic which had the scheduling request in the current slot [PR724982] Prority index from the table in 5G_L2_14677_replaced([11148498](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24RZ0vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) shall be used to depict Ue specific traffic priority in the current slot [End PR724982] | [Before PR724982] 5G_L2_12726_replaced([11148485](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24RZ0PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [PR724982] 5G_L2_14677_replaced([11148498](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24RZ0vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) [End PR724982] | CB005788-5G-A

>corrSquareM10000 | (0,10000,-10000),stepsize:1 | Averaged correlation square value, it is multiplied by 10000, This metric is for monitoring the UE speed, UE with high speed would shows lower correlation. Valid range is [0,10000], special value -10000 is earlyWbSrs status with actually value is 10000. | 5G_UP_ALG_21817_replaced([11157124](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks5rDvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008322-B  
>sinrAvg | float | Average SINR value for SRS, received from BwvResp msg. Used to destinguish Bad or Good radio link quality of SRS. | 5G_UP_ALG_22633_replaced([11157155](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks6SEvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008322-G  
>srsEpreLinear | float | Linear value of SRS power per port per RE (SRS_EPRE). For SBSRS UE, it's comaTraceLinear*powerDiffLinear/(numOfPrbWbSrs/numOfPrbSbSrs). For WBSRS UE, it's comaTraceLinear. Note, 0 is invalid value. | 5G_UP_ALG_21401_replaced([11157103](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks5rCvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) 5G_UP_ALG_2165_replaced([11154516](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kssPr_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008322-B  
>srsEpreLinearThd | float | For UE do WBSRS switch to SBSRS, it's 10^((rrmSbSrsQualTresh-rxScalingFactorEcpriDbm+0.1 _gainCorrectionEcpri)/10). For UE do SBSRS switch to WBSRS, it's 10^((rrmWbSrsQualTresh-rxScalingFactorEcpriDbm+0.1_ gainCorrectionEcpri)/10). Note, rxScalingFactorEcpriDbm is -152dBm, gainCorrectionEcpri is in PsCell_CellSetupReq. In eCPRI 7-2e (5G_L2_18130_replaced([11155228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2432wvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the absolute SRS power is calculated and reported by L1 directly, refer 5G_UP_ALG_27600_replaced([11154591](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kss2tvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). In theory there will be no need to calculate relative SRS EPRE linear threshold. But for common processing on both eCPRI7-2a and eCPRI7-2e, rxScalingFactorEcpriDbm and gainCorrectionEcpri are still considered, but gainCorrectionEcpri will be hardcode as 0 in eCPRI 7-2e (5G_L2_18130_replaced([11155228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2432wvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))). | 5G_UP_ALG_21355_replaced([11157389](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks65KvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008322-B  
>powerDiffLinear | float | Linear of POWER_DIFF. POWER_DIFF = P_SRS_WB- P_SRS. If powerDiff is invalid, the value is float max. | 5G_UP_ALG_21401_replaced([11157103](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks5rCvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008322-B  
>accumulatedTpc | (-2^31,2^32-1), step size:1 | Accumulated δ_srs, is the sum of δ_srs that is indicated by the non-DTX PUSCH TPC for the UE if CLPC for SRS is enabled for this UE. | 5G_UP_ALG_21401_replaced([11157103](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks5rCvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008322-G  
>numOfDlTrafficCheck | (0…2^16-1),step size:1 | Refer [11157336](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks65IPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?vvc.configuration=https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/cm/stream/_UBmNVp5EEe2A-5U7tzedRA) for numOfDlTrafficCheck updating. | 5G_UP_ALG_21353_replaced([11157336](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks65IPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008322-B

>sampleDlTrafficLo | (0…2^16-1),step size:1 | Number of sample with DL low traffic | 5G_UP_ALG_21353_replaced([11157336](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks65IPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008322-B  
>sampleRlqGood | (0…2^16-1),step size:1 | Number of sample with good radiolink quality. | 5G_UP_ALG_21355_replaced([11157389](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks65KvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008322-B  
>sampleRlqBad | (0…2^16-1),step size:1 | Number of sample with bad radiolink quality. | 5G_UP_ALG_21355_replaced([11157389](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks65KvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008322-B  
>sampleInterferenceHi | (0…2^16-1),step size:1 | Number of sample with high interference | 5G_UP_ALG_21376_replaced([11157453](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks7gN_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008322-G  
>wbSrsConstraintState | enum{ none, limitedByEirp, limitedByHighInterference, limitedByContinuousWbFail, limitedByHighBwvFailure, limitedByMaxWbSbSwitchToggle, limitedByContinuousToggle, limitedByPoorSbBfPerformance } | The status indicate the UE is whether constraint for switch to wbSrs or not and the reason. | 5G_UP_ALG_4349_replaced([11177928](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kuzIc_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) 5G_UP_ALG_21378_replaced([11157541](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks8HRvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) 5G_UP_ALG_23658_replaced([11157482](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks7gPPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) 5G_UP_ALG_21380_replaced([11157558](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks8HSfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008322-E CB008322-G  
>measGapAndWbSrsOverlapStatus | enum{ none, criterion1, criterion2 } | The status indicate the measGap and wbSrs overlap status for SB BF UE. | 5G_UP_ALG_27388_replaced([11156732](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks3OwPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB011117-A  
  
Note:

  * the postfix M# means the ttitrace integer value is transform from float value multiplex by # and then truncated decimal part.

  * wbSrsConstraintState is recorded as the last assigned type in SW if multiplex criteria are met at same time




Note, due to supporting SB SRS for SB BF, the names shall be replaced, but keep the habitual understanding, SBSRS is meaning of WB-BF SRS , even it can be full BW SRS. WBSRS is meaning of SB-BF SRS, even it can be sub-band SRS. refer 5G_L2_12997_replaced([11171221](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26MsevvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for SRS switching.

>srsState | Enum{ SBSRS, SBTOWBSRS, WBSRS, WBTOSBSRS, WBTOWBSRS, SBTOSBSRS } | this IE indicate UE’s pSRS(TAS/codebook) configuration, beamType usage shall follow 5G_L2_10506_replaced([11155506](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_245r8PvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). |  | CB014315-A  
>FWAUe | TRUE,FALSE | TRUE: This UE has at least one DRB bearer with staticUeForWbSbBfSwitch=True ([13446613: drbAddReqPs structure content:](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_I07twSedEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)). FALSE: This UE has no DRB bearer with staticUeForWbSbBfSwitch=True ([13446613: drbAddReqPs structure content:](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_I07twSedEfGxldjOZQLezQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9)). | [13432377: Switch from WB to SB BF](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_9aqaRB7SEfG-foklaHnAaA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | CB014315-A  
>dlTput | (0,65535) , stepsize:1 | The average tput of DL which HARQ is transmitted as newTx and beam type is osDFT (or tapered osDFT). | [13432377: Switch from WB to SB BF](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_9aqaRB7SEfG-foklaHnAaA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | CB014315-A  
>switchProbitTimer | (0,65535), stepsize:1 | The UE's prohibit timer. | [13432377: Switch from WB to SB BF](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_9aqaRB7SEfG-foklaHnAaA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | CB014315-A  
>spectrumEfficiencyM100 | (0,100*32),stepsize:1 | Spectrum efficiency, it is multiplied by 100, ε = R _Qm_ rank. Note, the SE may be skip calculation if any RLQ paramter is not valid. | [13432377: Switch from WB to SB BF](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_9aqaRB7SEfG-foklaHnAaA?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | CB014315-A  
  
Note, due to supporting SB SRS for SB BF, the names shall be replaced, but keep the habitual understanding, SBSRS is meaning of WB-BF SRS , even it can be full BW SRS. WBSRS is meaning of SB-BF SRS, even it can be sub-band SRS. refer 5G_L2_12997_replaced([11171221](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26MsevvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) for SRS switching.

#### 2.12.2.1.100 eirpBeamGainOfWbSrsUe

##### 2.12.2.1.100.0-1 eirpBeamGainOfWbSrsUe (ID: 11206035)

**2.12.2.1.100.0-1.0-2**  (ID: `11206051`)

eirpBeamGainOfWbSrsUe When new eirpNormalizedBeamGain for real time beams of one WB SRS UE calculated(5G_L2_14221_replaced([11157995](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25IVf_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), following parameters shall be traced.

eirpBeamGainOfWbSrsUe record entry:

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
**Field** | **Description** | **Reference** | **First Feature**  
EventHeader | SFN on air, Slot on air, Ue identifier, Physical Cell ID | 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008322-E  
subBandBeamId | BeamId for real time beams used for EIRP | 5G_L2_14222_replaced([11158050](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25I8kPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008322-E  
numOfSegments | numberOfCellSegments for EIRP. | 5G_L2_IF_118_replaced([10969144](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UbPQvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) 5G_L2_IF_4057_replaced([10971382](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UoDk_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008322-E  
beamGain | array[MAX_NUM_OF_CELL_SEGMENT] of float32 MAX_NUM_OF_CELL_SEGMENT is the maximum of numberOfCellSegments. beamGain is the gain before normalization in 5G_UP_ALG_22030_replaced([11118888](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqG1sPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). | 5G_L2_14221_replaced([11157995](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25IVf_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) 5G_UP_ALG_22030_replaced([11118888](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqG1sPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB008322-E  
  
**[CB009527-E]**

Notes:

1, WB SRS and SB SRS have remaned to SB BF SRS and WB BF SRS, for habitual understanding, the rewording is not done yet.

2, In eCPRI 7-2e (5G_L2_18130_replaced([11155228](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2432wvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), the subbandBeamID is no meaning because the subband is selected by radio itself for EIRP coefficients calculation , and transparent for L2PS.

3, Due to FH message size limitation, the eirpCoefficients reports from RU > L1 > L2PS as int16 ( refer 5G_L1_IF_15405_replaced([11513016](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRtecPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), L2PS shall convert to float32 before storing & processing.

**[End CB009527-E]**

>numInterferedBfSubband | Dynamic array[2] element related to portIndex. ,Number of beamforming (BF) subbands that are detected with high interference of related SRS port. | 5G_UP_ALG_26998_replaced([11156904](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ks4c5PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB009527-C

#### 2.12.2.1.103 ApsCorrelation

##### 2.12.2.1.103.0-1 ApsCorrelation When receive UlData_SrsReceiveRespRtBfPs message from L1, following parameters shall be traced. ApsCorrelation record entry: Field Description Reference First Feature EventHeader SFN received from msg, Slot received from msg, Ue identifier, Physical Cell ID 5G_L2_1605_replaced( 11201048 ) PR857294 &gt;PairingGroupApsInfor Pairing Group identifier in cell.  Structure Dynamic array[4]. 12565792: DL pairing group(for SB BF UEs) PR857294 &gt;&gt;PairingGroupId Pairing group identifier.  The max number of pairing Groups please refer 12565792: DL pairing group(for SB BF UEs) 12565792: DL pairing group(for SB BF UEs) PR857294 &gt;&gt;ApsCorrelation Structure of APS correlation between UE(m) and UE(n), Dynamic array [6]. PR857294 &gt;&gt;&gt;rnti_m UE identifier in cell. PR857294 &gt;&gt;&gt;rnti_n UE identifier in cell. PR857294 &gt;&gt;&gt;ApsCorrelation Long term average APS correlation.    LT APS Correlation please refer 12444681: Maintaining of Long-term APS based correlation 11165521: APS based correlation (for SB BF UEs) PR857294 Note, this trace only be recorded when the two UEs (rnti_m and rnti_n) in the same paring group and in the same message of UlData_SrsReceiveRespRtBfPs , this is because the two UEs  long term average APS correlation can be updated only when their short term's response are received by L2PS successful. (ID: 12982575)

#### 2.12.2.1.105 PDCCH pattern information

##### 2.12.2.1.105.0-1 PDCCH pattern information dlPdcchPatternData (ID: 11206137)

**2.12.2.1.105.0-1.0-3**  (ID: `13480196`)

PDCCH pattern information When PDCCH is scheduled in DL slot (dedicated DL or BI slot) with DL grant, following parameters shall be traced.

dlPdcchPatternData record entry:

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
**Field** | **Description** | **Reference** | **First Feature**  
EventHeader | SFN on air, Slot on air, Ue identifier, Physical Cell ID | 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CNI-96037

##### 2.12.2.1.107.0-1 DPA Overload Control dpaOverloadCtrl (ID: 11206233)

**2.12.2.1.107.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11206239`)

DPA Overload Control Any cell in L2PS subpool should report dpaOverloadCtrl when the cell is configured as flexibleCAMode != BasicCAMode in CellSetupReq as 5G_L2_IF_73_replaced([10967202](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UTTdPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)) and DPA overload control is enabled by actDpaOverloadControl as 5G_L2_IF_3117_replaced([10966509](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UPCB_u6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)).

dpaOverloadCtrl entry:

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
Field | Description | Reference | First Feature  
EventHeader | SFN on air, Slot on air, Ue identifier, Physical Cell ID | 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Slot on air is not used in the trace , not specified. Ue identifier is not used in this trace, so the value is not specified. | CB012528-E  
isSlotSkip | bool array[6]. For 6 slots including preT2 slots and T2/T2s slots as 5G_L2_595_replaced([11158240](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25KKrvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), array index map to slot in time sequence. When slot skip occurs, the bool for the slot set to true. | 5G_L2_595_replaced([11158240](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25KKrvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB012528-E  
dpaSlotAvgProcessingTime | float32 array[6]. Cell's dpa duration on preT2 T2/T2s slot, round int of long term filtering result as 5G_L2_15833_replaced([11158816](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25Mm7vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Array index map to slot in time sequence. | 5G_L2_15833_replaced([11158816](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25Mm7vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB012528-E  
dpaSlotInstProcessingTime | u16 array[6]. Cell's dpa duration on preT2 T2/T2s slot, instant result as 5G_L2_15833_replaced([11158816](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25Mm7vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)). Array index map to slot in time sequence. | 5G_L2_15833_replaced([11158816](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25Mm7vvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB012528-E  
isDpaDropOverload | bool array[6]. If cell's DPA is dropped due to overlaod on the slot as 5G_L2_15841_replaced([11158851](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25NN9fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), set the bool for the slot to true. Array index map to slot in time sequence. | 5G_L2_15841_replaced([11158851](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25NN9fvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB012528-E  
sCellActStopResume | enum { 0: defaultValue; 1: stop; 2: resume }; If L2PS subpool stop SCell activation due to DPA overload, it should be 1; if SCell activation resume after stop, then it should be 2. | 5G_L2_15858_replaced([11159227](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_25PqOfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB012528-E

unscheduledAreaStartSymbol | The start symbol of the PDSCH unscheduled area due to other channels/signals occupation. | 5G_L1_IF_85_replaced([11512727](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRrpOfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
unscheduledAreaNumOfSymbols | The number of symbols of the PDSCH unscheduled area due to other channels/signals occupation. | 5G_L1_IF_85_replaced([11512727](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FRrpOfvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
numReOverlapPdcchAndPdsch | The number of Res that cannot be used for PDSCH due to PDCCH mapping | 5G_L2_885_replaced([11178264](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26_WrfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |

#### 2.12.2.1.114 Active UE Load Monitoring for FR2 Cell Group

##### 2.12.2.1.114.0-1 Active UE Load Monitoring for FR2 Cell Group ActiveUeLoadMonitoring (ID: 11206518)

**2.12.2.1.114.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11206524`)

Active UE Load Monitoring for FR2 Cell Group For FR2, if active Ue load based SCell deactivation is enabled, each time when cell group level active Ue load checking finished, the event shall be traced by logging the information defined in the following structure:

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
Field | Description | Reference | First Feature  
EventHeader | SFN on air, Slot on air, Ue identifier, Physical Cell ID. Invalid rnti (0) and the invalid phyCellId (0xFFFF) used here. | 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
activeUeLoadCheckPeriod | The active UE load checking period, which is defined by 8*(rdPeriodScellCheck * rdNumOfScellChecks + rdProhibitScellCheck). | 5G_UP_ALG_26309_replaced([11122151](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqdbAvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB012734-B  
scellReductionThreshold | Threshold of total number of active UEs on each {beam, Carrier} within cell group beyond which SCell deactivation due to active UE load shall be triggered. Defined by NRCELLGRP.nbActiveCarriersThreshold or rdScellReductionThreshold. | 5G_UP_ALG_26309_replaced([11122151](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqdbAvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB012734-B  
maxAllowedActiveSCells | The maximum allowed number of SCells for UE in cell group due to active Ue load limitation. | 5G_UP_ALG_26311_replaced([11122157](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqdbCvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB012734-B  
totalActiveUeLoad | The instant total active Ue load calculated from the cell group beam/carrier matrix. | 5G_UP_ALG_26307_replaced([11122140](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kqdbAPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB012734-B

**2.12.2.1.116.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11206578`)

dlBeamMetric If NRBTS/NRCELLGRP/actHighNumberOfUes = TRUE and rdActEnhBeamSelection = TRUE, the event shall be traced per CellGroup, at the beginning of each DL slot (in Pre-Scheduler), after the beam selection (ref 5G_L2_20091_replaced([11147876](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_24Nvd_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))) by logging the information defined in the following structure:

dlBeamMetric record entry:

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
Field | Description | Reference | First Feature  
EventHeader | SFN on air, Slot on air, no Ue identifier, Physical Cell ID* | 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB012734-E  
selectedBeamId | It indicates the best beam selected for the DL slot. | 5G_UP_ALG_27549_replaced([11174585](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kudKOvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB012734-E  
enforcedBeamIdList | An array of up to 2 PUCCH beamId used for the beam selection in pre-scheduler | 5G_UP_ALG_26785_replaced([11174828](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kueYWPvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB012734-E  
>beamId | Beam Id |  | CB012734-E  
highestBeamMetrics | Structure reporting information related to the 10 beams with the highest metric in the DL slot |  | CB012734-E  
>beamId | Beam Id |  | CB012734-E  
>rrmAvgBeamSchedRate | It represent the percentage of slots that the beam gets selected for scheduling DL data transmission | 5G_UP_ALG_27543_replaced([11174602](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kudxQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB012734-E  
>beamWeight | Beam Weight associated to the beamId | 5G_UP_ALG_27543_replaced([11174602](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kudxQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB012734-E  
>beamMetric | Beam Metric associated to the beamId | 5G_UP_ALG_27543_replaced([11174602](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kudxQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB012734-E  
  
  * The event is reported per CellGroup and not for each cell in the CellGroup.



Note: Note: If the selectedBeamId is not reported in the structure highestBeamMetrics or if its beamMetric is not the highest among the 10 beams reported, it means that it was selected based on DL High Prio Request Class.

#### 2.12.2.1.118 RedPeriodicSrsProcessing

##### 2.12.2.1.118.0-1 RedPeriodicSrsProcessing (ID: 11206614)

**2.12.2.1.118.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11206621`)

RedPeriodicSrsProcessing When the function of reduced periodic SRS processing is enabled (refer 5G_L2_21643_replaced([11171516](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26OhqfvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), RedPeriodicSrsProcessing shall be traced.

RedPeriodicSrsProcessing

record entry:

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
Field | Description | Reference | First Feature  
EventHeader | SFN on air, Slot on air, Ue identifier, Physical Cell ID | 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) |   
RedPeriodicSrsProcessing (*) | Structure of RedPeriodicSrsProcessing { ignoreStatus: IgnoreStatus ignoreUeListType: UeListType ignoreUeList: Rnti } | 5G_L2_21716_replaced([11171554](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26PIsvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB013710-A  
>>IgnoreStatus | enumeration { disabled = 0 enabled = 1 ongoing = 2 } |  |   
>>IgnoreUeListType | enumeration { fwaUe = 0 zeroBufferUe = 1 } indicate the reason of reduce periodic SRS process. |  |   
recordSequenceNumber | set as described in (*). |  |   
>>IgnoreUeList | Dynamic array of Ues which have ignoreBm = true in SRSReceiveReq. Max size=100. |  |   
  
(*) The structure is defined with max size of 100 UEs. If more than 100 UEs are present in the IgnoreUeList, they are split into several number of IgnoreUeList to records

(Note for FwaUe, currently SW implementation only records 100 UEs, if more than 100 FWA UEs are attached, those UEs will not be recorded in TTI trace. ). 

  * the 1st IgnoreUeList records (recordSequenceNumber = 1) contains the 1st 100 UEs of the ignore UE List,

  * the 2nd IgnoreUeList records (recordSequenceNumber = 2) contains the next min(Size of IgnoreUeList-100, 100) UEs of the ignore UE List,

  * and so on..




The records are sent in the order given by recordSequenceNumber for the same event.

By default , records all the UEs in the IgnoreUeList with 10*SFN period.

With addtional ignoreList TTI trace records enable (refer 5G_L2_23107_replaced([11187955](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_28E7yPvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ))), records all the UEs in IgnoreUeList if the IgnoreUeList is changed. ( IF addtional ignoreList TTI trace records enable , there will be no needs recording the default records with 10*SFN period, because the total IgnoreUeList will also be recorded.)

isCellOverloaded | Boolean indicating whether cell has reached overload exit condition. | 5G_UP_ALG_29952_replaced([11116341](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kp2-H_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB013305-BC  
slotDurationSwitching | Indicates if the countermeasure to switch from slot patern500us to slot patern750us is active. Type : Boolean (TRUE, FALSE) |  | CB013709-F  
l2PsRtCellLevelSeverityMetric | Real Time (RT) processing load per UL scheduler. Unit: Percentage Range: 0 -100% | 5G_UP_ALG_31301_replaced([11216081](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kxXUQfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | **CB013709-F**

#### 2.12.2.1.123 dlFdBeamData

##### 2.12.2.1.123.0-2 dlFdBeamData This event record the UE's PDSCH beam informaiton which determined during FD scheduling for TDD [CB008577-B] or FDD [End CB008577-B]beamforming. It's recorded only when: The UE scheduled in DL FD and the selected PDSCH patternId is changed, or The UE scheduled in DL FD and the interval to previous DL FD scheduling is equal or greater than rdTtitraceRecordMaxInterval defined in 5G_L2_23166_replaced( 11189228 ) Field Description Reference First Feature EventHeader SFN on air related to the switching time (i.e. odd SFN of PDCCH slot pattern), Slot on air related to the switching time (i.e. last NRT slot of radio frame), no Ue identifier, Physical Cell ID CNI-115902-A subcellId subcellId of the cell CNI-115902-A patternId1 u16. 1st pattern ID.  - For CPRI, same as PDSCH symbol’s patternIdPolList[][0] of DLData_PatternConfigReq message  - For eCPRI, same streamConfig.patternId[0] of DlData_PdschSendReq message. If ue is scheduled with subband BF, for eCPRI 7-2a (5G_L2_18130_replaced( 11155228 )), it is the start of BWV set,         and for eCPRI 7-2e(5G_L2_18130_replaced( 11155228 )), it is rtBfUeIndex. 5G_L1_5G21A_111  5G_L1_5G21A_60 CNI-115902-A patternId2 u16. 1st pattern ID.  - For CPRI, same as PDSCH symbol’s patternIdPolList[][0] of DLData_PatternConfigReq message  - For eCPRI, same streamConfig.patternId[0] of DlData_PdschSendReq message. If ue is scheduled with subband BF, for eCPRI 7-2a (5G_L2_18130_replaced( 11155228 )), it is the start of BWV set,         and for eCPRI 7-2e(5G_L2_18130_replaced( 11155228 )), it is rtBfUeIndex. 5G_L1_5G21A_111  5G_L1_5G21A_60 CNI-115902-A (ID: 13338825)

#### 2.12.2.1.124 ul Sr Prioritizer Data

##### 2.12.2.1.124.0-1 ul Sr Prioritizer Data ulSrPrioritizerData (ID: 11206743)

**2.12.2.1.124.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11206750`)

ul Sr Prioritizer Data For an UE with actServiceAwareSRPrioritization = True, anytime a positive SR received on PUCCH or a fake SR received from L2 LO, or each time SR response scheduling status changes, The event shall be traced by logging the information defined in the following structure:

ulSrPrioritizerData :

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
**Field** | **Description** | **Reference** | **First Feature**  
EventHeader | SFN on air, Slot on air, Ue identifier, Physical Cell ID | 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB013961-A  
UeSrPrioEvent | 1 srReceivingState (value = 1): positive SR received on PUCCH or a fake SR received from L2 LO | 5G_UP_ALG_31474_replaced([11203903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwhmz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB013961-A  
2 changeState (Value = 2): each time SR response scheduling status (SrRespScheduledStatus) changes | 5G_UP_ALG_31474_replaced([11203903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwhmz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB013961-A |   
3 SrPendingWaitingForGrantState (Value = 3): TsrReception tracing each time SrRespScheduledStatus changed to SR_PENDING_WAITING_FOR_GRANT | 5G_UP_ALG_31474_replaced([11203903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwhmz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB013961-A |   
4 SrPendingWaitingForUeResponseState (value = 4): SrPriorityIndex/TBS tracing each time SrRespScheduledStatus changed to SR_PENDING_WAITING_FOR_UE_RESPONSE | 5G_UP_ALG_31474_replaced([11203903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwhmz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB013961-A |   
5 SrNotPendingState (value = 5): SrPriorityIndex tracing each time SrRespScheduledStatus changed to SR_NOT_PENDING | 5G_UP_ALG_31474 replace([11203903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwhmz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB013961-A |   
SrRespSchedStatus | SR response scheduling status with: 0: SR_NOT_PENDING 1: SR_PENDING 2: SR_PENDING_WAITING_FOR_GRANT 3: SR_PENDING_WAITING_FOR_UE_RESPONSE Always present whatever UeSrPrioEvent value | 5G_UP_ALG_31474 replaced([11203903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwhmz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB013961-A  
SrPrioLevel | Ue schedulerd SR priority level with: 0: SR_RESPONSE_WITH_SR_RESP_PRIORITY 1: SR_RESPONSE_WITH_DRB_PRIORITY Always present whatever UeSrPrioEvent value | 5G_UP_ALG_31473_replaced([11203890](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwhmzfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) 5G_UP_ALG_31474_replaced([11203903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwhmz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB013961-A  
typeSr | SR on Pucch or fake SR with: 0: SR on PUCCH 1: Fake SR Always present whatever UeSrPrioEvent value | 5G_UP_ALG_31474_replaced([11203903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwhmz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB013961-A  
rrmBufferedDataUlHighestPrioLcg_bytes | Estimation of the amount of data in UE’s buffer for LCG[k], based on the BSRs and the received data amounts, k corresponds to the LCG with the highest priority DRB, Always present whatever UeSrPrioEvent value | 5G_UP_ALG_31474_replaced([11203903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwhmz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB013961-A  
rrmScheduledDataUlHighestPrioLcg_bytes | Scheduled data for LCG[k] of UE, k corresponds to the LCG with the highest priority DRB, Always present whatever UeSrPrioEvent value | 5G_UP_ALG_31474_replaced([11203903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwhmz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB013961-A  
bufferCorrSrSchedFailure | Calculated SR buffer correction in bytes according to the configured payloadSr, Always present whatever UeSrPrioEvent value | 5G_UP_ALG_31474_replaced([11203903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwhmz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB013961-A  
lcgId | Logical channel group identifier which corresponds to the LCG with the highest priority DRB in the UE (k in LCG[k]), Always present whatever UeSrPrioEvent value | 5G_UP_ALG_31474_replaced([11203903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwhmz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB013961-A  
qosId | QoS Identifier corresponding to the LCG with the highest priority DRB in the UE, Always present whatever UeSrPrioEvent value | 5G_IF_L2_397 | CB013961-A  
priorityLevelNrDrb | the priority level of the associated QoS flow (SA) / E-RAB (NSA) which are mapped to this DRB from NR DRB.Refer to 5G_L3_5394 | 5G_IF_L2_397 | CB013961-A  
TsrReceptionSfn | the SFN that scheduling request was received, significant if UeSrPrioEvent == 3, otherwise set to 0 | 5G_UP_ALG_4788_replaced([11194545](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv1qUfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB013961-A  
TsrReceptionSlot | the Slot that scheduling request was received, significant if UeSrPrioEvent == 3, otherwise set to 0 | 5G_UP_ALG_4788_replaced([11194545](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv1qUfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB013961-A  
PriorityIndex | Priority Index corresponding to 5G_UP_ALG_10322_replaced([11194333](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kv0cI_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), used to scheduler SR, significant if UeSrPrioEvent == 4, 5 otherwise set to 0xFF (invalided value) | 5G_UP_ALG_31474_replaced([11203903](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwhmz_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB013961-A  
TBS | TBS used to scheduler SR, significant if UeSrPrioEvent == 4, otherwise set to 0 (insignificant) | 5G_UP_ALG_15402_replaced([11203355](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwejfvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB013961-A

currentSssg | enum{ 0: Dense 1: Sparse } |  | CB012631-SR-A

#### 2.12.2.1.126 SRS positioning req data (ulSrsPosReceiveReqData)

##### 2.12.2.1.126.0-1 SRS positioning req data (ulSrsPosReceiveReqData) ulSrsPosReceiveReqData (ID: 11206796)

**2.12.2.1.126.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `11206802`)

SRS positioning req data (ulSrsPosReceiveReqData) When 5G-L2-PS sends the UlData_SrsPosReceiveReq, the following information carried in the message shall be traced.

**ulSrsPosReceiveReqData:**

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
**Field** | **Description** | **Reference** | **First Feature**  
EventHeader | The data as described in 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) except: - rnti is not available - physCellId is set to value received in PsPos_PosCellSetupReq (5G_L2_IF_6759_replaced([10982272](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VwsBPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))). Please note that in positioning cell, physCellId is inherited from linked NRCELL - lcrId is set to value received in PsPos_PosCellSetupReq (5G_L2_IF_6759_replaced([10982272](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VwsBPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ))). Please note that lcrId may be NRPOSCELL or NRCELL identifier, see [10982272](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VwsBPu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ). | 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB010680-I  
subcellId | Identifier of the subcell as filled in UlData_SrsPosReceiveReq, see references | 5G_L2_IF_6761_replaced([10982307](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2VwsCfu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ)), 5G_L1_IF_15340_replaced([11514526](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR32fPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB010680-I  
srsPosReportRequests | SRS positioning report requests as filled in UlData_SrsPosReceiveReq, see reference | 5G_L1_IF_15340_replaced([11514526](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR32fPvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB010680-I  
>measId | Identifier of the measurement as filled in UlData_SrsPosReceiveReq, see reference | 5G_L1_IF_15342_replaced([11514534](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR32fvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB010680-I  
>measTrps | Measured TRPs as filled in UlData_SrsPosReceiveReq, see reference. uint8, range [0-15] | 5G_L1_IF_15342_replaced([11514534](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_FR32fvvxEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB010680-I

#### 2.12.2.1.128 Multi Periodic SRS symbol Status

##### 2.12.2.1.128.0-1 Multi Periodic SRS symbol Status mulPSrsSymbolStatus (ID: 12524594)

**2.12.2.1.128.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12522070`)

Multi Periodic SRS symbol Status This event is reported every 1024 frame when there is any periodic SRS resource configured on the inactive SRS symbol which is not indicated for reception since last PsCell_CellReconfigurationReq. Refer to [11171058: Periodic SRS Symbol configuration for Cell](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26LeX_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9).

mulPSrsSymbolStatus record entry:

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
**Field** | **Description** | **Reference** | **First Feature**  
eventHeader | SFN on air, Slot on air, Ue identifier, Physical Cell ID | 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)), the Ue identifier can be 0, it is not for dedicate UE. | CB014465-B  
pSrsSymbol[MAX_NUM_SRS_SYMBOL] | Array of structure[MAX_NUM_SRS_SYMBOL], with MAX_NUM_SRS_SYMBOL=4. Array element 0~3 are corresponding to SRS symbol position 13~10. UE number on each cell pSRS symbol can be changed when user setup, user deletion or user modification. | [11171058: Periodic SRS Symbol configuration for Cell](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26LeX_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | CB014465-B  
> isActivate | bool. Indicate the periodic SRS is activated or not in this symbol. | [11171058: Periodic SRS Symbol configuration for Cell](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26LeX_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | CB014465-B  
> numOfResource | u16. Number of periodic SRS resource configured in this symbol. | [11171058: Periodic SRS Symbol configuration for Cell](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_26LeX_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | CB014465-B

#### 2.12.2.1.129 Reasons Of Dropped RIM RS Detections

##### 2.12.2.1.129.0-1 Reasons Of Dropped RIM RS Detections reasonsOfDroppedRsDetection (ID: 12540127)

**2.12.2.1.129.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12540128`)

Reasons Of Dropped RIM RS Detections Values are updated any time the RIM RS detection is dropped due to lack of resources. Update shall be done every SFN.

reasonsOfDroppedRsDetection record entry:

|  |  |   
---|---|---|---  
**Field** | **Description** | **Reference** | **First Feature**  
eventHeader | SFN on air, Slot on air, Ue identifier, Physical Cell ID | 5G_L2_1605_replaced([11201048](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTfvvTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ)) | CB011127-A  
newDetectionDroppedByLackOfPRB | RIM RS detection has been dropped due to lack of PRB assigned from PRB pooling mechanism. | Refer to [11161791](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktVv6_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | CB011127-A  
newDetectionDroppedByLackOfL1Resources | RIM RS detection has been dropped due to lack of L1 resources assigned by RIM RS pooling mechanism. | Refer to [11161791](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktVv6_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | CB011127-A  
newDetectionDroppedByOverlapWithPucchOrPrach | RIM RS detection has been dropped due to overlap with PRBs used by PRACH or PUCCH. | Refer to [11162029](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktWW_PvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | CB011127-A  
revalidationDroppedByLackOfPRB | RIM RS revalidation has been dropped due to lack of PRB assigned from PRB pooling mechanism. | Refer to [11161791](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktVv6_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | CB011127-A  
revalidationDroppedByLackOfL1Resources | RIM RS detection has been dropped due to lack of L1 resources assigned by RIM RS pooling mechanism. | Refer to [11161791](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktVv6_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | CB011127-A

#### 2.12.2.1.134 SRS BM UL beam probing

##### 2.12.2.1.134.0-1 SRS BM UL beam probing ulSrsBmBeamProbing (ID: 12590047)

**2.12.2.1.134.0-1.0-1**  (ID: `12588334`)

SRS BM UL beam probing When any event occurs for the given UE context, relevant (see [12584163](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_qKhfUDS_EfCKaNlcHOQWmg)) for the SRS BM UL [12584038: Beam probing state machine](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ZKaxIDS7EfCKaNlcHOQWmg), except exception1* (see below), 5G-L2-PS shall trace the following information:

|  |  |  |   
---|---|---|---|---  
Field | Range | Description | Reference | First Feature  
Event Header | [11201053: EventHeader](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_ay-qcPvQEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | The data as described in [11201053: EventHeader](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTf_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | [11201053: EventHeader](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTf_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | CB015692-SR-A  
srsBmBeamProbingEvent | Enum { NewSrsBmUlBeamSelection, PuschReceiveReqScheduling3rdBeamProbe, PuschReceiveReqScheduling4thBeamProbe, PuschReceiveRespReceived3rdBeam, PuschReceiveRespReceived4thBeam, SrsBmStateAged } | The event relevant for beam probing state machine. | [12584163: Events impacting the state machine](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_qKhfUDS_EfCKaNlcHOQWmg) | CB015692-SR-A  
srsBmBeamProbingState | Enum { ProbingNotStarted, OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschScheduling OneSlotProbingWaitForPuschReceiveResp, TwoSlotProbingWaitForPuschScheduling, TwoSlotProbingWaitForAllPuschReceiveResp } | The UL SRS beam probing UE state after processing the srsBeamProbingEvent (see above). | [12584154: State transition table](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_9v-G2jS9EfCKaNlcHOQWmg) | CB015692-SR-A  
rrmAvgBlerUlSrsBeamProbing | Floating Point (0..1) | The current UE average uplink block error rate computed only for transmissions done with probed beam. | [11208612: PUSCH BLER evaluation](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_kwvCLfvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | CB015692-SR-A  
  
exception1*: The event shall not be traced when all three below conditions are true:

  * Initial state is ProbingNotStarted
  * NewSrsBmUlBeamSelection event occurred
  * Probing preconditions were not achieved.



Rationale: It is to reduce the amount of tracing when 5G-L2-PS does not start the probing procedure.

##### 2.12.2.1.134.0-2 SRS BM UL beam probing ulSrsBmBeamProbingAdditionalData (ID: 12618703)

**2.12.2.1.134.0-2.0-1**  (ID: `12618715`)

SRS BM UL beam probing When:

  * [11158936: rdAngularSeparationProbing3and4](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ktF4SvvSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) is enabled and
  * the probing is being skipped because of Horizontal DoA difference check, as written in [11155448: Preconditions of Probing](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksvS-_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ).



following information shall be traced:

|  |  |  |   
---|---|---|---|---  
Field | Range | Description | Reference | First Feature  
Event Header | [11201053: EventHeader](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_ay-qcPvQEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) | The data as described in [11201053: EventHeader](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTf_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | [11201053: EventHeader](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_29tTf_vTEe-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | CB015692-SR-A  
old3rdBeamDoAH | (-2^15...2^15-1), step size: 1 | DoaH of the old (current) third beam. | [11155448: Preconditions of Probing](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_ksvS-_vSEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) [10968891: bfSetup structure content](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UaBKvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | CB015692-SR-A  
new3rdBeamDoAH | (-2^15...2^15-1), step size: 1 | DoaH of the new (proposed) third beam. | [11155448: Preconditions of Probing](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_cCS6EPvMEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) [10968891: bfSetup structure content](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UaBKvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | CB015692-SR-A  
old4thBeamDoAH | (-2^15...2^15-1), step size: 1 | DoaH of the old (current) fourth beam. | [11155448: Preconditions of Probing](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_cCS6EPvMEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) [10968891: bfSetup structure content](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UaBKvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | CB015692-SR-A  
new4thBeamDoAH | (-2^15...2^15-1), step size: 1 | DoaH of the new (proposed) fourth beam. | [11155448: Preconditions of Probing](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/TX_cCS6EPvMEe-AqvopbP1qhQ) [10968891: bfSetup structure content](https://dn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com/rm/resources/BI_2UaBKvu6Ee-AqvopbP1qhQ?oslc_config.context=https%3A%2F%2Fdn-prod.ext.net.nokia.com%2Fgc%2Fconfiguration%2F9) | CB015692-SR-A

Note: CURRENT_MAX_NUM_OF_BWP is defined "5" in this scope 11196950 CB014965 SubAreaInfoBWP: Field Description Reference First Feature bwpType BWP Type 11196950 CB014965 numberOfSubAreas Number of Sub-Areas in BWP 11196950 CB014965 subAreaInfo subAreaInfo: A dynamic array with maximum index of MAX_NUM_OF_SUB_AREA_PER_BWP containing the Subarea Information. Note: MAX_NUM_OF_SUB_AREA_PER_BWP is defined "4" in current scope. 11196950 CB014965 AreaInfo: Field Description Reference First Feature startPrb uint16   Start PRB of  the Area 11196950 CB014965 numOfPrb uint16   Number of Prbs  in the Area 11196950 CB014965 NumOfPrbsAlreadyReserved uint32   Number of Prbs  already reserved 12649846 CB014965 PRBuinitial uint32    Number of PRBs UE 'u' has received before E-ULS algorithm. 12649846 CB014965 rrmNumOfRemPrbsForDistribution uint32   Number of Prbs  available for Distribution 12649846 CB014965 Note: The TTI trace can be enabled when NRCELL-actExhaustiveScheduling is “UL” or “DLAndUL” (ID: 12653822)
